body:
Democrats have built a formidable fundraising advantage that has allowed them to win races Republicans should be winning. We’re taking measures to end their advantage this cycle. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c87bc6db06cc4445b9d5f6d62f65717b&_e=BVDoDFgguLO8Phjt336HgfZpbUy3sxacEqXnhP4_zSz3XiAGi6wx9ZPfVQDkKEXEG65sW56ldSPD8QIEEqiNskEYwwjFoV_L21xpw7AjyBcXSVKImpYChdatJyPENbWhtH5joCs8vPlS_ABbmj-UVU-8yRnAJ7QbO0jR1cWwyG-ZzD1ZJlCwbgacXpegQgBcfNAt_tZF54PEJb_lQDsVfCZlvtc69AwRnLCOI6bVbJE9N3I19mRTb5e558Xqe5Rv2gFxuKHzK5S9x_Uom39MyDUOl_qwWQeEjFuZwuyVrc1qbgudrmvrtNz0cEmZoHeKRRn01lG2kVZznT9wvxS8GHxN-JPaE4boq_JUwOj1xteRe9TyWnJikZFNLjQxbCaQkxHFIj-fHfyL5yHUZ3hPmnDvyk81k8Q7ZW9-A5vQerewAS9rUUmMa-Jc09cRcTY71xX3Jyv9ZW_FMGi7r1S2eA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

Democrats have done a bang-up job forcing Republicans to spend millions - if not hundreds of millions - in races that we shouldn't have to spend in to win. Their tactic of forcing our Party to spend valuable resources on races that aren't truly winnable has had the added benefit of allowing their party leaders to focus their abundant resources on winning in swing states that decide the Senate majority.

**We're announcing a new program designed to end their financial advantage.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c87bc6db06cc4445b9d5f6d62f65717b&_e=BVDoDFgguLO8Phjt336HgfZpbUy3sxacEqXnhP4_zSz3XiAGi6wx9ZPfVQDkKEXEG65sW56ldSPD8QIEEqiNskEYwwjFoV_L21xpw7AjyBcXSVKImpYChdatJyPENbWhtH5joCs8vPlS_ABbmj-UVU-8yRnAJ7QbO0jR1cWwyG-ZzD1ZJlCwbgacXpegQgBcfNAt_tZF54PEJb_lQDsVfCZlvtc69AwRnLCOI6bVbJE9N3I19mRTb5e558Xqe5Rv2gFxuKHzK5S9x_Uom39MyDUOl_qwWQeEjFuZwuyVrc1tL_jnJXttc1Cr3cL2bUE9Im26CsNRT1SmIxTAaxKS52cTlr0f14IaRr3Df3po1KO7XWQpO43f4iNBC7fejN3G6iupqTs6NOTjdgsprMNmy5uYMtMf_LXk02-FI1mBKWr1QURYmOzDzoXjVUY8HToW9RLRMdhnAmY9Z6LTmXRTJA%3D%3D)
Our Nominee Funds Program will be spearheaded by one of the most adept fundraisers in the Republican Party, Senator Lindsey Graham. If you've ever been hesitant of donating to the NRSC in the past, you can rest assured that your donation will be put to good use; **[with Lindsey at the helm of this new program, I'm confident this initiative will be a success.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c87bc6db06cc4445b9d5f6d62f65717b&_e=BVDoDFgguLO8Phjt336HgfZpbUy3sxacEqXnhP4_zSz3XiAGi6wx9ZPfVQDkKEXEG65sW56ldSPD8QIEEqiNskEYwwjFoV_L21xpw7AjyBcXSVKImpYChdatJyPENbWhtH5joCs8vPlS_ABbmj-UVU-8yRnAJ7QbO0jR1cWwyG-ZzD1ZJlCwbgacXpegQgBcfNAt_tZF54PEJb_lQDsVfCZlvtc69AwRnLCOI6bVbJE9N3I19mRTb5e558Xqe5Rv2gFxuKHzK5S9x_Uom39MyDUOl_qwWQeEjFuZwuyVrc3gMcYegZMjVB9LRmzN61mgKWei11g1MmsJtCMfUYmZziQVypatIZV8eIE2vrENKSlrpCFja0rua0WvefYzZ71b8spmOdhixQx6gLxd-mfEiTaGmbMUPbbzDEvtx8PD2nwRaSBJT55Hn5337aJlYOM32WsBYiBTV06xrv9eMTJbMQ%3D%3D)**

| [** Contribute $4 today
Help us Avoid Losing Winnable Races ->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c87bc6db06cc4445b9d5f6d62f65717b&_e=BVDoDFgguLO8Phjt336HgfZpbUy3sxacEqXnhP4_zSz3XiAGi6wx9ZPfVQDkKEXEG65sW56ldSPD8QIEEqiNskEYwwjFoV_L21xpw7AjyBcXSVKImpYChdatJyPENbWhtH5joCs8vPlS_ABbmj-UVU-8yRnAJ7QbO0jR1cWwyG-ZzD1ZJlCwbgacXpegQgBcfNAt_tZF54PEJb_lQDsVfCZlvtc69AwRnLCOI6bVbJE9N3I19mRTb5e558Xqe5Rv2gFxuKHzK5S9x_Uom39MyDUOl_qwWQeEjFuZwuyVrc2q9VxZoczSt5s841Hzsyyvc36seJCHlCvRUMvmMYAWtlQqcYzhV7wFSdlXw7cJ91HKr7XVjXUqbDpZVQcmEUR0p69KIMJHiaa94utivNWH0qEiCgSkyoo8lRyoyURipNNpHrjxaK1QTGGPnFFH2Zwmk-CwC6p7x1-HrH9nK83MDA%3D%3D)
---

To say that the last couple of years have been disappointing for our Party and our Senate candidates is an understatement. Republicans should be in the majority, yet we have lost some very winnable races because the candidates didn't have the cash on hand to defeat their otherwise lackluster opponents. I've got to be honest with you: being in the minority is ZERO fun. That is why we're starting the process of raising funds for future Senate candidates **TODAY**.

We've determined that our best prospects for flipping seats currently held by Democrats are in Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia. While we won't know the official Republican nominee until next year, **[we're asking you to chip in $4 today to ensure that when the primaries are over, our candidates in each of these three top-tier Senate races have the war chest they need to win.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c87bc6db06cc4445b9d5f6d62f65717b&_e=BVDoDFgguLO8Phjt336HgfZpbUy3sxacEqXnhP4_zSz3XiAGi6wx9ZPfVQDkKEXEG65sW56ldSPD8QIEEqiNskEYwwjFoV_L21xpw7AjyBcXSVKImpYChdatJyPENbWhtH5joCs8vPlS_ABbmj-UVU-8yRnAJ7QbO0jR1cWwyG-ZzD1ZJlCwbgacXpegQgBcfNAt_tZF54PEJb_lQDsVfCZlvtc69AwRnLCOI6bVbJE9N3I19mRTb5e558Xqe5Rv2gFxuKHzK5S9x_Uom39MyDUOl_qwWQeEjFuZwuyVrc1AMZXbtq84eqx4Q3fG8-YQfL2Sk-NeDjadNGabWi5UF60DyZ5z8gUT-grAWplZwnlFcMwzoFsGI0upaMUWe57OqeWbgKVYMYRstmwZfH4w99TpNzOpjLhQ27SHC5cfPQhXJzKOATNqKcd-3ZhcVOaxbJhkwcU9q4LnAowAUxWq_Q%3D%3D)**

**[Your $4 donation will be split between the future candidates in Montana, Ohio, and West Virginia.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c87bc6db06cc4445b9d5f6d62f65717b&_e=BVDoDFgguLO8Phjt336HgfZpbUy3sxacEqXnhP4_zSz3XiAGi6wx9ZPfVQDkKEXEG65sW56ldSPD8QIEEqiNskEYwwjFoV_L21xpw7AjyBcXSVKImpYChdatJyPENbWhtH5joCs8vPlS_ABbmj-UVU-8yRnAJ7QbO0jR1cWwyG-ZzD1ZJlCwbgacXpegQgBcfNAt_tZF54PEJb_lQDsVfCZlvtc69AwRnLCOI6bVbJE9N3I19mRTb5e558Xqe5Rv2gFxuKHzK5S9x_Uom39MyDUOl_qwWQeEjFuZwuyVrc1APFHrdhbpCNGJz0iqbd7iJspoDfKad6ErIdeekF-0kgNgBjOWRiGIknST8Udu_xuRN3FUBjiB7qpfOuU8L17LP4hTKgcmpLn6PfskK72e4HBZFGdLY16Fnm5OVtfwM9PjtkkxxLOlXt54sKlp4-MNsuaBqAMdics8XMcPqextpA%3D%3D)** If you want to avoid more bruising, avoidable defeats in next year's election, _then we need YOU to step up before it's too late!_

Thank you,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c87bc6db06cc4445b9d5f6d62f65717b&_e=BVDoDFgguLO8Phjt336HgfZpbUy3sxacEqXnhP4_zSz3XiAGi6wx9ZPfVQDkKEXEG65sW56ldSPD8QIEEqiNskEYwwjFoV_L21xpw7AjyBcXSVKImpYChdatJyPENbWhtH5joCs8vPlS_ABbmj-UVU-8yRnAJ7QbO0jR1cWwyG-ZzD1ZJlCwbgacXpegQgBcfNAt_tZF54PEJb_lQDsVfCZlvtc69AwRnLCOI6bVbJE9N3I19mRTb5e558Xqe5Rv2gFxuKHzK5S9x_Uom39MyDUOl_qwWQeEjFuZwuyVrc2ZUtCgdBTo1-JDScaPIy00zU30Fei0xbrCg5PQok9zXnwG6UuSCFgr3WwboPSFK4X7IGBSNdwOqxifD8eQw5Gw68-jQLP1O_eGRpUi21klZXNFgPhR9hoWvdPabxLpOSjokO2u1zeTshLynJXl-ePS2QL-MxzFlW5fwQYe1xK9_g%3D%3D)

Steve Daines
Chairman of the NRSC

[** CHIP IN $4 ->**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c87bc6db06cc4445b9d5f6d62f65717b&_e=BVDoDFgguLO8Phjt336HgfZpbUy3sxacEqXnhP4_zSz3XiAGi6wx9ZPfVQDkKEXEG65sW56ldSPD8QIEEqiNskEYwwjFoV_L21xpw7AjyBcXSVKImpYChdatJyPENbWhtH5joCs8vPlS_ABbmj-UVU-8yRnAJ7QbO0jR1cWwyG-ZzD1ZJlCwbgacXpegQgBcfNAt_tZF54PEJb_lQDsVfCZlvtc69AwRnLCOI6bVbJE9N3I19mRTb5e558Xqe5Rv2gFxuKHzK5S9x_Uom39MyDUOl_qwWQeEjFuZwuyVrc2tvqgF1QnXoUyNXrJjPEoTXjXD4PDNHDtIOo8D7CBh1vaumnKd0L5Z4fKmBOEd-1XQYKS9AMkltDPXIyyZ8YVa2frc44UxOcRvS0fpVrczb5L3eP2-MppdXVrlz5oCdlLa33yAUVMHyPm4jPVeYT28yGzbYUsR7wCSOq88f37SjA%3D%3D)

## Tonight Is IMPORTANT!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11037.1.e3255f0211f46a9345b93e93b3527601)
---
I have been asked to arrange a [National Prayer Call](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11038.1.4f1d283beefb11fcee882058cb57a881) for **President Donald Trump** tonight over the outlandish _witch hunt_ that he is facing down.
As you know, **President Trump** has indicated that he will be arrested on Tuesday due to fabricated charges from a corrupt George Soros backed District Attorney in New York.
It is quite hard to believe this is happening in America... but it is.
**I am asking you to join me tonight at 6pm CT to pray for President Trump.**
Some of **President Trump's** closest allies will be joining the livestream to give exclusive insights as well as updates.
You can join the Prayer Call by visiting: [www.pastors4trump.com/prayercall](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11039.1.3c46063d040744c424d57ba365a51b79) or through [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11040.1.12ea2a24eac33a13bf7f2da9fa3ee650), [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11041.1.3fa5758525ed17d7ae60981b17820ea8) & [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11042.1.7ae7bff18a57bc6665d0260489d77342).
We will be doing Q&A tonight also.
Please make sure to join me and invite friends as well.
We need to show **President Trump** we have his back!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11043.1.938fc93d7aa4a3f1802923a2dabcc5a4), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11044.1.19511576ff4c7e1811e3fe8171bd932e), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11045.1.ef9d1be00e59f507ef56b125195cc9c0), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11046.1.cee176cb7e61de4fa94fb10a6c1417bc), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11047.1.83b929a28b7396be7832d847af571075) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11048.1.39524ede55c7660bededf15807647d3f)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11049.1.cd7585aa3bc90027e7dff7a51f200447)
| | [ Join The National Prayer Call ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11050.1.54cf5dba172821799c194c325c6fec50)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11051.1.1136413e4e463f754ae6195f607ad9ff)
---
Recently, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11052.1.6c4165eaa4f0434e07458bd22afa2a95) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11053.1.be88edb6393f3d5ceb35077ae65dbc24)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11054.1.1619415432d92c073fc2eebe7efc5c4e) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11055.1.d2e77d4b724253dc3800f1ee275a1987) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11056.1.53cf775460d1b6e6f2619f39a13593b9) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11057.1.d99360bb9f3b8b8e5d2912ac38ee1610) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11058.1.df0e36a992d672dd7bf13d52691ac012) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=18974592.11059.1.45458f543b63c3105d996b7cd8afc01a) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.
---

subject: Is there a cash crisis in America? Deadline March 21
body:
It's the second-largest bank collapse in history.

| Dear Reader, It's the second-largest bank collapse in history. Second only to Washington Mutual when it went under in 2008. Of course, I am talking about the sudden demise of Silicon Valley Bank... The 16th largest bank in the U.S. Where an actual run on the bank happened... With people in line waiting to withdraw their money. Then Signature Bank in NY was shut down by regulators. Making it the second massive bank failure in 3 days. These events beg the question...Is your bank safe? Is your money safe? Ph.D. economist, investigative journalist, and former global investment banker Dr. Nomi Prins is cautioning individuals about what's next for America. And she reveals the exact steps she recommends you take to protect your future. She calls it the "New American Era Blueprint." **[You can get all the details here.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlde7cmaruc5748346gtdl5emf2sgh382ikaviko_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spg66ob1cjh2bs)** Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, _Rogue Economics_ **P.S.** This message is time sensitive. | **_The Sneaky IRS Tax Law to "Opt Out" of Bank Failures_** **Big Banks Don't Want You to Know About the Opportunity this IRS "Cheat Code" Unlocks... That Isn't Stopping It From Sweeping the U.S...** Big banks and the IRS want you to think, the only way to secure your savings and retirement is to keep your cash in an FDIC insured account or load up on stocks. The recent string of bank failures has millions of Americans second guessing this approach, especially for their hard-earned nest egg in an IRA or 401(k). But, **_you have options_**. Did you know that you can move your retirement savings out of cash or stocks, and KEEP your tax-advantaged status? **Have you heard about Section 408(m)(3)?** It's a little-known cousin of Section 401(k) of IRS code. I like to call it the "cheat code" that **unlocks investments** you simply can't find on Wall Street. Here's what I mean... Section 408(m)(3) lets you open a Precious Metals "Self Directed" IRA and put REAL gold and silver into a tax-advantaged account. Here are three good reasons to consider this IRS "cheat code"... **#1:** Gold protects against stock crashes. **#2:** Unlike savings in a bank account, gold is not susceptible to bank failures. **#3:** If something catastrophic happens to the dollar, gold can be used as currency around the world. **While you still can:** Get a no-cost info kit on gold, and the IRS "Cheat Code" to legally move your IRA or 401(k) to precious metals - with NO tax consequences. | Thank you to everyone helping us recruit delegates for the May 6 convention.

| Convention Form Deadline Monday March 20
Hanover and Amelia
---
| I need your help!

We will have a Senate District 10 Convention on May 6. You will not be able to vote for me unless you complete a Delegate Form found here www.john4va.com
The deadline to turn in delegate forms for Hanover and Amelia County is today 4pm Monday March 20. Please let your friends know they can go to www.john4va.com and easily print the form. You can then scan the delegate form and email to me john@mcguireforvirgina.com
Each county has a different form deadline date. Please ask/ share this email with friends and family.
At the top of the form for "Unit" put your county. Reach out to our team at john@mcguireforvirginia.com or call 804 588 2646 with questions and to turn in your form.
Delegate Form County Deadlines:
Monday, March 20 - Hanover, Amelia. Friday, March 24 - Powhatan.
Closed:
Saturday, March 11 - Prince Edward. Wednesday, March 15 - Cumberland, Goochland. Friday, March 17 - Buckingham, Louisa, Fluvanna, Appomattox
---
| Debate Link/ Democrats
---
| I will not get involved in mudslinging but I will hold my opponent, who was a three time Democrat and continues to govern like a Democrat by raising taxes and trying to intimidate others, accountable for his record.
[Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xO8nys_xq_kaAhVBRTZACkctNRWg83FBiDNm2BbpdSmyFhpTpv_51_sU4DLenliZBz0UhYwfYjD8Hyhsclrp88P2u3_krXm6ICodXdIm5KkV-JxUOEHIpjJ4JgVUryOeSa0E7dOkZL9vTShmFVUQVfl7-qHFPg_a9uGBpgc_fOwt82orXMNXLA==&c=l83ZwOkNzYOf7_lFvyyASyNNxIsOs4dEYNRmy4sPlVRjx4sNFXUBxg==&ch=S59_y27OvWC5E4HCwcrN2RD_dBAwNJOKHBdTZS9Dm1O0tVSqfFJstQ==) for the Louisa Debate Closing Statements on YouTube. My Louisa opponent shows his true colors in less than two minutes.
Democrats have destroyed trust all over the place, including our elections, our schools, and much more. It is unbelievable what is happening in our schools. For example, this year we found over 100 books in school libraries that would get you arrested if you gave them to a child at a playground. They are also making a mockery of girls by putting boys in girls sports and boys in girls bathrooms right here in Senate District 10. Unfortunately, the Democrat controlled Virginia State Senate is blocking or watering down just about everything fellow Republicans and I are trying to do. I have a six year solid conservative voting record, so you do not have to guess how I will vote in the Senate. Together we can win back the Senate, restore trust, and un-California Virginia.
But first, I need your help to win the May 6 Convention at Buckingham County High School.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | | Thank you to everyone helping us recruit delegates for the May 6 convention. | Convention Form Deadline Monday March 20 Hanover and Amelia | I need your help! We will have a Senate District 10 Convention on May 6. You will not be able to vote for me unless you complete a Delegate Form found here www.john4va.com The deadline to turn in delegate forms for Hanover and Amelia County is today 4pm Monday March 20. Please let your friends know they can go to www.john4va.com and easily print the form. You can then scan the delegate form and email to me john@mcguireforvirgina.com Each county has a different form deadline date. Please ask/ share this email with friends and family. At the top of the form for "Unit" put your county. Reach out to our team at john@mcguireforvirginia.com or call 804 588 2646 with questions and to turn in your form. Delegate Form County Deadlines: Monday, March 20 - Hanover, Amelia. Friday, March 24 - Powhatan. Closed: Saturday, March 11 - Prince Edward. Wednesday, March 15 - Cumberland, Goochland. Friday, March 17 - Buckingham, Louisa, Fluvanna, Appomattox | Debate Link/ Democrats | I will not get involved in mudslinging but I will hold my opponent, who was a three time Democrat and continues to govern like a Democrat by raising taxes and trying to intimidate others, accountable for his record. == for the Louisa Debate Closing Statements on YouTube. My Louisa opponent shows his true colors in less than two minutes. Democrats have destroyed trust all over the place, including our elections, our schools, and much more. It is unbelievable what is happening in our schools. For example, this year we found over 100 books in school libraries that would get you arrested if you gave them to a child at a playground. They are also making a mockery of girls by putting boys in girls sports and boys in girls bathrooms right here in Senate District 10. Unfortunately, the Democrat controlled Virginia State Senate is blocking or watering down just about everything fellow Republicans and I are trying to do. I have a six year solid conservative voting record, so you do not have to guess how I will vote in the Senate. Together we can win back the Senate, restore trust, and un-California Virginia. But first, I need your help to win the May 6 Convention at Buckingham County High School. | == | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | Seventy Plus Endorsement List == | A Few District Photos | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Lila Rose
subject: Alert: Pharmacies becoming abortion facilities
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vW8HzfdDON

We must stop our pharmacies from turning into abortion
businesses.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW8HzfdDON

Friend of Life,

I have an urgent request.

As you may have heard, Walgreens,
CVS, and Rite Aid have announced that they will start selling the
lethal abortion pill with a prescription.

Despite outrage from thousands of
customers and pro-life individuals who took action and made their
voices heard, these pharmacies remain undeterred.

Walgreens, CVS, and Rite Aid have
committed to turn your local pharmacy into a neighborhood
abortion facility, putting the lives of countless preborn
children and their mothers at risk-and your action is needed
today, before it's too late.

Please sign the petition to tell
CVS, Walgreens, and Rite Aid to protect women and children by
keeping the abortion pill out of their pharmacies.

True health care heals; it does
not kill. We must stop our pharmacies from turning into abortion
businesses.

The abortion pill has killed 5.6
million preborn children since 2000, and the number of babies
whose lives are ended by this lethal method is skyrocketing. Over
50% of abortions in America are now committed by the abortion
pill.

The Biden administration FDA is
working to eliminate regulations on the pills, paving the way for
pharmacies to start dispensing this lethal drug in every
city-even in pro-life states with stronger protections for
preborn children.

This is the deadly new frontier
of Big Abortion, and we must fight back.

You can add your name to the
petition here:
https://www.liveaction.org/wallgreens-cvs-petition/

Thank you for standing up for our
most vulnerable and for being their voice.

For Life,

Lila Rose
President and Founder

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB
111 Arlington, VA 22201

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: The Greenhalgh Gazette - March 20, 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Karen Greenhalgh for Delegate
body:
The latest news from your representative in the House of Delegates.
| | |
---
| | **The Road Ahead: Tying Up Loose Ends
**
---
| | With the 2023 Session of the General Assembly now concluded, Delegates and Senators have returned to their districts to regroup. After Governor Youngkin makes his decision on all of the bills we passed in the legislature, the General Assembly will reconvene on April 12 to review his vetoes and recommendations. Like many other states, Virginia law allows its Governor to not only veto entire bills, but also small sections through "line item" vetoes. A relatively rare provision in Virginia's Constitution is the Governor's "amendatory" veto power. Only permitted in six U.S. states (Alabama, Illinois, Massachusetts, Montana, New Jersey and Virginia), Governor Youngkin can propose amendments, essentially an implied line item veto, and return the bill to the legislature for its approval. When we return next month, the House and Senate will have the opportunity to override vetoes, requiring a two-thirds majority vote for each vetoed bill. Should the Governor propose amendments to any bills, both houses will vote to approve, reject, or modify them. Following the Reconvened Session, a Special Session may convene over the summer to confirm changes to Virginia's 2022-2024 budget. Fortunately, there is no danger of a shutdown regardless of outcome. The existing biennial budget funds all state operations into 2024. This year's budget negotiations concern how the budget will be amended. After implementation last year, Virginia ended up with a $3.6 billion budget surplus. Determined to put this windfall to work, Governor Youngkin requested the General Assembly amend the budget to reflect his administration's plan to further invest in schools, mental and behavioral health resources, and tax relief. The final objective of the General Assembly in 2023 is to finish amending the budget. Currently, the budget bills are in conference, meaning a group of legislators, or "conferees", are tasked with negotiating conflicting amendments proposed by the House and the Senate respectively. Only a fraction of the amendments were agreed upon by the conferees before the Regular Session ended on February 25th.
Governor Youngkin has urged budget negotiations to continue, and expressed willingness to call for a Special Session so lawmakers can vote on the conference report. According to the Richmond Times-Dispatch, the conferees are expected to meet again this upcoming week, and they have been working on a compromise behind the scenes since the legislature adjourned.
In the weeks leading up to Reconvened Session, please don't hesitate to share your input on how the General Assembly should respond to vetoes and recommended amendments from the Governor. As he makes those decisions, you will find them under the heading "Governor", on the "Bills & Resolutions" page at [www.lis.virginia.gov](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/70ebefc8fe27518c/350a9c430aa47bcec3d6b838967d376c/37923). If I can be of any assistance to you, please feel free to contact me at [DelKGreenhalgh@house.virginia.gov](mailto:DelKGreenhalgh@house.virginia.gov) or call (804) 698-1085.

---
| | **Hampton Roads Women in Politics
**
---
| |
---
Hosted by the Suffolk Public Library in celebration of Women's History Month, the Women in Politics event brought together four women in elected offices to discuss our experiences in the public sphere. I was honored to participate as a panelist (left) alongside Narendra Pleas, Commonwealth's Attorney of Suffolk (center left); Delegate Emily Brewer, 64th District (center right); and Delegate Jackie Glass, 89th District (right). Together, we enjoyed a friendly and constructive dialogue on navigating the political arena from a woman's perspective.
---
| | **Presentation on Excess Deaths**
---
| |
---
In response to a request I submitted last July, the Virginia Department of Health (VDH) conducted an investigation on non-COVID deaths in Virginia during the height of the pandemic. The subsequent report, affectionately dubbed _The Greenhalgh Report_ , is an empirical analysis of notably abnormal mortality patterns in recent years. Last weekend, I presented the VDH's findings to interested parties at a weekly meeting of the Virginia Beach GOP.
My motivation to propose this research was the CDC's observations of dramatic rises in mortality rates by natural causes other than COVID-19 over the past two years. I wanted to determine the extent of this phenomenon in Virginia, and what may be the prospective cause(s). What, if anything, can the Commonwealth do for its citizens? Under the direction of Dr. Colin Greene, then-Commissioner of the VDH, analysts of the Department compiled and thoroughly evaluated state health data, culminating in _The Greenhalgh Report._ Virginia is the first state to formally investigate the upswing in non-COVID deaths. To read _The Greenhalgh Report_ in its entirety, follow the link below:
---
[_Read the Report
_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/70ebefc8fe27518c/31fc0fd99b0f6299c3d6b838967d376c/37923)
---
| | **Newport News Shipbuilding Apprentice School Graduation
**
---
| |
---
Standing above a sea of maroon mortarboards, Governor Youngkin delivers the commencement speech to Newport News Shipbuilding Apprentice School's graduating Class of 2022. It a was privilege to attend and witness these two-hundred apprentices be conferred one of the world's finest vocational credentials for naval construction.

---
---
Together, Delegate A.C. Cordoza (91st District) and I were proud to be the General Assembly's envoys to the graduation ceremony. Delegate Cordoza has an especially strong connection to Newport News Shipbuilding, having been employed by the firm prior to being elected to represent Hampton, Poquoson, and York County in the House of Delegates.

---
| |
---
Governor Youngkin offered his congratulations to each apprentice as they crossed the stage to ring the ceremonial ship's bell, signifying the successful completion of their apprenticeship. The Administration was also represented in attendance by Bryan Slater, Secretary of Labor; and Gary Pan, Commissioner of the Department of Labor and Industry.
---
| | **Congratulations to Virginia Beach's Apprentice School Graduates!
**
---
| | * With Honors ** With High Honors
---
| | **Darek Dabbs, Jr.**_Shipfitter_ **Shane DeFonseca***_Outside Machinest_ **John Dittig** _Pipefitter_ **Mark Dizon** _Electrician_ **Mark Hogge** _Shipfitter_ **Matthew McDonald** _Welder_ **Charles Miller*
**_Shipfitter_ **Jeremy Mosley***_Metrology Technician_
---
| **Joseph Randolph III****_Supply Chain Specialist_ **Denise Sampson** _Outside Machinist_ **Rowland Saunders III** _Pipefitter_ **Karl Stolte****_Pipefitter_ **Kevin Stolte** _Electrician_ **Hayden Sweeney** _Insulator_ **James West III
** _Rigger_ **Tyler Wooten
** _Electrician_
---
| | **Homeless Reduction Grants Awarded to Local Projects
**
---
| | Last week, the Governor's Office announced $12 million in Homeless Reduction Grants from the Virginia Housing Trust Fund. This grant disbursement represents the maximum 20% of the Housing Trust Fund, provided each fiscal year by the General Assembly. Projects eligible to receive Homeless Reduction Grants include rapid re-housing, innovative projects for unaccompanied youth or older homeless adults, and rental aid and stabilization for the chronically indigent residing in permanent supportive housing. Of the sixty-eight projects awarded grants, four will partially or entirely be directed towards reducing and preventing homelessness in Virginia Beach. For fiscal year 2023, these local projects will receive funds totaling $518,958 to protect our most vulnerable populations.
* YWCA - Southside Hampton Roads Rapid Rehousing
* **$96,202**

* Judeo-Christian Outreach Center - Virginia Beach Rapid Rehousing
* **$150,000**

* Virginia Supportive Housing - Cloverleaf & Crescent Square Apartments
* **$110,000**
* Senior Services of Southeastern Virginia - Southside Hampton Roads Homeless Older Adults

* **$162,756**

---
|
---
| |
---
| Your Delegate,
---
|
---
**Delegate Karen S. Greenhalgh** _Virginia General Assembly_**
** Richmond: 1-804-698-1085 District: 1-757-636-7316[DelKGreenhalgh@house.virginia.gov](mailto:DelKGreenhalgh@house.virginia.gov "DelKGreenhalgh@house.virginia.gov")

Peter,

I've said this since day one, and I will say it again.

**This campaign will be won - _or lost_ - by the grassroots support Team Vivek builds over the next year and a half.**

I've personally invested the resources I've earned through my hard work to make sure we can build a winning campaign. I cannot do this alone.

**[Will you join me by chipping in right now?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456215:JAf1lnGNl:m:1:3365131770:749F15738D108D34819FD3908DD74F1F:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456216:JAf1lnGNl:m:1:3365131770:749F15738D108D34819FD3908DD74F1F:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456217:JAf1lnGNl:m:1:3365131770:749F15738D108D34819FD3908DD74F1F:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456218:JAf1lnGNl:m:1:3365131770:749F15738D108D34819FD3908DD74F1F:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456219:JAf1lnGNl:m:1:3365131770:749F15738D108D34819FD3908DD74F1F:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456220:JAf1lnGNl:m:1:3365131770:749F15738D108D34819FD3908DD74F1F:r)
I'm putting everything I can personally into this campaign because I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to rescue our nation.

But my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to put some skin in the game with me.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456215:JAf1lnGNl:m:1:3365131770:749F15738D108D34819FD3908DD74F1F:r)**

It's going to take courage to change Washington, but with you on my team, I know we can win!

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456215:JAf1lnGNl:m:1:3365131770:749F15738D108D34819FD3908DD74F1F:r)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** JOIN THE MOVEMENT -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456215:JAf1lnGNl:m:1:3365131770:749F15738D108D34819FD3908DD74F1F:r)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456215:JAf1lnGNl:m:1:3365131770:749F15738D108D34819FD3908DD74F1F:r)

---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Texas Judge Hearing Case on Mifepristone's Health Risks and Poor FDA Vetting
body:
And Utah Governor Bans All Abortion Clinics

I’m a mother, wife, business owner, and proud American. I’m worried about the direction our country is headed in. The cost of living is outrageous, our family business is struggling, and our country’s self-loathing is heartbreaking. I am ready for change, and I am ready for new leadership in the White House… There's one candidate who’s had my support for years, and I planned to vote for in 2024. But, since Nikki Haley jumped into the race, I thought it wouldn’t hurt to hear her out before I made my final decision. That’s why, last week, I drove to Myrtle Beach to stand in a long line with a thousand other patriots to hear Nikki speak at a rally. The unexpected happened during this rally. I watched a fellow mother, woman, and hardworking American speak genuinely and truthfully about her mission to save America. Nikki Haley offered REAL solutions to secure our border, decrease inflation, and rebuild a thriving economy. Nikki Haley gave me hope for the future of a strong and proud America. Nikki Haley changed my mind about who I will be voting for in the 2024 presidential election. Nikki Haley NOW has my vote. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d5fee20ce08bb18e635a5117df4c484a49d0277192f21af8377cc280982b19b0c5f853be7da4356267b969a302f78d609ad91c4183092adc0645ab5bef5d9160 SUPPORT NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT If she’s in your area, travel to a town hall to meet with her and ask questions. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d5fee20ce08bb18e635a5117df4c484a49d0277192f21af8377cc280982b19b0c5f853be7da4356267b969a302f78d609ad91c4183092adc0645ab5bef5d9160 If you want to help her spread her message to every American, consider chipping in to help fund her campaign. I promise you will not regret it. Thank you for taking the time to read my story. Lisa https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=d5fee20ce08bb18e635a5117df4c484a49d0277192f21af8377cc280982b19b0c5f853be7da4356267b969a302f78d609ad91c4183092adc0645ab5bef5d9160 DONATE GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I want to write this check
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456233:J6x-onGXN:m:1:3391001263:8C929F904D9E70D778723AF6097E6047:r)
Peter,

I've said this since day one, and I will say it again.

**This campaign will be won - _or lost_ - by the grassroots support Team Vivek builds over the next year and a half.**

I've personally invested the resources I've earned through my hard work to make sure we can build a winning campaign. I cannot do this alone.

**[Will you join me by chipping in right now?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456233:J6x-onGXN:m:1:3391001263:8C929F904D9E70D778723AF6097E6047:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456234:J6x-onGXN:m:1:3391001263:8C929F904D9E70D778723AF6097E6047:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456235:J6x-onGXN:m:1:3391001263:8C929F904D9E70D778723AF6097E6047:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456236:J6x-onGXN:m:1:3391001263:8C929F904D9E70D778723AF6097E6047:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456237:J6x-onGXN:m:1:3391001263:8C929F904D9E70D778723AF6097E6047:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456238:J6x-onGXN:m:1:3391001263:8C929F904D9E70D778723AF6097E6047:r)
I'm putting everything I can personally into this campaign because I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to rescue our nation.

But my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to put some skin in the game with me.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456233:J6x-onGXN:m:1:3391001263:8C929F904D9E70D778723AF6097E6047:r)**

It's going to take courage to change Washington, but with you on my team, I know we can win!

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456233:J6x-onGXN:m:1:3391001263:8C929F904D9E70D778723AF6097E6047:r)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** JOIN THE MOVEMENT -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456233:J6x-onGXN:m:1:3391001263:8C929F904D9E70D778723AF6097E6047:r)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62456233:J6x-onGXN:m:1:3391001263:8C929F904D9E70D778723AF6097E6047:r)

---

Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. name: Lindsey Graham
subject: I’d like to know your priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455545:JXviVnGpN:m:1:3331421248:9C303A62BCE22627A5693F68CD3BFEA9:r)

[**2023 SENATE SURVEY**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455545:JXviVnGpN:m:1:3331421248:9C303A62BCE22627A5693F68CD3BFEA9:r)

******************************************************[OPEN YOUR SURVEY>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455545:JXviVnGpN:m:1:3331421248:9C303A62BCE22627A5693F68CD3BFEA9:r)******************************************************
Peter,

I know we haven't touched base recently, but I wanted to reach out on behalf of the Senate Republicans because a new year brings new opportunities to get our country back on track.

Despite giving it our all last year, Chuck Schumer and the Democrats still hold the Senate majority. But let me make something abundantly clear - we will NEVER stop fighting for you and the issues that matter to you most.

Which is why I'm reaching out today. **[I want to hear directly from you about what policies you think the Senate needs to focus on first this year.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455545:JXviVnGpN:m:1:3331421248:9C303A62BCE22627A5693F68CD3BFEA9:r)**
**[2023 SENATE SURVEY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455545:JXviVnGpN:m:1:3331421248:9C303A62BCE22627A5693F68CD3BFEA9:r)**
[CAN A REPUBLICAN BEAT PRESIDENT BIDEN NEXT YEAR AND TAKE BACK THE WHITE HOUSE?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455545:JXviVnGpN:m:1:3331421248:9C303A62BCE22627A5693F68CD3BFEA9:r)

******************************************************[YES>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455545:JXviVnGpN:m:1:3331421248:9C303A62BCE22627A5693F68CD3BFEA9:r)******************************************************

******************************************************[NO>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455545:JXviVnGpN:m:1:3331421248:9C303A62BCE22627A5693F68CD3BFEA9:r)******************************************************

******************************************************[OPEN YOUR SURVEY>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455545:JXviVnGpN:m:1:3331421248:9C303A62BCE22627A5693F68CD3BFEA9:r)******************************************************
Patriot, it doesn't take a rocket scientist to know the Democrats liberal agenda is crippling our country. Now more than ever, what Washington needs is problem solvers who are willing to do whatever it takes to get things done for the American people.

I've seen firsthand that my Republican colleagues in the Senate are up for the challenge, but now we need to hear from you.

**[Please, let me know what policies you think the Senate should be focusing on, and I'll make sure we get to work.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455545:JXviVnGpN:m:1:3331421248:9C303A62BCE22627A5693F68CD3BFEA9:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455545:JXviVnGpN:m:1:3331421248:9C303A62BCE22627A5693F68CD3BFEA9:r)
Lindsey Graham
United States Senator from South Carolina

******************************************************[OPEN YOUR SURVEY>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455545:JXviVnGpN:m:1:3331421248:9C303A62BCE22627A5693F68CD3BFEA9:r)******************************************************

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Reserve your DVD box set
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff3aa880036a45bfac59131daa61ce95&_e=YgqiRVquL4hZX_OblSEcmsKSOrgzIMirLalRcajMpVzzYGaiLTz107C3clX8DA6NzAoChtHStx6hg4FvRJ8Zv8SjmyeUTMcXTVMQlWz6ygaW13RU7raqGjYWmgOGK-A7j-dRf3GCLy4DBmbOeyafKK-HUCDxMOWIKBYNMWcrBCdt8MSmf0_1gHI26zsDXBfXGj23iMtgjfppoHJ22KcRvpqwGl_75gdIplVcIw95ykBk6q8M-vP0qmN6DXMk9aptw8HlRLOqxkX_osozKtRQC0Lj6vzNRRwnzbh3zghnmXv-ceepF8mhF1Olp4uoroxQELi6lfmkt9rumOD_MrrF04f1FHwm_viYO-JhZlWGqoPmDrMcBqywkoMVlI8KDPFwUK1VRIjAhXsXXt-E1I3p7ik5avwZGahZVtsqEWhe71VymVmHkNkl0kg0KRyaGS6Z)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff3aa880036a45bfac59131daa61ce95&_e=YgqiRVquL4hZX_OblSEcmsKSOrgzIMirLalRcajMpVzzYGaiLTz107C3clX8DA6NzAoChtHStx6hg4FvRJ8Zv8SjmyeUTMcXTVMQlWz6ygaW13RU7raqGjYWmgOGK-A7j-dRf3GCLy4DBmbOeyafKK-HUCDxMOWIKBYNMWcrBCdt8MSmf0_1gHI26zsDXBfXGj23iMtgjfppoHJ22KcRvpqwGl_75gdIplVcIw95ykBk6q8M-vP0qmN6DXMk9aptw8HlRLOqxkX_osozKtRQCxABKyKfIH7FbMOYiVltKDboXHDqo12CMtgTuQP8ksI_hX3VA-UyaEsFILR7_xyRHqXxTd5e2u6n3kUcC7rw10hmFW9bA1cXCd1jpL0vtqizOi-PYiN-P4Bs1jecQjLtDgVD4SNOcBbet-vokx4jnnLMb4y__01X3NQLfQlovwgU)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff3aa880036a45bfac59131daa61ce95&_e=YgqiRVquL4hZX_OblSEcmsKSOrgzIMirLalRcajMpVzzYGaiLTz107C3clX8DA6NzAoChtHStx6hg4FvRJ8Zv8SjmyeUTMcXTVMQlWz6ygaW13RU7raqGjYWmgOGK-A7j-dRf3GCLy4DBmbOeyafKK-HUCDxMOWIKBYNMWcrBCdt8MSmf0_1gHI26zsDXBfXGj23iMtgjfppoHJ22KcRvpqwGl_75gdIplVcIw95ykBk6q8M-vP0qmN6DXMk9aptw8HlRLOqxkX_osozKtRQC3v6zS0E-9XxWmxhTezALY-aPTVZ-QxT-p4PpNW71jvqRJzen8b-E-YjNBOFchFZtePE8LXcD_ziZHQEy-8OeAAlSQfInav57wj4C8-qa72F4zsNwbQMy6J_QwTnTuiQnSiGNx4xsGXdR7Hu8pqalRzGrMSPZVTlaIWykztUDsQT)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff3aa880036a45bfac59131daa61ce95&_e=YgqiRVquL4hZX_OblSEcmsKSOrgzIMirLalRcajMpVzzYGaiLTz107C3clX8DA6NzAoChtHStx6hg4FvRJ8Zv8SjmyeUTMcXTVMQlWz6ygaW13RU7raqGjYWmgOGK-A7j-dRf3GCLy4DBmbOeyafKK-HUCDxMOWIKBYNMWcrBCdt8MSmf0_1gHI26zsDXBfXGj23iMtgjfppoHJ22KcRvpqwGl_75gdIplVcIw95ykBk6q8M-vP0qmN6DXMk9aptw8HlRLOqxkX_osozKtRQC0uTEjs-4EldngsLj7QYXQWIfoF_RR5HFRUIvdgBQPr60bnfB2VhggK04tfoKdbN0VX_TmTyVZyOTe_Z0Vu2kyA7dafBt2eRyFsHqxRoSJUHntOjr3c7ciH0OtLKZbkLKTDb9TTsmxgNJFYJBXzcgmDp69z5iUgKgBsUTVjqReWl).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. | This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Taking the Hill
subject: Tragic 20th Anniversary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/M6Hi6nAOu-a0cgKYd5YvFnUulal94cZ7KOwP9Q1M4Z4=/xwp-ewRE0tKPzkNew9g3iFbJjig-0vu5b6w5T3HeuC8=)

Peter,

Lack of trust in our government is at an all-time high. The moral courage to do the right thing is missing in action far too often.

20 years ago & 18 months after the horrors of 9/11, I was an active duty Army Captain just back after my first deployment as our nation initiated combat operations against the Saddam Hussein regime in Iraq. Weapons of mass destruction was the rationale & we now know that wasn't the case.

A few months later I'd be in the middle of Baghdad, Iraq w the 82nd Airborne Division. History shows our political leaders blindly chose to send my brothers & sisters into harm's way. We did our jobs - but 19 of my fellow Paratroopers and 4431 troops in Iraq never made it home, & tens of thousands of Iraqi civilians were killed.

Since the day I came home - I've dealt with my survivors' guilt w an indefatigable focus on helping my brother & sister Veterans survive & thrive. Unfortunately, we've lost tens of thousands more - mostly through the suicide epidemic, but also cancer from the burn pits & other types of suffering.

Please pause today to reflect & pray for our Veterans. Also, pray for the political leaders in our country to have the courage to be truthful & who are oftentimes too quick to send our sons & daughters into harms way...even when they didn't answer our nation's call when their country asked.

Thank you
Hon. Patrick J. Murphy

You can help elect more veterans with the moral courage to do the right thing via:

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/M6Hi6nAOu-a0cgKYd5YvFnUulal94cZ7KOwP9Q1M4Z4=/xD1HXMxKUe7zD-uRvDwn4Rot-v0gJs8yFFEsDbcA5r8=)

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. body:
The recent string of bank failures has millions of Americans second guessing

| **_The Sneaky IRS Tax Law to "Opt Out" of Bank Failures_** **Big Banks Don't Want You to Know About the Opportunity this IRS "Cheat Code" Unlocks... That Isn't Stopping It From Sweeping the U.S...** Big banks and the IRS want you to think, the only way to secure your savings and retirement is to keep your cash in an FDIC insured account or load up on stocks. The recent string of bank failures has millions of Americans second guessing this approach, especially for their hard-earned nest egg in an IRA or 401(k). But, **_you have options_**. Did you know that you can move your retirement savings out of cash or stocks, and KEEP your tax-advantaged status? **Have you heard about Section 408(m)(3)?** It's a little-known cousin of Section 401(k) of IRS code. I like to call it the "cheat code" that **unlocks investments** you simply can't find on Wall Street. Here's what I mean... Section 408(m)(3) lets you open a Precious Metals "Self Directed" IRA and put REAL gold and silver into a tax-advantaged account. Here are three good reasons to consider this IRS "cheat code"... **#1:** Gold protects against stock crashes. **#2:** Unlike savings in a bank account, gold is not susceptible to bank failures. **#3:** If something catastrophic happens to the dollar, gold can be used as currency around the world. **While you still can:** Get a no-cost info kit on gold, and the IRS "Cheat Code" to legally move your IRA or 401(k) to precious metals - with NO tax consequences. **First,** Democrats tried to rig the game by voting for D.C. statehood and giving themselves a permanent majority.

**Then,** Democrats tried to rig the game by expanding the Supreme Court to push their woke agenda through the courts.

**Now,** they are trying to expand the House of Representatives to steal the majority we all worked so hard for this past November.

This is just another one of the Democrats' dirty tricks to try and steal the House Majority from us in 2024. That's why we're opening this urgent petition to stop them.

| | It's essential Democrats highlight what we have done — and will do — to improve their lives. We need to alleviate fears and concerns. No one wants to destroy the economic and family values that we all share. We dream of and fight for a future of fairness, equality, empathy, and compassion.
We must compare and contrast this vision with our opponent's.
---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/64OR_IHAg/c?w=ICargwVENFLrZnHHIwLfElsX3WLxlzudwT8c3Jtl4pg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvTUlSdXJhbEZ1bmQiLCJyIjoiOTg1NzMzZDItODg3OC00ZTUyLTcyYzctZTZlZWM1NGQyZTg3IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)
---
| | We have challenges because we, as Democrats in the 1st, are judged not for who we are. Our opponents have unjustifiably mislabeled us "socialists" or "job destroyers." These are nothing more than political fear tactics. Congress has 170+ lawyers and 80+ veterans representing districts on the Hill, but not one trusted family physician, neither a Democrat nor a Republican. When our Nation's number one issue is a lack of affordable and accessible healthcare, we need a doctor in the House. I will lead Congress in the fight for a publicly funded national health insurance program that fully covers medical care costs for all US citizens. When the Nation suffers from diseases of despair — drugs, alcohol, suicide, and a mental health crisis — my training and work as a social worker and an addiction specialist are invaluable. My experience as a Diplomat serving our Nation for a decade is needed when world insecurity is increasing. That is why I am running; to problem solve and to address our Nation's needs.
We have a lot of work to do. We have unfinished business, and I will do my part to lead us forward, but I need you in my corner. We will address our failing healthcare system and make mental healthcare investments. We will invest in workers, families, and infrastructure. We will advocate for livable wages and support small businesses and organized labor. We will improve the training and education of all Americans. And we must have a national energy plan to transition to green, sustainable energy sources. Defending civil rights and voting rights is a must for us to maintain our democracy. Immigration reform with ethical border security and a compassionate foreign policy will again elevate the United States as the world's moral leader.
We must save Social Security, advocate for affordable housing, public transportation, agriculture and farming, domestic manufacturing, protect our environment, and more.
For over a decade, Democrats in Michigan's First District have been blue dots in a red sea. We must change the tide; a two-cycle strategy is the most viable way forward. I look forward to another season advocating for all of us in Northern Michigan and the UP, across the state, and throughout the Nation.
I am running again for my grandchildren to live in a better future, for the hardworking families of America's rural heartland, for us, for you. Will you join me?
---

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: The House GOP is a 'Hot Mess'
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz for Congress Jared Moskowitz for Congress
body:
Let's change the channel on this bad reality TV show| | |

---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60432230/397113210/2121217915?refcode=1026&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZTc5NzE1Yy0wZWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTSB3IEqsD2D77yBrv1wr8MNLl0dP8OQVPCozCordYI=)
---
Friends, House Republicans have turned the House Oversight Committee into a complete circus. I'd say our committee meetings should be broadcast on Bravo, but that would be disrespectful to the Real Housewives.
---
---
They have no strategy. They are completely disorganized. I don't know if they're even talking to each other, let alone trying to work across the aisle! There are serious issues that need government oversight. I want to ensure that your taxpayer dollars are not wasted or abused. But House Republicans want to waste our time and resources on Hunter Biden's laptop and field trips to see insurrectionists in jail. I'm in Congress fighting for normal. **[If we don't defend seats like mine in 2024, this bad reality TV show is going to get renewed for another 2 seasons. name: Pro Life Update
subject: "The Genesis Story" Online Course Now on DVD
body:
Hillsdale College's popular online course, "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," is available on DVD.

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2znbn8mmg6a20s222ai8frcva3n7sau6udjdbm4uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sph6eor4c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American,

I hope you're having a good day. I'm writing with some exciting news.

Hillsdale College's popular online course, **" The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives,"** is available on DVD.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7ejsajkdujvdf3oshkkg4k1mcnjesurr0hu9spo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sph6eor4c9h2bs)In this six-lecture course, you'll explore some of the major themes of Genesis, including the complex relationship between God and man, and what it reveals about divine and human nature.

"The Genesis Story" is taught by Hillsdale College professor of English Justin Jackson, who has taught the subject to undergraduate students here at the College for 15 years. This course aims to deepen a student's theological understanding of the Old Testament by revealing the literary beauty and complexity of the text.

The course begins with a lecture and introduction by the President of Hillsdale College, Dr. Larry P. Arnn, in which he explains why we teach the Book of Genesis at Hillsdale College and why it's important to both faith and higher education.
Then, Dr. Jackson explains the four relationships that dominate the Book of Genesis: God and creation, God and man, man and man, and man and creation.

These relationships are explored in the narratives of Adam and Eve, Abraham and Sarah, Abraham and Isaac, Jacob and Esau, and finally, Joseph.

This course on DVD is perfect for viewing in your home with your family or for use in small groups such as Bible studies and book clubs.

**For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale College, you 'll receive the DVD as our thank you.**

To receive your Genesis DVD box set or to give it as a gift, please use the secure link here: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-genesis](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze260q87de7e8sjop69sa5qnpmsivgnhca4ppll0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sph6eor4c9h2bs)**

As you know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of state and federal government funding--even indirectly through student loans and grants. That's why your support is so crucial.

Your gift helps expand Hillsdale College's national educational outreach efforts to educate millions of Americans nationwide, including our nation's youth. Your gift will also help to:
* Increase the number of students taking free online courses, such as "Genesis."
* Expand the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's digest of liberty.
* Establish and guide classical K-12 schools nationwide and provide, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.
* Promote the principles of American constitutionalism through social media and the radio.

Friend, please use the secure link above to make a $100 contribution in support of Hillsdale's educational outreach, and explore the beauty of the first book of the Bible with your new DVD set of **" The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives."**

Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---

---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

---
| I also went through some of our big plans that I will do as the 47th President of the United States.
---
| At the top of my list will be stopping the slide into costly and never-ending wars.
---
| **As you know, I was the only president in DECADES who didn 't start a war.**
---
| But I also _COMPLETED_ wars that had already started, including defeating 100% of the ISIS caliphate - which everyone said was impossible to do.
---
| In fact, a certain general said it could only be done in 3 years - if at all. _**I did it in 3 weeks.**_
---
| Before I even arrive at the Oval Office, I will have the disastrous war between Russia and Ukraine settled. I will get the problem solved - and get it solved quickly.
---
| **Instead of spending hundreds of billions of dollars to defend the borders of distant foreign countries, under my leadership, we will defend OUR borders.**
---
| Three years ago, we had the safest border in the history of our country. I built hundreds of miles of wall and completed that task as promised.
---
| When I am back in the White House, we will use all necessary state, local, federal, and military resources to carry out the **LARGEST DOMESTIC DEPORTATION** operation in American History.
---
| I will ask every state and federal agency to identify every known or suspected gang member in America, and every one of them that is here illegally, we will pick them up, and we will throw them out of our country - and there will be no questions asked.
---
| _I will also direct the Department of Justice to go after Marxist prosecutors ' offices to make them pay for their illegal, race-based enforcement of the law._
---
| _All of us have seen too many videos of 13-year-old carjackers and 14-year-old hoodlums viciously beating their victims._
---
| My administration will crack down on these out-of-control monsters, young though they may be, and impose tough consequences on juvenile criminals.
---
| I will also fight for PARENTS' RIGHTS, including universal school choice, and the direct election of school principals by the parents.
---
| I will revoke every Biden policy promoting the chemical castration and sexual mutilation of our youth -- and ask Congress to send me a bill prohibiting child sexual mutilation in all 50 states.
---
| And we will keep men out of women's sports!
---
| There's no other way to say it: _**our enemies are lunatics and maniacs.**_
---
| **_They cannot stand that they do not own me, they cannot steer me, they cannot shake me, and they will NEVER, EVER control me._**
---
| At the end of the day, ANYONE else could be intimidated, bought-off, blackmailed, or ripped to shreds.
---
| I alone will NEVER retreat.
---
| But that's why we must stand together...
---
| While the Soros Money Machine, Hollywood, and globalist billionaires - who have made a fortune off of selling out our country - try to defeat our America First movement, grassroots donors like YOU are our only hope of fighting back to save America.
---
| _**[So please, make a contribution to SAVE AMERICA in what truly is the FINAL BATTLE for our country- for an incredible 1,500% impact.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457276:JAX2-nGhN:m:1:3365131770:0A21F3A6F73530F3709A7951FE0679FA:r "So please,
make a contribution before the FEC end-of-month deadline to help us crush our goal for our NEW Ballot Harvesting Fund â€“ for 1,300%
impact.")**_
---
| Thank you,

## Tonight Is IMPORTANT!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11072.1.72369b97fd4467201c8e63063b4bdfc1)
---
I have been asked to arrange a [National Prayer Call](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11073.1.544e8ae3034d309ec8722c44bd2bc576) for **President Donald Trump** tonight over the outlandish _witch hunt_ that he is facing down.
As you know, **President Trump** has indicated that he will be arrested on Tuesday due to fabricated charges from a corrupt George Soros backed District Attorney in New York.
It is quite hard to believe this is happening in America... but it is.
**I am asking you to join me tonight at 6pm CT to pray for President Trump.**
Some of **President Trump's** closest allies will be joining the livestream to give exclusive insights as well as updates.
You can join the Prayer Call by visiting: [www.pastors4trump.com/prayercall](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11074.1.680105cbc49db0b5b952119ffb6e9d38) or through [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11075.1.6275f5461edfb996b1072e15df3fd7ee), [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11076.1.091d43614266cffbc2f004decc6f37ce) & [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11077.1.f12642a9080f1bc9f5b5e72cc8020d8b).
We will be doing Q&A tonight also.
Please make sure to join me and invite friends as well.
We need to show **President Trump** we have his back!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11078.1.9b18d91d6796c843092451e992fdcc8c), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11079.1.d3f52be3ccaf7c3da7b92a5216d27a8c), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11080.1.f139b3766373f2ed5a8dbef4add85a60), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11081.1.2fe691035a5dcfae32dcf89cd4688aa1), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11082.1.56dedc2ea78b42856d56399528c3504b) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11083.1.25fb3672ca0085fc66aade53e0fde6e1)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11084.1.2b33a6b0d8886b82ceafb508c1e5d2d8)

---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11086.1.e098a99f159bdb359e18592f6524b097)
---
Recently, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11087.1.03e9636c29bd3814fb0b20bbecfe522a) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11088.1.34a5464646a71e4d8a46dd2a981428ff)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11089.1.e7fb9cff5db9ca82d9026e712866a4ae) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11090.1.7344635623a4c7b80c65c57d2e5a053e) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11091.1.b28f5988509a9e80576aff1d11ecb471) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11092.1.2f126e2779c0789ff6bab9fffde5d3e5) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11093.1.be47aec91780f3342858fb3c0f1c3dd7) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19081739.11094.1.0e90e5d76f252d0d0345906d46166855) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.

It is quite hard to believe this is happening in America... but it is. I am asking you to join me tonight at 6pm CT to pray for President Trump. Some of President Trump's closest allies will be joining the livestream to give exclusive insights as well as updates. You can join the Prayer Call by visiting: or through , & . We will be doing Q&A tonight also. Please make sure to join me and invite friends as well. We need to show President Trump we have his back! Thank you, Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on , , , , & ). | | | Recently, President Donald Trump sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed organization that he also recently shared about on TruthSocial. You can read the Pastors For Trump full here: We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with President Trump's share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as Newsweek , Rolling Stone , One America News Network , Real America's Voice , Gateway Pundit , Right Wing Watch , Baptist News Global and others. This coalition is made up of Pastors & Ministry Leaders from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again. is NOT just limited to Pastors/Ministry Leaders but is for every believer in America. I want to encourage you to visit today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. Dr. Billy Graham once said, "For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray." Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to President Trump by the coalition. Please go visit today and be a part of the effort to Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again. I have come to love the heart of Mike Lindell and was just texting with him yesterday about some upcoming projects. In his pursuit to Save America, he has almost destroyed his incredible company . It is very important that we support Mike Lindell in this battle. body:
You’re our LAST hope.

**Trump says he expects to be arrested Tuesday as New York law enforcement prepares for possible indictment -_CNN_**
Friend,

You're our country's _**ONLY**_ hope.

President Trump just announced that he expects to be arrested in less than _**three days**_.
**Make no mistake - the Radical Left is trying to use this latest witch hunt to intimidate you.**
House Republicans will stand strong against these fear tactics and threats. But we can't do it alone. **[Our country is at a turning point. We need every single patriot to immediately condemn this witch hunt.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkggeihh0pb4bc03btibbtf52hngktq5tautgms0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sph69o74cph2bs "Our country is at a turning point.
