name: =?utf-8?Q?Catherine=20Engelbrecht=20|=20True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Stand Together on Tuesday and New States ERICxit
body:
Join us tonight on Locals 3/20 @ 7p et to hear all the latest | | | | | |
---
| | Hi Friend
Let’s start with the easy stuff ... the Los Angeles County v. Konnech hearing that has been repeatedly rescheduled since last October ... has again been rescheduled. The new hearing is set for Thursday, March 23rd.
Last week we filed our motion asking the Court to [assign a Special Master ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=1c5910be2d&e=ad8cba7e98)to take custody of the 200+ electronic devices seized in the Konnech Michigan raid. Whether or not our request will be granted is not yet known. We’ll keep you posted. (Confused? [Here’s a quick primer ](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=07186fbe34&e=ad8cba7e98)on Konnech).
Next, we invite you to join us this Monday, 3/20 @ 7p et on [our live podcast on Locals](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=759323d568&e=ad8cba7e98). We’ll do another drill down into the continuing exodus from [ERIC (Electronic Registration Information Center)](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c262d4149d&e=ad8cba7e98). Ohio and Iowa just announced their departure, joining the ranks of other ERICxit states, Missouri, West Virginia, Florida, Alabama, and Louisiana. Which state will be next? Could it be Texas? And, more importantly, what will states do without ERIC? Will voter roll accuracy improve or decline? We’ll talk straight facts about the rolls, the law, and the path forward.
And then, we’ll do something we don’t normally do on the podcast. We’ll pray for Tuesday.
We are extremely concerned about what could happen on Tuesday if the brazen and politically motivated indictment of President Trump, unprecedented in American history, actually occurs. As has been proven time and again around the world, apparatchiks will do whatever it takes to silence opposition and advance their agenda. Now it’s happening here.
President Trump represents an existential threat to the global Authoritarian Machine that, until 2016, believed our country’s downfall was a fait accompli.
Any leader who doesn’t speak out against the clear injustice of his political persecution is complicit. And weak.
There is no more time for weakness if we want to save America.
Ever onward -
---
PS In addition to the training, research, and support we provide on a daily basis, we are working hard to bear the weight of six lawsuits. [**If you can help us with a financial contribution, please do. We need your support. Quitting is not an option.**](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=ec08f85fb5&e=ad8cba7e98)
|
---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=c8afe52d7c&e=ad8cba7e98)
|
---
[](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=3890eac209&e=ad8cba7e98)
| |

---
| | |
---

True the VotePO Box 3109# 19128Houston, TX 77253-3109
[Add us to your address book](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/vcard?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/profile?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=bc8400528a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=10c8087c36&e=ad8cba7e98&c=bc8400528a).
|

name: Emergency Alert
subject: TRUMP ARRESTED?
body:
| |
---
| | | What's happening in the witch hunt investigation against President Trump is appalling.

A Liberal prosecutor - bankrolled by George Soros and other Democrat mega-donors- is reportedly plotting to arrest President Trump.
---
| | [END THE WITCH HUNT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457361:6R79dnGUN:m:1:3391001263:E2940C3C376838BAF5BF8D34F12F9E0C:r "END THE
WITCH HUNT")
---
Liberals will let carjackers, thieves, and rioters off easy while throwing the book at President Trump. _It 's not about justice or the truth, it's about politics and revenge._

**We have a two-tiered justice system that protects Democrats and targets their political enemies. And what 's happening to Trump is just the beginning. **

Republicans across this country have a duty to stand up for what's right. We are doing everything possible to level this two-tiered system, hold these Liberals accountable, and expose this witch hunt for what it is.

_**[But we need your help to keep fighting. Please consider chipping in any amount to help Senate Republicans as they fight for YOU.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457361:6R79dnGUN:m:1:3391001263:E2940C3C376838BAF5BF8D34F12F9E0C:r "But we need your
help to keep fighting. Please consider chipping in $10, $25, or any amount to help Senate Republicans as they fight for YOU.")**_

Everyone knows what's really happening:

The Liberals are terrified of us standing up to them. They know we're winning on the issues, so they're using everything in their power to stop us - that includes investigating their political enemies and trying to throw them in jail.

President Trump may be arrested at any moment, _**[so we're asking you for help right now.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457361:6R79dnGUN:m:1:3391001263:E2940C3C376838BAF5BF8D34F12F9E0C:r "so we’re
asking you for help right now.")**_

Thank you,

Senate Republicans

name: Andy Biggs
subject: Peter, Biden is out of control!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455795:6HUNHnGON:m:1:3331421248:630A3BBABC6F17AB4A2036A5DDF545F6:r)
---
| Peter,
There are very few people in Washington, DC who view the world through a lens of reality...
And that's why only in Washington, DC can a President **who is raising the national debt from $31.5 trillion to $49 trillion** come out and say (along with his allies in the media) that he is lowering the national debt.
Folks in Arizona are smart enough to see through Biden's lies and so are most Americans, but Democrats truly think we're all stupid enough to believe the deception.
**That's why I'm fighting reckless spending and I'm rallying the House Freedom Caucus and my Republican colleagues to put Americans first and stop Biden in his tracks.** | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455796:6HUNHnGON:m:1:3331421248:630A3BBABC6F17AB4A2036A5DDF545F6:r)
---
| | | | | [JOIN THIS FIGHT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455796:6HUNHnGON:m:1:3331421248:630A3BBABC6F17AB4A2036A5DDF545F6:r)
---
**[Take a look at what I had to say earlier about Biden's budget and fight with me to put an immediate end to the America Last agenda that's destroying this country >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455795:6HUNHnGON:m:1:3331421248:630A3BBABC6F17AB4A2036A5DDF545F6:r)**

If we want to save America, we have to shrink Washington and attack the unelected fourth branch of government they call the bureaucracy that is making laws and punishing people without direct authority.

**And make no mistake: We won't be the ones paying for this reckless spending, it'll be our children, our grandchildren, and generations to come who will suffer for this.**

It's that simple... We're demanding the government spend less and do less so that our country can continue to survive.

We're in dire straits and the Biden Administration and their Democrat colleagues are doing absolutely nothing to stop the bleeding.

**[So please, be sure to check out what I said earlier today and help me continue my fight to save America while working hard in Washington and throughout the country >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455795:6HUNHnGON:m:1:3331421248:630A3BBABC6F17AB4A2036A5DDF545F6:r)**

Yours in Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62455795:6HUNHnGON:m:1:3331421248:630A3BBABC6F17AB4A2036A5DDF545F6:r)

We're demanding the government spend less and do less so that our country can continue to survive. We're in dire straits and the Biden Administration and their Democrat colleagues are doing absolutely nothing to stop the bleeding. Yours in Liberty, Andy Biggs Republican Congressman, AZ-5 | | | | Paid for by Biggs for Congress This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 9, 2022. name: Your America
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01329%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9N0oEasKz8YnAjsDSL6L%2fg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01320%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2b5UXhlgFHMs%2fdTqpD%2bD6lw&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01321%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P%2b8tG3Ejx4x2G246MDkWUg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01322%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q8HvflqMgxWaMG%2fy0t8zyw&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America News _625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7227%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=QKrZ0cfzKouzZgCxBksaLg&sysid=1)_

clean_body: | | | Peter, I just got major campaign news, and I need to share it with you IMMEDIATELY. The Federal Election Commission has officially raised the maximum contribution limit by 14%. Here’s what that means for us: liberal millionaires and billionaires have even more power to sway our elections. Peter, with this update, we’re going to have to lean on our grassroots team more than ever. Peter, the richest socialists in America have their eyes laser-focused on Florida. And they’re DETERMINED to take our state out of the hands of hardworking patriots and into the clutch of the Washington elite. But I know you and I aren’t about to let them get away with it. | | De Oppresso Liber, Col. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: MATCH: My investment in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I am putting my money where my mouth is. I believe we can win this campaign but I also need your help!

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp50t8k7q09eg7a0en47q1im89jbhmoglukjp3go_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj62pj5clh2bs)
Fellow American,

I've said this since day one, and I will say it again.

**This campaign will be won - _or lost_ - by the grassroots support Team Vivek builds over the next year and a half.**

I've personally invested the resources I've earned through my hard work to make sure we can build a winning campaign. Fellow American, I cannot do this alone.

**[Will you join me by chipping in right now?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq7o6q8sr20qp707k9pbs6k7fc8sp3pu7d9dejvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj62pj5clh2bs)**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkqs3t3ee28na9abq3cus2jsuhisgn9lg9jp3n5o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj62pj5clh2bs)

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4kcm70ap0c04dcigan6s6h4b14d7de3ihk0m33g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj62pj5clh2bs)

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4vf5dt8n4dvge47sakou1adc87f17tct24qg4fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj62pj5clh2bs)

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z59u9kmkhd3etm9q365jamehs8iuilmln1i7cmj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj62pj5clh2bs)

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqa8f4oikbh4rhm5be770ukubecrea99ktt4v4f0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj62pj5clh2bs)
I'm putting everything I can personally into this campaign because I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to rescue our nation.

But my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp3mmh6063bsfrcbrsfu075uv6mfotf3tbg1oj7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj62pj5clh2bs)**

It's going to take courage to change Washington, but with you on my team, I know we can win!

Thanks,

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z02o4fip7rgmskpaj76rn2fit2e8cjtja2onrjjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj62pj5clh2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** JOIN THE MOVEMENT -> **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9jj9ldhgh0oj86r4csatmgq7sdfj7df8o9amslg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj62pj5clh2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp1gp6k6ac8jb655kb5jdrk7jodmer8u96ro9480_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj62pj5clh2bs)

---

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1lqvuv0t3o0lfpb6c3ggr765res41bbeqg81df0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj62pj5clh2bs) | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbcmi0mk5ps2q04m807kpcmkug9i3p88gngbks8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj62pj5clh2bs) | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z10gmbdps6mu7om6cr8i6nv5e72el7921g1ab100_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj62pj5clh2bs)
---|---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024

name: Chris Murphy
subject: I wish I didn't have to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
But it’s important that I have the resources to win reelection, so I hope you will hear me out.
| | |
---
Hi there, I'm reaching out personally because I need to ask a favor of you today. Yes, this is a fundraising ask, and I wish I didn't have to make it. But it's important that I have the resources to win reelection, so I hope you will hear me out.
The truth is that I hate asking people to contribute. It's the worst part of this job, and our democracy would be better off if we could get these absurd levels of money out of our politics. The corporate money and super PACs are undoubtedly a corrosive force.
But my campaign cannot just unilaterally disarm. It would put a huge target on us for far-right billionaires and super PACs that can spend limitless sums of money. Senate races are just expensive, and frankly, people deserve to know that I’m putting in the work of legislating in the Senate and organizing on the ground to earn their vote.
That’s why I’m building a people-powered campaign from start to finish. I’m going to fund this the right way – I’m not taking any PAC or corporate money – but it requires that I lean on you a bit more.
Look, I know you probably did not expect to make a contribution to my reelection when you woke up this morning, but if you believe that people power is the right way to run a campaign, then I need you to have my back before our official FEC deadline.
**[Please split a contribution of $3 between my campaign and Maggie Hassan today to help us win. Please know I only ask because your support is truly important. There’s no way we can take on the important fights ahead of us alone.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60443463/397143978/-1484357260?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2235-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmRlOTE4MS0yN2M3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kALAQwCDEDNVVkD5i0m5ZhjAkaGXZ0beqx3NuVYnJdA=)**
Thank you in advance for your consideration.
Every best wish,
Chris Murphy

clean_body: But it’s important that I have the resources to win reelection, so I hope you will hear me out. | | | Hi there, I'm reaching out personally because I need to ask a favor of you today. Yes, this is a fundraising ask, and I wish I didn't have to make it. But it's important that I have the resources to win reelection, so I hope you will hear me out. The truth is that I hate asking people to contribute. It's the worst part of this job, and our democracy would be better off if we could get these absurd levels of money out of our politics. The corporate money and super PACs are undoubtedly a corrosive force. But my campaign cannot just unilaterally disarm. It would put a huge target on us for far-right billionaires and super PACs that can spend limitless sums of money. Senate races are just expensive, and frankly, people deserve to know that I’m putting in the work of legislating in the Senate and organizing on the ground to earn their vote. That’s why I’m building a people-powered campaign from start to finish. I’m going to fund this the right way – I’m not taking any PAC or corporate money – but it requires that I lean on you a bit more. Look, I know you probably did not expect to make a contribution to my reelection when you woke up this morning, but if you believe that people power is the right way to run a campaign, then I need you to have my back before our official FEC deadline. = Thank you in advance for your consideration. Every best wish, Chris Murphy | | = | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can . Click here to . Maggie for NH PO Box 298 Concord, NH 03302 United States Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible. Paid for by Maggie for NH |

name: news@durbinforsenate.com
subject: Progress Report: Student Debt Relief Win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
Ease the burden of student loans + give students a fresh start.
#
**“Borrowers Receive Student Loan Forgiveness Approval Emails After Court Green-Lights Settlement” -_Forbes_**
Peter, we just had a big win in the fight to ease the burden of student debt.
**A federal court in California has ruled in favor of allowing $6 billion dollars in debt relief to be paid out to student borrowers in Illinois and across the country who were cheated out of their education and their savings by unscrupulous tactics of for-profit colleges.**
**[There is still more work to do to hold for-profit institutions accountable and to relieve the overwhelming burden of student debt in this country. Will you pitch in $5 or more now to help Dick Durbin and Democrats keep making progress for students and families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60445276/397150394/-533225447?refcode=dd_em_230320_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzUxZTI5NC0yOWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LG5fvN2dAfiV446pQskNLe_MVM3BjgrcHmP1lXoT0l4=)**
**This victory has been a long time coming.** When predatory, for-profit schools misled students into accumulating mountains of debt for low-quality degrees that did not meet qualifications for employment, Betsy DeVos and Donald Trump intentionally delayed processing students’ claims.
With this relief, these defrauded borrowers can finally breathe a sigh of relief. But the student debt crisis is far from over — and we need a strong Democratic majority working to solve it.
**[We must continue to ease the burden of student loans and give students a fresh start. Contribute whatever you can now to help Dick Durbin and Democrats keep up the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60445278/397150396/-533225447?refcode=dd_em_230320_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzUxZTI5NC0yOWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LG5fvN2dAfiV446pQskNLe_MVM3BjgrcHmP1lXoT0l4=)**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: MATCH: My investment in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
I am putting my money where my mouth is. I believe we can win this campaign but I also need your help!

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj71qhvg1m2or9msa486hbe7kfnn2l78ve5lvpgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj66p31c1h2bs)
Fellow American,

I've said this since day one, and I will say it again.

**This campaign will be won - _or lost_ - by the grassroots support Team Vivek builds over the next year and a half.**

I've personally invested the resources I've earned through my hard work to make sure we can build a winning campaign. Fellow American, I cannot do this alone.

**[Will you join me by chipping in right now?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrf79634nrs2lh1t8vredjdqjgb0btf0n5ts25fg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj66p31c1h2bs)**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z8q8396cvs0s3dh5gaopqv0f7lji5q2dgdasb8e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj66p31c1h2bs)

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd5ojemnc1o9bpdmoiu3cnj5b2g0ogrkf9rrvua8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj66p31c1h2bs)

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkv9cc4jhii8e8bgk7023oor07cahec8c1oeapp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj66p31c1h2bs)

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zhqtb3rume2t79v3cvsdh0bt34qcgg5d7a2raaf0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj66p31c1h2bs)

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zto4ur7g04b167ts3pnrm1o1svlm0njq35ge9n8g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj66p31c1h2bs)
I'm putting everything I can personally into this campaign because I have complete conviction that our message and solutions are what are going to rescue our nation.

But my personal investment can only get us so far. To keep this going and actually impact change, **[I need you to put some skin in the game with me.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zeuch01iqja7n4fk9c9tpm5qngj320tnq05adgd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj66p31c1h2bs)**

It's going to take courage to change Washington, but with you on my team, I know we can win!

Thanks,

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcmrinf7in5ovvitj7t7qr0p5e55d8hjml6e0nl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj66p31c1h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** JOIN THE MOVEMENT -> **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgl3k4iaeqijev5t84fsuklomigpg7okvndvtfp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj66p31c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0ib2jij1r1mnldmpmnkvepekg37vvmhd4gp4i08_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj66p31c1h2bs)

---

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb13usdhkrloigj11va289pnhp7lg665oqac4i1g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj66p31c1h2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zca9dmb2pd439j69b3irmdfnlpgi3eararh6vu1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj66p31c1h2bs)| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsl31d5kei4qspv9iofv8la0bd4o051f0mu2du7g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj66p31c1h2bs)
---|---|---

Joe Biden is still working hard at ruining our country. His progressive allies want him to make DC the 51st state which would give the left a permanent super majority in the U.S. Senate, continue their liberal spending sprees and force Green New Deal policies on the American people. Buth there's good news. The GOP Majority is working hard to reverse the left's damage. **[Will you help me keep up the fight to reverse the left's damage to our country? Chip in $25 $50 or $100 today!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457487:Jq2LhnGN9:m:1:3365131770:85A9134EDCC9BB82A556F1AD6E9B5391:r "Will you help me keep up the fight to reverse the left’s
damage to our country? Chip in $25 $50 or $100 today!")** [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457487:Jq2LhnGN9:m:1:3365131770:85A9134EDCC9BB82A556F1AD6E9B5391:r "Tweet")We're holding hearings to expose the failures in Biden's border security program, the truth about the origins of COVID-19 and what happened on January 6th, 2021. Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, Anthony Fauci and MSNBC can no longer hide it from you. It's no surprise the Democrats are still trying to keep it from you. It doesn't fit their wayward agenda and will prove their negligence. **They 've turned a blind eye to:**
* Antifa's domestic terrorism,
* Biden's DOJ treating J6 Prisoners like Joseph Stalin treated his adversaries,
* The border crisis,
* how fentanyl is killing America's children, and
* the evidence about the Biden Crime Family's business affairs.

They want to bury their heads in the sand instead of demanding the impeachment of Joe Biden alongside of me. Oh, did I mention that banks are collapsing too? **[America is facing dire times and I need your support to continue my efforts to save our great nation!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457487:Jq2LhnGN9:m:1:3365131770:85A9134EDCC9BB82A556F1AD6E9B5391:r "America is facing dire times and I need your support to
continue my efforts to save our great nation!")** **The Democrats want to go back to the way it was before the GOP had the ability to hold them accountable. They 're working overtime to impede our efforts.** Joe Biden is publicly attacking me, celebrities like Jane Fonda are calling for us to be murdered, and we've been fortunate enough to survive when the progressives had full control our country and did everything they could to damage it. Those are just some of the issues we need to fix, and it takes a long-term investment. **[Please chip in $50 or more TODAY and let me know you still support my efforts in this fight!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457488:Jq2LhnGN9:m:1:3365131770:85A9134EDCC9BB82A556F1AD6E9B5391:r "Please chip in $50 or more
TODAY and let me know you still support my efforts in this fight!")** We're also tackling Big Tech's efforts to censor your voice and preventing the Chinese from spying on us, but Biden prefers to focus on gender reassignment surgery for children and calling it a "sin" if we stop him. He's also refusing to help us ban TikTok. **That 's right! Beijing Biden is still aligned with his CCP friends even when they threaten our national security and the safety of our children.** No two weeks are alike in Washington and I can't succeed without a little help from my friends. **[Please support my efforts today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457487:Jq2LhnGN9:m:1:3365131770:85A9134EDCC9BB82A556F1AD6E9B5391:r "Please support my efforts today.")** Yours in the fight, Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NJsaLaq4Tpep5CqRvP4qQoAPxYkY9oLyMCn-97-2I7J5Ku--vxy00Q218ATGNBzTUyhR2AT9J4XkxuNSEDeINxFfzatrtg2rPPw9jEzoAkavspJ76JpxBjj_mh4m8ocGUmk0MMACICD-rz4sS0_WdzvNdkHCHEn5p1KQNjemIcSbEk1aGqupIxEQexa28QIqh9IP_Xu6uuc=&c=vRZSjba81n-Qu-DohBqKdVru8ZABWkqtA5B2-Pa1ouzFX0-uBkoz7Q==&ch=zz91mH-Wr2Z91etWXGIQYdjSOrayFyucjpMewm5z4SXOdvmx0RWzbA==)
---
| Friend
The GOP is turning 169 today, and to celebrate the Grand Old Party's birthday, I'm asking my strongest supporters to take part in my freedom survey!
The GOP began as a small group of Americans gathering together to change the status quo. They knew that they had to stand for our values of freedom and individual liberty, which is why they chose to create a party that will always support our national values.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NJsaLaq4Tpep5CqRvP4qQoAPxYkY9oLyMCn-97-2I7J5Ku--vxy00Q218ATGNBzTUyhR2AT9J4XkxuNSEDeINxFfzatrtg2rPPw9jEzoAkavspJ76JpxBjj_mh4m8ocGUmk0MMACICD-rz4sS0_WdzvNdkHCHEn5p1KQNjemIcSbEk1aGqupIxEQexa28QIqh9IP_Xu6uuc=&c=vRZSjba81n-Qu-DohBqKdVru8ZABWkqtA5B2-Pa1ouzFX0-uBkoz7Q==&ch=zz91mH-Wr2Z91etWXGIQYdjSOrayFyucjpMewm5z4SXOdvmx0RWzbA==)
---

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9mm8grmu1dkbdht2dlpoc397a3ss67bnr0g24mg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj6eo32c3h2bs)
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsspnrh6uajaavukt1th0u3v8f3vpr5d7d7cfjsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj6eo32c3h2bs)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqeav5jtfa7ivknop56ehjkkk1covo12f3kdl208_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj6eo32c3h2bs) [NO](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zr2fu4conqjddviqueb6l3s98vac3icfmv49eiho_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj6eo32c3h2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z511snsi00ijngh7m0g2im7b8qigtqned6mtuve0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spj6eo32c3h2bs)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Defense News

clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. | | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government? For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 American Defense News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

subject: America in Crisis: Can You Help?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
Thank you for your support as I work to get our Nation back on track... | | |
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

Washington Democrats’ days of one-party rule in D.C. are over thanks to patriots like you, who gave Republicans control of the House of Representatives. Ultimately, Democrats paid the price for forcing big government socialism down the throats of Americans for far too long. Their policies lead to wasteful spending, government overreach, the violation of basic rights, inflation, a growing deficit, and the top-down belief that Americans don’t know what’s best for them or their children.

While we are grateful for the successes of the last election, we know that we are just getting started and still have a lot of work to do. Here in the Big First, Democrats from the far east parts of the district are already putting pressure on me but, with your help, we are standing firm and continuing the fight.

When Republicans took control of the House, we got right to work on passing legislation that:

\- Protects the sanctity of life
\- Defends American energy security
\- Defunds the IRS army
\- Fights the Chinese Communist Party’s destructive influence
\- Holds the Biden Administration accountable

In addition to continuing our work on all the issues above, House Republicans are standing firm in our commitment to:

\- Secure the border
\- Balance the budget
\- Curb inflation
\- Defend the Second Amendment
\- Rein in wasteful government spending
\- Fund our police and military

_Republicans have a better plan than Democrats, plain and simple, but we need to keep fighting for our rights and for the American culture that people in my state know and love – one where faith, family, freedom, and personal responsibility still matter. _

**_Please support my political efforts by making a contribution before March 31 st. _**

Whether it’s $25 or $13,200 (the max for a married couple) your support will help keep our country going in the right direction. You can ([Click Here](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=9b7f2fc34e&e=a9d1410029)) or visit my website at [www.traceymann.com](https://traceymann.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60a16ea89a176679a5f31366c&id=68cd73dfa6&e=a9d1410029) to contribute online.

I believe with hard work and prayer our brightest days are yet to come! Thank you for your support – I could not do this without your help.

In the Fight,

Tracey Mann

P.S. I stand for Kansas, and I always will. I promise that I will do everything within my power to ensure that our kids have a bright future. Please donate today and help take our country back.

name: VoteVets
subject: A note on an important day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Twenty years on, we commemorate the anniversary of the invasion of Iraq.
#
Hey Derek,
Last week, you probably saw that the Senate advanced a repeal of the Iraq War Authorization for Use of Military Force.
Here at VoteVets, that’s something we’ve been working towards for a long time. This organization was founded after our founder Jon Soltz returned from Iraq, and our mission has remained largely the same since then. VoteVets raises the voices of Veterans in our politics, and we hold politicians accountable when they vote against our Veterans and Active Duty Service Members.
One of our very first ad campaigns in 2006 hit Senators for their votes against funding modern body armor for troops in Iraq and Afghanistan. Each of them are now former Senators.
Twenty years on, we commemorate the anniversary of the invasion of Iraq, one of the most disastrous foreign policy decisions in the modern history of the United States. And while repealing the AUMF would be the culmination of so much of our work, it is not the end.
Because it was a Republican administration’s lies that led to the Iraq War. That same Republican management led to the Great Recession. Congressional Republicans voted to gut health care and support for our Veterans. Republicans in the House and Senate backed a liar as Commander in Chief. A Republican President led an insurrection against our Capitol. And today, it’s MAGA Republicans who are undermining American support for Ukraine.
There’s a lot of work ahead of us. President Biden is up for re-election, we’re defending nearly two dozen Democratic seats in the Senate, and dozens more in the House.
**[And we need your help. A donation of $3 today, or whatever you can afford, is going to pay dividends down the line. We’re building critical campaigns that will help hold the Senate and take back the House in 2024.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-mar23.Xt_ByJ&refcode=em230320-1-15&t=1&akid=7958%2E3013755%2ERhBNR3)

name: Jon Tester
subject: re: 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP25/1/74758/images/tester1.jpg]
Hi there, can I tell you a little story?
I grew up on my family’s farm and it’s still home today. That explains a lot about me.
When I was a kid, I lost three fingers on my left hand while working in our family’s butcher shop. I don’t even remember putting my hand there — but I can damn sure remember rushing to a local doctor.
Here’s why I’m telling you this: just like my $12 flattop haircut from my local barbershop back home and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts, my background is a big part of the reason I remain grounded and focused amid the partisan politics and nonsense happening in our government.
With all the chaos in Washington (especially now), you need somebody who will fight to protect our public lands, create good-paying jobs, and ensure rural communities have hospitals within driving distance in case of an emergency.
I’m pretty different from most people who end up in the U.S. Senate. I’m just a dirt farmer trying to do what’s right for the people in my state and across the country.
So here’s the part where I ask: Can you become a Founding Donor of my campaign -- by splitting a donation with Seth Moulton -- to help us block Mitch McConnell from retaking the Senate?
You don’t need ten fingers to know right from wrong and you can bet I’m going to spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country.
I appreciate your support, and anything you can pitch in today will go a long way for our grassroots campaign.
Thanks again,
Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]

I have been asked to arrange a [National Prayer Call](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19084788.11108.1.fc529aad82be3607238849e08a19e4a6) for **President Donald Trump** tonight over the outlandish _witch hunt_ that he is facing down.
As you know, **President Trump** has indicated that he will be arrested on Tuesday due to fabricated charges from a corrupt George Soros backed District Attorney in New York.
It is quite hard to believe this is happening in America... but it is.
**I am asking you to join me tonight at 6pm CT to pray for President Trump.**
Some of **President Trump's** closest allies will be joining the livestream to give exclusive insights as well as updates.
AND PRESIDENT TRUMP HIMSELF WILL BE JOINING LIVE.
You can join the Prayer Call by visiting: [www.pastors4trump.com/prayercall](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19084788.11109.1.21af73b5786fa1eb250298b15ab4addf) or through [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19084788.11110.1.40a0330b82ba2ae3d4f4b7ca7d3742f7), [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19084788.11111.1.57b0e471fcdc2effad22967181b9a9e6) & [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19084788.11112.1.9b166952f23542bc215785c61d1ab3c4).
We will be doing Q&A tonight also.
Please make sure to join me and invite friends as well.
We need to show **President Trump** we have his back!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

Recently, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19084788.11122.1.5636d7efca9ccb3c03a3712b1cc5cf59) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**. You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19084788.11123.1.44259ef44b0a2223269ba202d31d5dca)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19084788.11124.1.9a8f45aa546cdd7d1812af539828825b) We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing. Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others. This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**. [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19084788.11125.1.b6634a14d78e2d6b0f83a89ee29e3caf) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America. I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19084788.11126.1.07a65f51e85cc77e08ce72c5dc42c682) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country. **Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_ Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19084788.11127.1.84c42996bdea54574be156319fe7996a) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country. Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director. Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19084788.11128.1.de44d9be6caf43cf327b3d7c0ed4d39d) coalition. Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19084788.11129.1.9bbd5f24e5ac9b09c79c1f3f8157c9f8) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.
---
---

SCHOOL BOARD RACE SPECIAL EDITION

Last night, our Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas interviewed nine more school board candidates on "Mark My Words" on AM 560 The Answer. It was a packed studio!

Illinois' school board races are shaping up to be some of the most important, and no one else is covering them!

Watch these highlights and learn more about these candidates, who are investing more than just their time, talent, and treasure - they are being attacked by the radical left that is being funded by Gov. Pritzker!
Amanda "Amy" Erkenswick (https://parentsforcusd200.com/candidates/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=8e8174ff1b-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_27_05_44_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-5f736f133a-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

body:
| | | Peter, All across America, I’ve talked to patriots who have felt the wrath of big tech.
Even if you don’t have a blue checkmark or a spot on Fox News, _every_ conservative is at risk of being silenced under big tech’s socialist regime.

The AZ GOP is busy making a mess of classrooms across the state. They are wasting time and resources by leaning into far-right tactics of harassing teachers and administrators in public schools.

It's not just one measure going too far. There is a bathroom bill targeting transgender students and a move to ban "inappropriate" books. _They even launched a hotline to report lessons they deem inappropriate._ The proposals they have for classrooms are actively hostile to teachers and students.

**Look, if the AZ GOP continues its interference, it will become impossible for Arizona students to receive a great education.**

So, we want to know your opinion on this issue – can you let us know what you think?

**Do you think the AZ GOP should stop interfering with our schools?**

clean_body: | | | The AZ GOP is making a mess of our students' education... | | | | Do you think the AZ GOP should stop interfering with our schools? The AZ GOP is busy making a mess of classrooms across the state. They are wasting time and resources by leaning into far-right tactics of harassing teachers and administrators in public schools. It's not just one measure going too far. There is a bathroom bill targeting transgender students and a move to ban "inappropriate" books. They even launched a hotline to report lessons they deem inappropriate. The proposals they have for classrooms are actively hostile to teachers and students. Look, if the AZ GOP continues its interference, it will become impossible for Arizona students to receive a great education. So, we want to know your opinion on this issue – can you let us know what you think? Do you think the AZ GOP should stop interfering with our schools? – AZ Dems HQ Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . name: Andy Biggs
subject: Peter, Biden is out of control!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62458223:JjdtinGCN:m:1:3391001263:02645CDAAFE3BE84D380445D5EE547FE:r)
---
| Peter,
There are very few people in Washington, DC who view the world through a lens of reality...
And that's why only in Washington, DC can a President **who is raising the national debt from $31.5 trillion to $49 trillion** come out and say (along with his allies in the media) that he is lowering the national debt.
Folks in Arizona are smart enough to see through Biden's lies and so are most Americans, but Democrats truly think we're all stupid enough to believe the deception.
**That 's why I'm fighting reckless spending and I'm rallying the House Freedom Caucus and my Republican colleagues to put Americans first and stop Biden in his tracks.** | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62458224:JjdtinGCN:m:1:3391001263:02645CDAAFE3BE84D380445D5EE547FE:r)
---
| | | | | [JOIN THIS FIGHT](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62458224:JjdtinGCN:m:1:3391001263:02645CDAAFE3BE84D380445D5EE547FE:r)
---
**[Take a look at what I had to say earlier about Biden's budget and fight with me to put an immediate end to the America Last agenda that's destroying this country >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62458223:JjdtinGCN:m:1:3391001263:02645CDAAFE3BE84D380445D5EE547FE:r)**

If we want to save America, we have to shrink Washington and attack the unelected fourth branch of government they call the bureaucracy that is making laws and punishing people without direct authority.

**And make no mistake: We won 't be the ones paying for this reckless spending, it'll be our children, our grandchildren, and generations to come who will suffer for this.**

It's that simple... We're demanding the government spend less and do less so that our country can continue to survive.

We're in dire straits and the Biden Administration and their Democrat colleagues are doing absolutely nothing to stop the bleeding.

**[So please, be sure to check out what I said earlier today and help me continue my fight to save America while working hard in Washington and throughout the country>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62458223:JjdtinGCN:m:1:3391001263:02645CDAAFE3BE84D380445D5EE547FE:r)**

Yours in Liberty,

Andy Biggs
Republican Congressman, AZ-5
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62458223:JjdtinGCN:m:1:3391001263:02645CDAAFE3BE84D380445D5EE547FE:r)
---
|

You’re our country’s only hope.

name: Sign the Petition | Left Action
subject: Sign: Ban Fox News on Military Bases and Installations
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Add your name: Ban Fox News on Military Bases and Installations >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb1c0f32-c1e7-4698-b32d-5212b5e279aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c1ffe4f-3c64-4bba-9492-31d2f50ff151/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Fox News is not "News", it is a propaganda channel spreading lies and misinformation, and promoting radicalization and insurgency. **And it should have no place on America's military bases and installations.** We wouldn't blast enemy propaganda on screens and loudspeakers during a time of war. And yet, when our very democracy is threatened, Fox News is routinely the default channel on bases across the country and across the world. Veterans across America are [calling for Fox to be banned](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11f18015-58de-4811-9d94-bc17e6610bcc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) on bases, in light of recent revelations, and we couldn't agree more. [**Add your name: Ban Fox News on Military Bases and Installations.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td1675617-6edc-4163-9940-96dbe522bf6c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
America has fallen.

| | | [ ](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c01451%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=972IaYxiYz9iqXq51lMFoA&sysid=1)

---
Friend,
You’re our country’s only hope.
If the current Democrat regime can get away with threatening to arrest its biggest political opponent, then our once great Republic will have fully descended into a third-world tyranny.
**But make no mistake: This isn’t about me. It’s about _YOU_.**
**The regime wants to intimidate YOU out of voting for someone who is not beholden to the globalist ruling class.**
_**So, if you are angered by these threats toward me for having committed NO CRIME, I ask that you peacefully show your support for our America First movement.**_
**_I don’t ask that you do it for me - I ask that you do it for yourself and your country._**
**If America is to remain a free Republic, then we MUST show the Left that their intimidation tactics will NEVER stop the citizens of our country from choosing our own future.**
_We will win the White House. We will obliterate the Deep State. We will once again put America first. And we will Make America Great Again!_

clean_body: America has fallen. | | | | Friend, You’re our country’s only hope. If the current Democrat regime can get away with threatening to arrest its biggest political opponent, then our once great Republic will have fully descended into a third-world tyranny. But make no mistake: This isn’t about me. It’s about YOU. The regime wants to intimidate YOU out of voting for someone who is not beholden to the globalist ruling class. So, if you are angered by these threats toward me for having committed NO CRIME, I ask that you peacefully show your support for our America First movement. I don’t ask that you do it for me - I ask that you do it for yourself and your country. If America is to remain a free Republic, then we MUST show the Left that their intimidation tactics will NEVER stop the citizens of our country from choosing our own future. We will win the White House. We will obliterate the Deep State. We will once again put America first. And we will Make America Great Again! | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. name: Team Joe
subject: Good morning, Peter. Check out what POTUS is up to >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
President Biden, Vice President Harris, Democrats across the nation, and your steadfast support helped make the American Rescue Plan a reality -- and it’s delivering for the American people. | | |
---
Peter, you know the drill: Another week, another Team Joe newsletter highlighting what President Biden is doing to build a better America. **Let’s dive right in >>**

* * *
**PRESIDENT BIDEN’S BUDGET** Elected officials talk a lot about values; about what’s _important_ to them. But as President Biden always says, “Don’t tell me what you value -- show me your budget, and I'll tell you what you value.” Well, this month, President Biden laid out a budget that’s built around four key values: 1️⃣ **Lowering Costs for American Families:** From health care and prescription drugs to housing and utilities, the White House budget aims to give folks more breathing room at the end of each month. 2️⃣ **Protecting and Strengthening Medicare and Social Security:** The White House budget positions us to protect and strengthen bedrock programs that Americans have paid into their entire working lives. In fact, President Biden’s budget will secure Medicare through 2050 and beyond -- without cutting a single penny in benefits. 3️⃣ **Investing in America:** The proposed budget will provide funding to boost American manufacturing, provide national paid sick and parental leave, cut taxes for working families, make communities safer, drive medical breakthroughs in cancer, deliver for our veterans, and more. Why? Because workers power our economy -- and when they thrive, our economy thrives. 4️⃣ **Cutting the Deficit:** Building on President Biden’s record of fiscal responsibility, the budget plans to cut deficits by nearly _$3 trillion over the next decade_ by asking the wealthy and big corporations to pay their fair share, as well as cutting wasteful spending on special interests for Big Pharma and Big Oil. How about that, Peter? **If a fiscal budget is a values statement, your president values lowering costs for families, protecting and strengthening bedrock programs, investing in the American people,_and_ cutting the deficit.** **[Want to learn more? Hear it from President Biden himself: Check out his latest op-ed in the New York Times.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGlyFEPfIQqTPhAJ7ICxnKGyg_U1FixJEiGnjzGokijHFtmn5xoBdFGT4yzqSW9-06zO-dTKkBt5BgCur-EETuh4lTnyW1SIhFe4jx5CVhXb-21NazZNnO4jk3Qua1_7euVnl5lCjIALIuFOv98S_v9l26ZRzZHeJUW1x8OOJjR1GSrEXY0SEaX7SGkKYo5xzezXARYgW3FBGfMgxJaVVqUDDBZmPASLDFWAOhHeksR3FNsB9zJJdjWDxBZopUQEaIqDmi_ER6wn9juSyTLhqxqd0NxPmPrwL0OrHviXpvnGIzKYQ2EvNi2NLoHls6wAHUOBZIbw_xUDoUe41Rm4bPxZUV1Anao-34O34G8Gj_zARM1peLldpetBmj0OqjGsP790Hl6ZjECmE71Nw9LwUSrkeu_z6Or038ApeA-drvnKR6kZCD0TIqj-On2GEzTE6lNv_ezQiINufxT75znsCljsjnTDXClOa4-t7eEnlOkb0P8lYqGqKKFS2L5OLkBhSrIBGM4zfqlCqn3-bMG-ZWQIJCbSYmVf_PY5GTo2SNKOAQezOw83fn4nEPV6-cKrqKRqEN58bwXyad5aPTU-WnI/3un/jSpkUFrvSMOtD4zXv0hEyw/h0/v7e5tsRE4-FFLSETfHZKIOmpugt6_7fzMpojaFs3P8o)** | | | [READ NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDGlyFEPfIQqTPhAJ7ICxnKGyg_U1FixJEiGnjzGokijHFtmn5xoBdFGT4yzqSW9-06zO-dTKkBt5BgCur-EETujuGig_wkPf384Zi0ZWgQ_mRW7laJ7phRWHNthNc_63Gt-UKPeXhHEM82HxjAEFPjA57AbORfZIJI4YQTzwEqhkXqPozOLbM9XWF8ji0B6I89nvpRWmBIAyFm9SVKy8s2mrgpHK8y3Vr7dPxli2tPm3QxkhIGWpSGROeFdkgDmhnNwm0k64Xzq3hw4NYJEat7XjiFDcKWxwSB1Jw-OzNzAh7Dj9SrUOzIWUmCGB9V52I_CZgMEjxKLtOrdJrOTPNW_AvRqulbwth9KXu_teCbuM2aoz2rxP7qTX1TeeSzF_x657JdIB9mBvClJR27UZHz-zfI_QFVBe-gKYw_6yMi7r9Eu8cWxMbB5aged6AaG9Rfbl2_WeU2U3claVFvLf8dczv9NbPCxstzoQYglsJQLorURSnbXGE-4GNfF0j6hkmuVLw9TSF-71ep7wcusmNSGamE3CcyICjPAKwbbiLCZ5NPmsK6CHysaefPBPvrbrTRlEN7K5YvbZEG8n5gPNbak/3un/jSpkUFrvSMOtD4zXv0hEyw/h1/6e3001XYjF45vW6LCu4U89ePjzO8RKoOE7r-Dae15eU)

* * *
**REDUCING GUN VIOLENCE AND MAKING OUR COMMUNITIES SAFER**
On Wednesday, President Biden signed an executive order to move the U.S. as close to universal background checks as possible without additional legislation, keep more guns out of dangerous hands by increasing public awareness around and appropriate use of “red flag” laws, strengthen efforts to hold the gun industry accountable, and accelerate law enforcement efforts to identify and apprehend the shooters menacing our communities.
**These measures will keep communities safer, and it’s only the latest action the Biden-Harris administration is taking to save lives.**

**LAST CALL:**
At the end of this month, the DNC plans to stop submitting membership card orders to our printer -- **meaning this might be one of your last opportunities to renew your membership, Peter.**
The DNC is a grassroots-powered organization, so our party depends on folks like you to invest in our shared values and commit to supporting Democrats.
Here are a few things your donation could help fund:
* 📋 Grassroots organizers on the ground in critical battleground states;
* 🖥️ Important updates to our party’s tech and data infrastructure;
* 💪Voter protection and education before, on, and after Election Day.

clean_body: President Biden, Vice President Harris, Democrats across the nation, and your steadfast support helped make the American Rescue Plan a reality -- and it’s delivering for the American people. | | | Peter, you know the drill: Another week, another Team Joe newsletter highlighting what President Biden is doing to build a better America. Let’s dive right in >> PRESIDENT BIDEN’S BUDGET Elected officials talk a lot about values; about what’s important to them. But as President Biden always says, “Don’t tell me what you value -- show me your budget, and I'll tell you what you value.” Well, this month, President Biden laid out a budget that’s built around four key values: 1️⃣ Lowering Costs for American Families: From health care and prescription drugs to housing and utilities, the White House budget aims to give folks more breathing room at the end of each month. 2️⃣ Protecting and Strengthening Medicare and Social Security: The White House budget positions us to protect and strengthen bedrock programs that Americans have paid into their entire working lives. In fact, President Biden’s budget will secure Medicare through 2050 and beyond -- without cutting a single penny in benefits. 3️⃣ Investing in America: The proposed budget will provide funding to boost American manufacturing, provide national paid sick and parental leave, cut taxes for working families, make communities safer, drive medical breakthroughs in cancer, deliver for our veterans, and more. Why? Because workers power our economy -- and when they thrive, our economy thrives. 4️⃣ Cutting the Deficit: Building on President Biden’s record of fiscal responsibility, the budget plans to cut deficits by nearly $3 trillion over the next decade by asking the wealthy and big corporations to pay their fair share, as well as cutting wasteful spending on special interests for Big Pharma and Big Oil. How about that, Peter? If a fiscal budget is a values statement, your president values lowering costs for families, protecting and strengthening bedrock programs, investing in the American people,and cutting the deficit. | | | REDUCING GUN VIOLENCE AND MAKING OUR COMMUNITIES SAFER On Wednesday, President Biden signed an executive order to move the U.S. as close to universal background checks as possible without additional legislation, keep more guns out of dangerous hands by increasing public awareness around and appropriate use of “red flag” laws, strengthen efforts to hold the gun industry accountable, and accelerate law enforcement efforts to identify and apprehend the shooters menacing our communities. These measures will keep communities safer, and it’s only the latest action the Biden-Harris administration is taking to save lives. | | LAST CALL: At the end of this month, the DNC plans to stop submitting membership card orders to our printer -- meaning this might be one of your last opportunities to renew your membership, Peter. The DNC is a grassroots-powered organization, so our party depends on folks like you to invest in our shared values and commit to supporting Democrats. Here are a few things your donation could help fund: 📋 Grassroots organizers on the ground in critical battleground states; 🖥️ Important updates to our party’s tech and data infrastructure; 💪Voter protection and education before, on, and after Election Day. | | We’ll see you next week, Team Joe | ---|--- | |

I am proud to be a part of All On The Line’s grassroots movement for fair maps, and I’m grateful to my friend Eric Holder for leading this movement. For the past four years, we have done the hard work together -- advocating for fair maps and fighting to protect voting rights.
Our democracy is stronger because of what we have accomplished. States that were once gerrymandered -- Michigan and Pennsylvania -- are now highly competitive, allowing voters to choose their representatives instead of the other way around.
With your help, All On The Line has been able to drive change to make the redistricting process fairer than before. But the movement doesn’t stop here. We must continue the work until we have fair maps in every state.
**[All On The Line isn’t just fighting for fair maps -- they are fighting to give people everywhere a fair shot. Will you make a donation today to help All On The Line strengthen our democracy in 2023 and beyond?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60462646/397214815/-572568336?refcode=20230320_AOTL_P_BHOMarch1_RedLiteXOpeners&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMxMTg0MGNhLTU5YzctZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HFYRBC-Gva3qgzlW4qZM0COIpaYjAPjlwk-NGBEH7Nw=)**

Redistricting is no longer a once-a-decade event. The fight for fair maps is happening right now.
Republicans are already trying to make it harder for voters to pass ballot initiatives -- and this year, the U.S. Supreme Court could give state legislatures more power to gerrymander districts.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: ICYMI
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
body:
I thought you’d want to see this

Friends —
Californians will have access to some of the most inexpensive insulin available, helping them save thousands each year. But we’re not stopping there – California will seek to make our own Naloxone (overdose medication) as part of our plan to fight the fentanyl crisis.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/1828?t=1&akid=1161%2E4767699%2EoOhtwo)
California is transforming San Quentin – the state’s most notorious prison with a dark past – into the nation’s most innovative rehabilitation facility focused on building a brighter and safer future.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/1824?t=2&akid=1161%2E4767699%2EoOhtwo) [](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/1825?t=3&akid=1161%2E4767699%2EoOhtwo)
In California, we are using every tool in our toolbox – including the largest-ever deployment of small homes in the state – to move people off the streets and into housing.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/1826?t=4&akid=1161%2E4767699%2EoOhtwo)
Thanks for reading,
Gavin
* * *

🐻 **Hi.** Please don’t click away just yet. 💪🏻
Last year California passed an amendment to our state constitution protecting a woman’s right to access an abortion. But our fight is not over. The far-right and those who cower to them continue to put women’s rights at risk. Please make a contribution to Gavin Newsom’s ballot measure committee so we can continue protecting women’s rights in California. If that seems worth it, please chip in $20 today.

---
****

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Dark moment in American history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457562:62eocnG-N:m:1:3365131770:8777135F4F5BC79BC48D8E433D73479A:r)
Peter,

We learned that the New York Manhattan District Attorney is likely to indict a former President of the United States who is running for office.

It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. Full stop.

The Manhattan DA explicitly _**campaigned**_ on investigating former President Trump. This is a textbook case of politicizing prosecutorial power.

The argument that Trump shouldn't be "above the law" is a **straw man** : the only reason the DA is even considering this case is _because_ it's Donald Trump.

I pray for our country that the DA does the right thing here and drops politically motivated, but it's going to take leaders to step up and demand action against this abuse of power.

**[Patriot, will you join me in denouncing politically motivated indictments?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457562:62eocnG-N:m:1:3365131770:8777135F4F5BC79BC48D8E433D73479A:r)**

| [** ADD YOUR NAME -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457562:62eocnG-N:m:1:3365131770:8777135F4F5BC79BC48D8E433D73479A:r)
---

The reason I'm doing this is because the rest of the Republican field has been deafeningly silent about an important issue in the country today.

This is about principle, not a person. This is about our country, not one man.

**So, I don't care whether you root for Trump or whether you don't: put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic.**

This will mark a dark moment in American history and will undermine public trust in our electoral system itself. **The silence from the other candidates is deafening. We need leaders, not lackeys.**

I call on the Manhattan District Attorney to reconsider this action and to put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic, **[and I hope you'll join me today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457562:62eocnG-N:m:1:3365131770:8777135F4F5BC79BC48D8E433D73479A:r)**

Thanks for standing on the side of principle over politics,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457562:62eocnG-N:m:1:3365131770:8777135F4F5BC79BC48D8E433D73479A:r)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. A Trump indictment would be a national disaster. It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. **I am calling on other presidential candidates Ron DeSantis and Nikki Haley to join me in calling on the Manhattan DA to abandon the political persecution through prosecution of the 45th president.[Add your name if you AGREE!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457562:62eocnG-N:m:1:3365131770:8777135F4F5BC79BC48D8E433D73479A:r)**

[** ADD YOUR NAME -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457562:62eocnG-N:m:1:3365131770:8777135F4F5BC79BC48D8E433D73479A:r)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457562:62eocnG-N:m:1:3365131770:8777135F4F5BC79BC48D8E433D73479A:r)

---

| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457563:62eocnG-N:m:1:3365131770:8777135F4F5BC79BC48D8E433D73479A:r) | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457564:62eocnG-N:m:1:3365131770:8777135F4F5BC79BC48D8E433D73479A:r) | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62457565:62eocnG-N:m:1:3365131770:8777135F4F5BC79BC48D8E433D73479A:r)

subject: A critical ask
