name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: The silence is deafening
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. Full stop.

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zskmr2acmfoecjeqiqm6i7cms7bqcpc6spaa4q6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spgmap34cph2bs)
Fellow American,

We learned that the New York Manhattan District Attorney is likely to indict a former President of the United States who is running for office.

It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. Full stop.

The Manhattan DA explicitly _**campaigned**_ on investigating former President Trump. This is a textbook case of politicizing prosecutorial power.

The argument that Trump shouldn't be "above the law" is a **straw man** : the only reason the DA is even considering this case is _because_ it's Donald Trump.

I pray for our country that the DA does the right thing here and drops politically motivated, but it's going to take leaders to step up and demand action against this abuse of power.

**[Fellow American, will you join me in denouncing politically motivated indictments?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn984etcvi4vhhqi33huidrfr1r2afk4m3esucn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spgmap34cph2bs)**

| [** ADD YOUR NAME -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfittkrt2hd11jggugng4896oi332mcvg5opgo7o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spgmap34cph2bs)
---

The reason I'm doing this is because the rest of the Republican field has been deafeningly silent about an important issue in the country today.

This is about principle, not a person. This is about our country, not one man.

**So I don't care whether you root for Trump or whether you don't: put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic.**

This will mark a dark moment in American history and will undermine public trust in our electoral system itself. **The silence from the other candidates is deafening. We need leaders, not lackeys.**

I call on the Manhattan District Attorney to reconsider this action and to put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic, **[and I hope you'll join me today.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztl6j6r5bh9mnp1nl0n27a2rtd51io3m1ls9a188_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spgmap34cph2bs)**

Thanks for standing on the side of principle over politics,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zg8tv1q2tgr4ccdogajk4rqgi3se25mv07jo63l8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spgmap34cph2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. A Trump indictment would be a national disaster. It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. **I am calling on other presidential candidates Ron DeSantis and Nikki Haley to join me in calling on the Manhattan DA to abandon the political persecution through prosecution of the 45th president.[Add your name if you AGREE!](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z55f4o9n5eu1rc19q5faulljia7r26i92gi32h80_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spgmap34cph2bs)**

[** ADD YOUR NAME -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkoctl7pcmnat7mb069pk3c8iaqachrlmjhm5tl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spgmap34cph2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z8gl1408kfi74gq72ac3l12klrc0r4mf7nmldfuo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spgmap34cph2bs)

---

| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zv2m35tsl8qbic54v6n9amr9vv2e24g6gogf7g28_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spgmap34cph2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztm6vfif5b444uqq7vt8262an04661q9d5u0145o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spgmap34cph2bs)| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zseqg232d3ed678rc4kk26pvme9jd8a6jt7ec8a8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4spgmap34cph2bs)
---|---|---

The January 6th Committee knowingly and blatantly lied to the faces of the American people. | | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=37c3ba152d0241f88ece37e934547eb4&_e=JC26R24JyOlXw_eh9P0yW2h1SPzAHjzzBdBlUKatxcZkDHZXPGR40cN5MWdFnzRa_Oay0pkuFksnsO74gZ94zTpKjKbOP_kUUa6pqy15-mfIgwWB55sUAt9B9PPf_CxY5IEFIkwybcEtLa5cX66fD_LklO2VKcPFGOEa6Y6RhJlsbIREl3CNh7KzVegDcheISBclgjsXQT4UvpaFZsbWVSWqNeTq6UVEyjkJNLonyqGrTuG7GMRr9VTIfxOnF3KokTR9prDG_xVrsVsqeIg-JA%3D%3D)

Peter, I have another bombshell update on the January 6th Committee.

After years of the January 6th Committee’s lies, withholding evidence, and show trials the American people are _finally_ learning about their deception.

Now, we’ve learned that they released highly sensitive (and deceptively edited) videos without the approval of Capitol Police, **compromising the security of our nation’s capitol.** It’s further proof that they weren’t interested in the facts but in a political narrative to give them more power in Washington. Peter, this Committee must be held accountable for its lies and betrayal of the American people. **[If you agree, please donate to help me continue fighting in Congress to DRAIN THE SWAMP and make government small again >>>](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=37c3ba152d0241f88ece37e934547eb4&_e=JC26R24JyOlXw_eh9P0yW2h1SPzAHjzzBdBlUKatxcZkDHZXPGR40cN5MWdFnzRa_Oay0pkuFksnsO74gZ94zTpKjKbOP_kUUa6pqy15-mfIgwWB55sUAt9B9PPf_CxYqToVbsRZ_jK2V0X0uOXWikkcaBL1mJTK4ll9UbxWy2wqM4y58KfLqczqdjz7x_RK6JxTyhy29GF2Ng7-jyKy99ola202CczkrRdhrh0i2vckrtBy155h_wu_Lzdnvxuirdshje5VCUI2LB6Cp2D4Sw%3D%3D)**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans fully understand the stakes of the Wisconsin Supreme Court race. I hope we do, or we'll again lose a winnable contest that may not seem like a big deal, but will have ENORMOUS CONSEQUENCES--horrifying ones--for our democracy.
body:
Less than 2 weeks to Election Day!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta1053c30-6b49-4042-9b63-012e9eb5e0ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _**In barely two weeks, on Tuesday, April 4th, a Supreme Court race will occur that'll not only determine whether millions of women have access to abortion rights, but may determine the future of our democracy.**_ _We've written about the race before, but we're now basically in the final two week stretch. What I said above is not hyperbole._ **_This one race is easily the most important of the year and could determine whether we remain a democracy._** **The Washington Post summed it up:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65ac176a-e938-4220-9705-8f8792bbf721/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_The last 30 years we've seen Republicans prioritize these less glamorous races, for offices filled with power, from courts to state Attorneys General and Secretary of State offices. It has allowed them to steal more elections through voter suppression and manipulation than any of us can count._** [**_There is a last minute effort by the Kochs to dump in millions and steal the race (what's new?). Will you join us in defeating this effort by giving Janet Protasiewicz $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta53c4ef2-27e5-4374-b58c-7d8fdae59a08/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T68f38acd-b50c-49f4-9583-4a0477f9cdbf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _These Republicans fully understand the stakes of this race. I hope we do, or we'll again lose a winnable contest that may not seem like a big deal, but will have ENORMOUS CONSEQUENCES--horrifying ones--for our democracy._ **More from The Washington Post:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb3e20b89-3564-4217-ad60-d944b6831d5a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This one election on April 4th will determine whether there's a MAGA Republican or progressive Democratic majority on this court._ **_It all comes down to this race._** **_Our candidate, Janet Protasiewicz, is ahead in polling, but it's too close to call. She'll legalize abortion for millions of WI women & protect the state from any attempt by Trump, DeSantis, Pence or any other right-wing autocrat to overturn our democracy for their Christian Nationalist beliefs._** [**_Will you stand with us to counter the last minute effort by the Kochs to dump in millions and steal the race? Will you join us in defeating their effort by giving Janet Protasiewicz $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T695492f0-e4a2-4e20-bac7-5213245dd542/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for defending democracy from this right-wing onslaught._ Cliff
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1d39f169-7af7-4066-a1fb-165039c75a87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:

| 2 Germans are crushing the market with these powerful hearing aids
---
[ ](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx1UltvpCAU_jX6pkEc0XnwodtJm6bZ7WbSZNMncoTjSANqEevOv9_DzKQPTZYACd-NywHbQtT7suS7fZXqFgT0qFPTcsZLVnJW1EVR1DlorHdMVH1DCIg-2TF0YGwOxQbeT5PL1eTSoS32yOqGIlmFTd90gNBrFa1adZ3ap7YdQpiXpLxL-AP1bdvyAcGb8ZSB0RnoT6MwphGpaXS4BHlTSFIsEvqe7aK7fAAVkvJwd__KYquYYIIWCRdrcHKZVq-Q-ODgBjnUZnUEUYaxBgLeCAVuBnMaiVoXiaMEKwcA-aWTFBKRrJ_WUaNfMj2tnUU52bObjYrJIDcvA5dM_udEMznMMqCXTwfa6eVq_RmtpFjW7or_AX-c4gNcjzaNAcd4z1HZ7LX5_Vd01fk4Ei1HazQR38CBXonQx-74JF48T32r581Y2lrUVLnTpXKxXnRpa_pzm9Q_Es4vNs4vpeEfb5vz67t7fszs51v2IX65KpL8nuZwnvFLeQvJLx8iovXhH5v5wHk)
Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.
[ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx1UktvnDAQ_jVwY2VsMOHAIc0qqyjqRo0qVenFGvxYHNlAjAndf9_x7iqHSkVgie81Y491V_KmZYxWbZ2rDjgYrXLbUUIZYZSUTVmWzQ6UbirCa3OHCHCTVUR7sG4H5QYhTJPfycnnQ1e2fd2Tu1rVjBEpWU9NK3WTSqjKtDp33RDjvGTsPqOP-G7bths0BDueCrCqAPVppU5pSCr8er1EcVMIVCwCjCFVcrNHkDFj-_uHnyQ9NeGE409G-Rq9WKY1SI189HCDvFZ29QhhhnUWor4REvwM9jQitS5CjwKcGADEl05gSEIKM62j0mEp1LT2TovJnf1sZUoGsQURqSDiPx3N6LDLoIN42mOll6v1e7KiYln7K_4LwuuUDuDa2jRGPaZ9jtIVP8Lxz29zOMYWaTE6q5D4BxzwlBA99K9P_CXQPHRq3qzD0rzByZ0uk0vzwk07a85d1nzLKL3YKL2Mhn68bT6s7_75ULjPt-KDH32dSPqAazzP-kt5C9ldLkRCm_1fvGPARw)
[ ](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx1Ul9vqyAU_zT6pkGoaB982Nq0WZbdJduSmz2RI2BlAXWINf3299A2e7jJiBj9_TvAQTcFr7aM0c22TFUDHDqtUtNQQhlhlBRVURRVDkpXG8LLrkYEeJdsiHZgbA7FCt6Po8vl6NK-6RQvWQ2V5lKBAsLqruYt26oCPySVqW36EKY5YQ8JPeCzrmvea_BmOGVgVAbqbKSOaUgqnK2eg7grBCpmAV1HNtHNDiBDwvYPuw8SR0k44fiTUL4EJ-Zx8VIjHxzcIaeVWRxCmGGsgaDvhAQ3gTkNSC2z0IMAK3oA8aMTGBKRrBuXQWk_Z2pcWqvFaC9uMjImg1i9CFQQ8cuKJnSYuddePO2x0uvN-hKtqJiX9ob_Bf82xgO4LW0cgh7iPgdps927VlBXh_MRaTFYo5D4D-zxlBA9tm9P_NXT1DdqWo3F0rzCzp2unYv9wk1b012apHpMKL3aKL22hn5_rs4vX-75mNnzZ_bN_7gyknSH73CZ9I_yHpJfL0REq_0_exPAKQ)
Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's **45-day no-risk trial.**
[ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJx1Ultr5CAU_jWZtwSjiXYe8tDtMKWUbqHssvRJTuLJxKJJakzD_Ps9zgx9WFhRwe_m5YhNKdVeCF7t651pQEKPZmcbzrhggrNSlWWpCjCoKibr_o4QkH1WMfRgXQHlBiFMky-6ye-GRgDWplalMi0Y1nHR7vkdL6FFZKza4841Q4zzkon7jB-pb9tWDAjBjqccrMnBfNkOUxqRhkaLS9Q3hSbFoqHvWZXc4ghdzMTh_uEXS61mkklaZFyu0etlWkOHxEcPN8ijsasniDKssxDxRnTgZ7Cnkah10ThqcHoA0N86TSEJyftpHQ2GJTfT2jrUkzv72XYpGfQWdOSa6f-caCaHXQYM-ulAO71erS_JSoplba_4HwhvU3qA69GmMeKY7jl2Lu8XoV6OOKjfROvRWUPEP-BAr0ToY_v2JF8D34XGzJt1tLVUVLnTpXKpXnRpZ_tzk6kfGecXG-eX0vDP982H9cM_P-bu6z3_lD99nUj-QHM8z_itvIUUlw-RUHX4C9sFv9M)

Limited no-risk trials now available It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's 45-day no-risk trial.

name: Leader Beverly
subject: FW: Health care is a human right

body:
Health care is a human right

Protect transgender youth.
I wanted you to hear it from me, Peter. The Georgia House Democrats proudly and unwaveringly stand with our transgender friends and neighbors. We are united in our belief that Senate Bill 140 is a direct threat to the physical and mental well-being of transgender youth, and we will continue to fight against this partisan agenda. If this shameful bill passes in the Senate today, it will go to the desk of Governor Brian Kemp, where he will revoke access to health care for Georgia’s youth with a single stroke of his pen. [Will you join us and show radical Republicans that we won’t engage in this culture war and won’t stand for their attacks on our kids?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60455852/397190386/-1458503367?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmVhMjM1YS00MmM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KN6k60vCRbDHq6lztQUBEuz0liWo5EcPe7hHbGGo23s=&emci=a7cdf453-42c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2bea235a-42c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16273785) We can do this, James Beverly Minority Leader Georgia House Democratic Caucus \---------- Forwarded message --------- [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60455853/397190388/294255004?refcode=_logo&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmVhMjM1YS00MmM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KN6k60vCRbDHq6lztQUBEuz0liWo5EcPe7hHbGGo23s=) Peter, We’ll get right to the point: **House Republicans are attempting to ban gender-affirming care for transgender youth.** As if dismantling women’s reproductive rights last year wasn’t enough, the Georgia GOP now wants to dictate what health care options Georgia families can or cannot provide their children. Despite direct opposition from transgender people, their families, medical doctors, and mental health professionals, **radical Republicans are trying to pass Senate Bill 140, an extreme transphobic bill that seeks to ban gender reassignment surgeries and hormone replacement therapy for transgender youth.** The bill just passed Committee today and may be headed to the House floor for a vote any day now. Georgia House Democrats strongly believe that we must protect the lives of transgender youth and that gender-affirming care is between families and medical professionals, not politicians. We are doing everything we can to stop this extremist bill from becoming law, **but we need your help.** [**Will you stand with us and tell radical Republicans that you oppose Senate Bill 140? House Democrats are collecting signatures from each of our state’s 159 counties. Add your name today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60455854/397190389/-1458503367?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmVhMjM1YS00MmM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KN6k60vCRbDHq6lztQUBEuz0liWo5EcPe7hHbGGo23s=&emci=a7cdf453-42c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2bea235a-42c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16273785) [ADD YOUR NAME TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60455855/397190390/-1458503367?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjQwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmVhMjM1YS00MmM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KN6k60vCRbDHq6lztQUBEuz0liWo5EcPe7hHbGGo23s=&emci=a7cdf453-42c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=2bea235a-42c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16273785) **Make no mistake. House Republicans don’t trust you - or your doctors - to make your own health care decisions.** If these extremists are successful in their attempt to ban gender-affirming care, some of our most vulnerable youth will be left with limited medical options - amidst a mental health crisis. When House Democrats are in charge, we’ll put a stop to the anti-transgender youth, anti-family agenda of radical Republicans under the Gold Dome. **[Help us show the Georgia GOP that we won’t stand for their attacks on our transgender friends and neighbors. body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62458922:6e9yanGNB:m:1:3361486117:1016DDB658FB989B71DCCC1659127FFD:r)
---
| | [**A progressive district attorney wants to put an innocent cop in prison for 99 years. This is a****death********sentence****. Please help!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62458922:6e9yanGNB:m:1:3361486117:1016DDB658FB989B71DCCC1659127FFD:r)**[ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62458922:6e9yanGNB:m:1:3361486117:1016DDB658FB989B71DCCC1659127FFD:r) ** This is Sheriff David Clarke. Please just take a moment to read my urgent text to you -- an innocent cop's life may depend on it. [**A progressive district attorney, bought and paid for by the infamous George Soros, wants to sentence Sgt. Josh Blake to 99 years in prison for doing his job.**** **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62458922:6e9yanGNB:m:1:3361486117:1016DDB658FB989B71DCCC1659127FFD:r) If we can't raise the crucial funds needed to get a top lawyer for Josh, the rabid**** progressive**** D.A., Jose Garza will win. [**And if that happens, I'm deeply concerned Josh won't live long enough to die of old age in prison. Because violent criminals -- maybe some he arrested himself, will****murder****him.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62458922:6e9yanGNB:m:1:3361486117:1016DDB658FB989B71DCCC1659127FFD:r) On May 31st, 2020, in Austin, Texas, an anti-police mob started rioting. They looted and vandalized buildings. They even set police cars on fire! Then the mob blocked a major highway that runs through Austin. No one could get through, not even police cars, fire trucks, and ambulances. The rioters then began to throw objects at the officers. So Josh and his fellow police officers deployed non-lethal bean bag rounds at the rioters that were throwing rocks and other objects. **Then what did progressive D.A. Jose Garza do? Did he indict the rioters for arson, looting, assault, and more?[NO! He indicted Josh and 19 other Austin police officers for committing first degree felonies!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62458922:6e9yanGNB:m:1:3361486117:1016DDB658FB989B71DCCC1659127FFD:r)** Josh himself was charged with two counts of aggravated assault, which can mean a 99-year sentence. That's a death sentence one way or another. [**Sgt. Josh Blake may die behind bars because a rabid****progressive****D.A. is on a mission to destroy good cops!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62458922:6e9yanGNB:m:1:3361486117:1016DDB658FB989B71DCCC1659127FFD:r) And Josh and his wife simply don't have the money to hire a top-shelf lawyer. Thankfully, National Center for Police Defense, Inc stepped in. With your generous support, the NCPD will help provide an excellent, aggressive legal defense for Josh. The NCPD was founded in 2015 to help law enforcement officers and military service members in their time of greatest need, when they're unjustly charged for crimes they didn't commit. NCPD helps pay for legal expenses. And even help pay for food, rent, utility bills, and more so innocent cops and their families don't go under as they endure the brutal legal process. NCPD can do all that only with the generous support of concerned people like you. You may be the only thing standing between Josh and violent criminals who plan to harm him, even kill him. [**Please help save Josh's life by fully funding his crucial legal defense with your very best gift immediately.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62458922:6e9yanGNB:m:1:3361486117:1016DDB658FB989B71DCCC1659127FFD:r) Thank you so much. Retired Sheriff David Clarke

clean_body: | | | | | This is Sheriff David Clarke. Please just take a moment to read my urgent text to you -- an innocent cop's life may depend on it. If we can't raise the crucial funds needed to get a top lawyer for Josh, the rabid** progressive D.A., Jose Garza will win. On May 31st, 2020, in Austin, Texas, an anti-police mob started rioting. They looted and vandalized buildings. They even set police cars on fire! Then the mob blocked a major highway that runs through Austin. No one could get through, not even police cars, fire trucks, and ambulances. The rioters then began to throw objects at the officers. So Josh and his fellow police officers deployed non-lethal bean bag rounds at the rioters that were throwing rocks and other objects. Then what did progressive D.A. Jose Garza do? Did he indict the rioters for arson, looting, assault, and more?** Josh himself was charged with two counts of aggravated assault, which can mean a 99-year sentence. That's a death sentence one way or another. And Josh and his wife simply don't have the money to hire a top-shelf lawyer. Thankfully, National Center for Police Defense, Inc stepped in. With your generous support, the NCPD will help provide an excellent, aggressive legal defense for Josh. The NCPD was founded in 2015 to help law enforcement officers and military service members in their time of greatest need, when they're unjustly charged for crimes they didn't commit. NCPD helps pay for legal expenses. And even help pay for food, rent, utility bills, and more so innocent cops and their families don't go under as they endure the brutal legal process. NCPD can do all that only with the generous support of concerned people like you. You may be the only thing standing between Josh and violent criminals who plan to harm him, even kill him. Thank you so much. Retired Sheriff David Clarke | | The National Center for Police Defense is a 501c3 Charitable Institution. All Contributions are Tax-Deductible. name: Conservatives Give
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

| | This sponsored message from Conservatives Gives is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1334af429e0747398688593ac0d2da03&_e=uRKgSvJ-Vp6LHeMP3_p-XAlHTosfjxLuTF-sOKg2nbI1T2ojQd27Bi87SZ2Xv5UePpKHw7YBcrSh4to9PJXd5JoJNfxtPxuBGc-QCadiklbNMEEWZ8AMLQ4Np9vRdkl6HYNZjtd5pNOOQ8fHSd65fIE7bLj7bFn1B0YieFCtH315UwlRO3XEs2B8eAZ8cEUJTslBX8WV6G-91TqjRPcPVVBzW_vz4bwh2EHYjxtC9KbSa3PTpJQfUa20hnzO6lS2MXi0IkhjN1FEqEmF6q8hKyPPzE2N0zhzXf_dERi4d5Njq4-31a0pq-h1knz5-j6j0OnVz94hcb8yn8SJ2TiDtxlpHQPklXiIuv3rZx3ta4X11i5AJj4iqh4MaYh49XmnEHORXCiQhc0zgGzgrx9kpNZ18bzUpJiPGXIkNq8YpjA%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1334af429e0747398688593ac0d2da03&_e=uRKgSvJ-Vp6LHeMP3_p-XAlHTosfjxLuTF-sOKg2nbI1T2ojQd27Bi87SZ2Xv5UePpKHw7YBcrSh4to9PJXd5JoJNfxtPxuBGc-QCadiklbNMEEWZ8AMLQ4Np9vRdkl6HYNZjtd5pNOOQ8fHSd65fIE7bLj7bFn1B0YieFCtH315UwlRO3XEs2B8eAZ8cEUJTslBX8WV6G-91TqjRPcPVVBzW_vz4bwh2EHYjxtC9KbSa3PTpJQfUa20hnzO6lS20e3L9Er1csa6-K1E5xYem4TZo2zJKMsiPU6hqD15v-tHLvskShxRbxsTok8LGUvtN3DZDqh93emdTne_tIUJEjQkKyxmQ4V3OvQVDIxWN308tMv0n0xqP2Z69Rj3sIhb4tZBjkqP2Mb21baFqiwUFkvvnsEoSoCipNtEAfJ40Qc%3D)**
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1334af429e0747398688593ac0d2da03&_e=uRKgSvJ-Vp6LHeMP3_p-XAlHTosfjxLuTF-sOKg2nbI1T2ojQd27Bi87SZ2Xv5UePpKHw7YBcrSh4to9PJXd5JoJNfxtPxuBGc-QCadiklbNMEEWZ8AMLQ4Np9vRdkl6HYNZjtd5pNOOQ8fHSd65fIE7bLj7bFn1B0YieFCtH315UwlRO3XEs2B8eAZ8cEUJTslBX8WV6G-91TqjRPcPVVBzW_vz4bwh2EHYjxtC9KbSa3PTpJQfUa20hnzO6lS2rONtj30miZZzQAwgabbEUuKtCWUQ8ofhZjeBCZoOgTi5cNdO-CqdnZkBnUrRicPdAkWdmi6Ury_tL5REdAWyTB-pelfJFOx-QXueOUIZ4Ahcld0CMd9AVM2u7T0PbuO7J_NcoahcDGQmfjL1-mfIGhq_LE7roP1TTOKwfIVlkrA%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1334af429e0747398688593ac0d2da03&_e=uRKgSvJ-Vp6LHeMP3_p-XAlHTosfjxLuTF-sOKg2nbI1T2ojQd27Bi87SZ2Xv5UePpKHw7YBcrSh4to9PJXd5JoJNfxtPxuBGc-QCadiklbNMEEWZ8AMLQ4Np9vRdkl6HYNZjtd5pNOOQ8fHSd65fIE7bLj7bFn1B0YieFCtH315UwlRO3XEs2B8eAZ8cEUJTslBX8WV6G-91TqjRPcPVVBzW_vz4bwh2EHYjxtC9KbSa3PTpJQfUa20hnzO6lS2pmLz-m7T0wwZ1Vx_cgnRSmwF2AhF-g8eruxxdvA1OnEy0D-6tIzKAP_S9tYdggkgOuMMus6rJoKH_RHmThYfeVwhdQO-Wd_A72NcIUNrhtWO6MqAX8oAwGtX_y_oGNPiiD7TWplDJwh8FMpLingqjFTJ3OuH7BkaAL6dwF6h9-Y%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1334af429e0747398688593ac0d2da03&_e=uRKgSvJ-Vp6LHeMP3_p-XAlHTosfjxLuTF-sOKg2nbI1T2ojQd27Bi87SZ2Xv5UePpKHw7YBcrSh4to9PJXd5JoJNfxtPxuBGc-QCadiklbNMEEWZ8AMLQ4Np9vRdkl6HYNZjtd5pNOOQ8fHSd65fIE7bLj7bFn1B0YieFCtH315UwlRO3XEs2B8eAZ8cEUJTslBX8WV6G-91TqjRPcPVVBzW_vz4bwh2EHYjxtC9KbSa3PTpJQfUa20hnzO6lS2t5fHN5Ac2n4iwtUZY7Tquo9gA8EmvAHTqBgTlOnCZK_nkWmsfC8nA1n1o4lehsYifbVa9hes6R5ZQbt4AcTTTezdhaKLnj6nuQJ3-FwcBA1kirZiHZlboeqHwhy-qarkXJBXQG--ltfKjFxOzk4HulqUZQo9vtnvGfCf7ouGKmM%3D)**
** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservatives Gives
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=1334af429e0747398688593ac0d2da03&_t=28-w1Fz3bjhj_57NCd95NDMUhR70BmWSdGT1NhpuE_jliTdr5EKF7Mz4vdiJhPgUExdEyqUVDDFZ4kuvHOa-ABZWv1fOdLFYp4X8GLdy1HvF3Qf-xhBvHvdRuhbsGwNfH5XpPhFiuyUk4Qpe0sU-A8q3VOg0tuA5MkXc9KW3h44%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1334af429e0747398688593ac0d2da03&_e=GvUL3_QzMMfeGKcmX5yznAb8J3UvNHEQ3cLswUKpM_V8UHdYfNXiiaRaLZdJIf6XOtPR0mY-sif406XRgzq97DNuWMjc41L1Fd46ksHOG5lFrT7AB8Cm1Gh8M6XA7WfjZ9xCEu1Lyr2FTclq7ax7WuLJ4reXsBUofZv6pNto7tK7w58yGMns4CUYortFwtCxVrZlJgRqB8TKNx40EZcdPv6gqgAv9-7wBxxizFrOpWesqoqkLXeGSm0OUQtLejqpc5lo4TEB-iiYujzvZ2HfzA%3D%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1334af429e0747398688593ac0d2da03&_e=uRKgSvJ-Vp6LHeMP3_p-XHCmwsy7L38ravWzAINPHtnfjXZUDmDcpX5dyIYy00zCwu1_mDeK4XkpTV_j2UZYVQY9vDaOUKTo-0PMSp-7NbkuBLyeFH-O0R8EC-58moH1-JglPDgmZLTNcaT8q9RpadQJ8FB6BpA3SuhnFXMKRVyyEifZ3Tllb9dCyCIGPPT0dro8t7dh3xenkPoA5Ju0Bjp3nzWpDv8hZ9rX9vQEX8Q%3D)_

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA March 20: URGENT Action Needed: Block Biden’s Agenda!
body:
| | |
---
Tomorrow (3/21) is the day that President Trump may be indicted and arrested by the District Attorney in New York. Join your fellow patriots by wearing Red, White, and Blue to show your love for America and to stand with President Trump against this lawless witch hunt. **[Be sure to watch this special message](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) where I share important information about how YOU can support President Trump in these perilous times.** And, as always, please pray for America! And stay tuned for more ways to show your support as the events unfold. This week, use our Align Act campaigns to block Biden from bailing out failed banks, cutting the gas on your stove, appointing a fraud-ridden bureaucrat, and entering a backdoor pandemic treaty!
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNzktODZmNWU2NjE5MjVmNGIyYThlNGIwNTBiODkxNzE1YjAiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL25vLW1vcmUtYmFpbG91dHM_bWlkPTQ2MzczJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/BrsOUIjfa-SnJgCs0rr4rQ)
---
Joe Biden’s bad money moves are multiplying. This time, he’s bailing out Big Tech’s favorite lenders like Silicon Valley Bank. Like we saw with Obama’s Wall Street bailouts–the problem with bailouts is that they are never just one shot. Bailouts beget more bailouts. Put a stop to the bailouts. **[Please contact your Representative and both of your Senators](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNzktODZmNWU2NjE5MjVmNGIyYThlNGIwNTBiODkxNzE1YjAiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL25vLW1vcmUtYmFpbG91dHM_bWlkPTQ2MzczJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/JxqiDvjK6nlFthZaMS6tTA) and give them a simple message – NO MORE BAILOUTS!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNzktODZmNWU2NjE5MjVmNGIyYThlNGIwNTBiODkxNzE1YjAiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMyIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vYWxpZ25hY3QuY29tL2dvL25vLW1vcmUtYmFpbG91dHM_bWlkPTQ2MzczJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/oYhHWDEGsZtvLYQ5ljbGXw)
---
|
---
| | If Congress were to accept Biden's [$6.9 trillion budget plan](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._bW9kPWFydGljbGVfaW5saW5lJm1pZD00NjM3MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVEifQ/IUGJnb7uWtTqgIHXG4V3ZA) for fiscal year 2024, the national debt would rise from the current $31.5 trillion to just under [$51 trillion by 2033](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-7Bt8px3LgLqg_fg), adding to a preliminary analysis by the Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget. Putting that figure in perspective, it took the United States 216 years-from George Washington to the second term of George W. Bush-to rack up its [first $8 trillion in debt](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.). And during the next 10 years, the portion of debt placed upon the shoulders of America's families would jump $19 trillion, to $43.6 trillion. The national debt would be so bloated that funds that should be directed towards some of the nation's most urgent priorities must instead be diverted just to pay the interest on previous federal expenditures. By any rational definition, this situation qualifies as an existential crisis for the United States Government and its citizens. Rather than trimming the budget to meet the emergency, however, the Biden's budget proposal includes trillions of dollars in new federal spending and tax hikes. In a divided Congress, the president's budget is considered to be dead upon arrival, but it serves as an opening gambit in budget wars to come.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Thanks to your petitions, together we’ve put enormous pressure on Joe Biden and his plot to ban the gas stove in America. He cooked up this ban with the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC), which is now receiving comments from citizens like you. This is a crucial moment for protecting our kitchens from Big Government overreach! **Use the Tea Party Patriots activism tool to**[**submit a ready-made comment**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**, or send your own message in support of gas stoves!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-uiyD0dZkrktABM7fA)
---
|
---
| | Sometime between now and March 21, Joe Biden is expected to use his veto power for the first time to strike down [H.J.Res.30](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._cz05JnI9MSZxPSU3QiUyMnNlYXJjaCUyMiUzQSU1QiUyMmFuZHkrYmFycitsYWJvciUyMiU1RCU3RCZtaWQ9NDYzNzMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIn0/lFbMV8s8EsOmzHa_GSOtmQ), a resolution overturning an administration rule allowing retirement savings to be placed into Environment, Social, and Governance (ESG) investments - often without employees' consent or even their knowledge. Activist fund managers controlling billions' worth of retirement assets assign companies an ESG score, based on their adherence to such far-left environmental goals such as destroying fossil fuel production and to social objectives such as indoctrinating employees in diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI). Under ESG, the fiduciary responsibility to maximize investors' returns takes a back seat to political priorities. Recently collapsed Silicon Valley Bank had apparently been so full-on woke with its laser-focus on [ESG and DEI in particular](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.), that its chief risk officer position remained [vacant](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) for eight months. With the Biden administration more interested in leftist political goals than Americans' retirement investments, taxpayers may be cleaning up more expensive messes in the short term, while longer term, their nest eggs are placed at risk.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Should a bureaucrat who oversaw _billions of dollars_ in fraud be awarded with a powerful new position? Joe Biden thinks so. He nominated Julie Su to run the Department of Labor–despite her well-known failures in the California government. Julie Su would wield immense power to harm our economy if she is confirmed. **Urge your Senators to**[**VOTE NO and reject Julie Su**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._rLA3ADDfi7cA)
---
|
---
| | Last week, every left-leaning member on the House Homeland Security Committee [pulled out](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) from a Texas field hearing at the southern border addressing Joe Biden's ongoing immigration crisis. Their decision to disengage came at the last minute, even after they had [booked travel](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) and called a witness. Along with illegal aliens, criminals and smugglers have been pouring into the United States under Biden's watch. Border patrol officers encountered more than [4.5 million](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) illegal immigrants along the southwest border between February 2021 and December 2022. It's no surprise that Mexican drug cartels experienced a [2,500%](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-Cpq86uZLyeBSLk0RFg) increase in dollars made from human smuggling just between 2018 and 2022, bringing their yearly totals from $500 million a year to $13 billion. American taxpayers get the short end of the stick when they are forced to pay at least [$150 billion every year](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) to cover the costs of Biden's reckless immigration spending. Texas lawmakers, however, are taking matters into their own hands by[ proposing legislation](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._fhuZrPbCaKFeWSEcNQRSA) that makes crossing the Mexico border illegally a state felony, another safety measure the Left fervently opposes.
---
| | |
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
Joe Biden claims he is good pals with his old buddies in the US Senate. But those Senators might feel differently if they knew he was pushing to sign a treaty _without_ approval by the Senate, as required by the Constitution. This treaty would empower the World Health Organization to mandate how all of its participants respond to the next pandemic. **Protect American sovereignty and**[**urge your Senators**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-llC4BQZ1fX7SgAVhJxtg)**to call for a vote on the WHO CA+ treaty – and VOTE NO!**
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._Vomc7IoxI11tbC1w)
---
|
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._CQO0pRc1U-_0qCvug)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMwNzktODZmNWU2NjE5MjVmNGIyYThlNGIwNTBiODkxNzE1YjAiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMjYiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ2MzczJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/KoqcOxXM8-9AhRK6YhrG6g)
---

---
| | © 2023 [Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-D4wOh-6CUWBxPpQ)2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314, Woodstock, GA 30189 **[View This Email in a Browser](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/m/1/49109489/02-b23079-86f5e661925f4b2a8e4b050b891715b0/54/132/315bc315-eb8d-40f0-a4a0-b613c9c3bc37)** | **[Manage Subscriptions or Unsubscribe](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-EB3C_SduTrMSJj4qQ)**

name: Adam Frisch
subject: “Safe Republican”
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xdP-nmxY9tRezNfcxzC3oJkLD9xaodohTE1NwXfptnOq-Ts9b8ilnsb3IhbHgp2lEAodEFUvB-DXRUhe70zBCqyld_syGWzXMEfA8lLu3HVX1KLQpWwxf2fzWrJjP9cPziIG8R9-khsKM8P2SZkI-QJmyvrnKhb-gwGmW8ortm9eLlMcAzcjAF-PfY_Pmgiygv_t6G3laZ8-wJQfjirZFYlngU1Yz8mGnDrufHLN7yGjnD70Ouefj2uEFt1sOoiRlQxJk4dO2VSWiwZWX3F1Ua7qGoaeIdDX9sH03XNJQsISoy_isQH0geSNUchJ_SktLhuLTpLjULa1dKkIcK_Hda/3un/sGkI8SSqTIeu7_FOLWsO2w/h0/jirABTJk4uvRz5bNcJlJbmaoFy70K8umkv58nEs_N7U)
---
Peter, **[In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign for Congress against Lauren Boebert.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xdP-nmxY9tRezNfcxzC3oJkLD9xaodohTE1NwXfptnOq-Ts9b8ilnsb3IhbHgp2lEAodEFUvB-DXRUhe70zBCqrc5N9h1cJmGx65jDb_23sGuRym8pJKUoIMPnZeUM4gKgQahBcEcOPZz8ooUfn24D4ZsaIHRNl8hQfITKyiSO3h__RE_n_BZXO16Ssif7G41980LF7xtQsNwP_HxMd_QR-nHxsv4lmbRYsjA_hpNnUAg28qUY7aSh3dSWZM_8wAa7q0d-2NE2R6QAjzr_mAb1Wc3CXRrIKmlwMdOZPieBW51ARpE1n6oGYcaLFfxUPVkw6uU0QQO5tkSQRYM6bdQU/3un/sGkI8SSqTIeu7_FOLWsO2w/h1/z9auQmbC9PwVsy_tkO1VFbtEd0QZ8uphTMpqDj_AAGA) But before I do, please let me explain why your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024.** Very few people believed we could win in 2022. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes. The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. Ours was the closest race in the entire country. We did it all with zero support from national Democrats while also being outspent by Boebert’s campaign and her allies. How? By driving 24,000 miles in my red pickup truck to every corner of the district, showing up, meeting people where they were, and _listening_ to everyone. We put in the work, and people like you who volunteered, donated, made phone calls, etc... You made it all possible. This time, things are going to get even nastier. I’m sure of it. Boebert’s Super PACs will try to smear me on every TV across the district. **We can counter their lies and win, but I’m counting on your support now to do it. My team has set a goal of getting 25,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to start strong and defeat Boebert:** **[If you’re able to, can I count on you to make a donation to my campaign right now – no amount is too small – to help us hit our goal and finally kick Lauren Boebert out of Congress? clean_body: | | Peter, But before I do, please let me explain why your support now is so important if we’re going to defeat Boebert in 2024. Very few people believed we could win in 2022. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes. The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, we came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. Ours was the closest race in the entire country. We did it all with zero support from national Democrats while also being outspent by Boebert’s campaign and her allies. How? By driving 24,000 miles in my red pickup truck to every corner of the district, showing up, meeting people where they were, and listening to everyone. We put in the work, and people like you who volunteered, donated, made phone calls, etc... You made it all possible. This time, things are going to get even nastier. I’m sure of it. Boebert’s Super PACs will try to smear me on every TV across the district. We can counter their lies and win, but I’m counting on your support now to do it. My team has set a goal of getting 25,000 Founding Donors to our campaign so we have the resources we need to start strong and defeat Boebert: Early resources are critical to building and sustaining a campaign that can meet every voter and win. Thank you for everything. With gratitude - Adam | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

with President Donald Trump._

**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1dce6bab21694d13b0e26ff1e47868de&_e=keHYo2r-tzOy_FSAx6HYEZwzGAkaoDKjZPvw6IxzWObc7cyq7bezScg5vW7q2NROJ05C6fj_4VpJKaDcGG9sPCO9FBLoVA2DxZ9CWlClbank-pFPjQvgU7HMKBSB3y3gL_UbeGeEMyVFpXnsnqkcgsKcS0Hq1jVuwn0_Wz3WOQH_Alj6qui7wuWvinarfdytEQ_Ix7eyDKsrN7KrL22EoE6mG7YldJcqsxJJL-Mo6shZYUsxLICaQggpKmMIxnL7FgiSTggNtT_BmPXfe9_5LUOY_IgNGy6FGuOrKxyboTU%3D)

I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
March 20, 2022

Press Contact:
Chris Farmer
chris@chaseforva.com
804 912 6007

Scheduling Press Interview:
Debbie Gwynn
debbie@chaseforva.com
804 393 2715

Senator Amanda Chase's Name Will Officially Appear on the Ballot Tuesday, June 20, 2023

Senator Chase has Successfully Completed the Necessary Requirements on Time and Her Name Will Appear on the Ballot this Tuesday, June 20, 2023

CHESTERFIELD, VA - Today, Monday, March 20 at noon, Senator Amanda Chase submitted all necessary paperwork on time to appear on the ballot this coming Tuesday, June 20 to Legislative District Chair Carey Allen. Today was the opening day Republican primary candidates could file their signature petitions and other necessary paperwork to appear on the ballot.

"A huge thank you to the hundreds of voters in the new Senate District 12 who signed the petition to get my name on the ballot. Today, we successfully submitted double the number of verified voter signatures needed after months of going door to door and collecting signatures. My name will officially appear on the ballot Tuesday, June 20. We also want to thank all of our volunteers who have gone door to door with me in all types of weather since session concluded in February. Thanks to your help, my name will appear on the ballot. " stated Senator Chase.

With all 3 Senate District 12 Candidates submitting their paperwork today at noon, there will be a drawing in April for name placement on June's ballot. Incumbents are not guaranteed first place placement on the ballot.
###

name: Ben Wikler
subject: This could be the most expensive race in 2023:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Derek, this is Ben Wikler, Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, and in a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to split a donation between John Fetterman and WisDems to help us win our next pivotal election in April 2023](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230320-1?refcode=em20230320-1-8297&refcode2=8297_434096_nhNL4s&akid=8297%2E434096%2EnhNL4s)** , but first I want to explain the stakes:
**On April 4, Wisconsinites will vote to fill an open seat on the state Supreme Court** —in an election that will determine whether that body will have a conservative or a progressive majority until 2025. This race could shape decisions on voting rights, election subversion, legislative district lines, and so much more—and could have a larger effect on the 2024 presidential race than any other contest in the country this year.
Over these last two presidential cycles, the state Supreme Court has played an outsized role in shaping the electoral playing field and the powers of government in ways that have usually systematically advantaged Republicans in Wisconsin.
Just two years ago, in 2020, Donald Trump asked SCOWIS to illegally throw out tens of thousands of votes in Wisconsin’s most Democratic leaning areas. Thankfully, SCOWIS stopped him, but only by a slim 4-3 margin. If we can rebalance the Court, we are more likely to stop these brazen attacks on our democracy in their tracks.
**With a conservative justice retiring, April 4th represents a chance to flip an open seat** —which could lead to a Wisconsin Supreme Court majority ready to consider cases on new state legislative maps, voting rights, Wisconsin’s 1849 abortion ban, and otherwise examine cases based on the law rather than Republican ideology.
The Democratic Party of Wisconsin intends to fully support Judge Janet Protasiewicz, the progressive candidate in this nonpartisan contest. In keeping with other recent high-stakes races here, **this is the most expensive Supreme Court race in Wisconsin history** , so we’ll need all the support we can get to win in April.
**[That’s why I’m humbly asking you for help now so my team can prepare, Derek. Will you split a donation of any amount between John Fetterman and WisDems to help us win in April? »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230320-1?refcode=em20230320-1-8297&refcode2=8297_434096_nhNL4s&akid=8297%2E434096%2EnhNL4s)**
**[Donate Now »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230320-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230320-8297&refcode2=8297_434096_nhNL4s&akid=8297%2E434096%2EnhNL4s)**
Yours in the fight,
Ben Wikler

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230320-8297-footer&t=1&refcode2=8297_434096_nhNL4s&akid=8297%2E434096%2EnhNL4s)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8297%2E434096%2EnhNL4s)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8297%2E434096%2EnhNL4s)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

body:
Look, I know the election might seem far away, but the GOP has already launched vicious attack ads against me and I need your immediate help to fight back.

| Peter,

Jon Tester from the great state of Montana here and I wanted you to know: **I’m officially running for reelection.**

My team says we need to raise $1,000,000.[ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60458147/397199228/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230320-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYmY2MThlLTRhYzctZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5qHI7y1ralH-1y2QOoZgpOkSX7o6FITk6JjjGPh_BK4=)So, [_**before I ask you to split a donation between my campaign and Fight for Progress**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60458148/397199229/665036970?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230320-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhiYmY2MThlLTRhYzctZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5qHI7y1ralH-1y2QOoZgpOkSX7o6FITk6JjjGPh_BK4=), here are three reasons why:

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: I Just Got Off The Phone w/President Trump...
body:
Tonight Was Crazy! It was an honor among honors to have President Donald Trump join our Pastor's For Trump livestream tonight. The National Prayer C
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19192824.11141.1.a3839b217a990686c5c0439f1c0d591f)
---
|
---
## Tonight Was Crazy!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19192824.11142.1.4d8b537c59493e5a49ad8f1320567475)
---
It was an **honor among honors** to have **President Donald Trump** join our [Pastor's For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19192824.11143.1.b2f417e26f7b8b5aca751cd366834240) livestream tonight.
The National Prayer Call started off strong with remarks from **Roger Stone** and **General Michael Flynn**.
At that point we had **over 115,000 people** on with us through the different platforms such as Facebook, YouTube, Twitter and Rumble.
When **President Trump** came on he shared briefly and then **BOOM**!
We got hacked or something crazy happened. Everything shutdown. We really are not sure what happened.
However, we called **President Trump** and had a beautiful conversation that we recorded because he wanted us to share it with everyone.
At the end of the call, I prayed over **President Trump** and at his request I prayed over our nation.
Here is the link so you can watch the livestream and the call with **President Trump**.
[https://youtu.be/zmiV_YxFPOE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19192824.11144.1.f313dd5d384c82a2f01f20ce929893cf)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19192824.11145.1.23163054975ab31cb8b79665f46a3bd2), [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19192824.11146.1.724f6ac5e52ee8b16480b502e683a59d), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19192824.11147.1.8f1f18eaa4cc164bacd5aab81711ebfd), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19192824.11148.1.50ee7cd347b12417b0b2cf5f44f76076), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19192824.11149.1.cb49cb24ccd7db8b4487c864d2f3df59) & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19192824.11150.1.faafd61676ea23114ffed5aea93b508b)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19192824.11151.1.08dd63fe4e016193814d8d03d478cd1e)

| | **ALERT: PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP IS PREPARING TO BE ARRESTED THIS WEEK!** [_**WE MUST FIGHT BACK! >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62459490:JHclMnGNZ:m:1:3365131770:B362749F0376D6E0D0FFDDA0EAD574CB:r)

| Peter, This is nothing but a revenge tour by the Democrats who so desperately want the leader of the America First Movement behind bars.

**FIRST -** They accused Trump of being a "Russian Agent," and sabotaged his entire presidency with lies and impeachment attempts.

**THEN -** Their Deep State henchmen tried to take him out, raiding his personal home in the middle of the night!

**NOW -** They are using a B.S. legal theory to try and _ARREST AND JAIL THE FORMER PRESIDENT WHO DARED TO STAND UP AGAINST THE ESTABLISHMENT!_

This is what you see in third-world banana republics...

**We must recognize this stunt for the partisan pathetic ploy that it is - help me sound the alarm about what they are trying to do to the leader of our movement!**
[_**ACT NOW AND HELP ME DEFEND DONALD J. TRUMP! >>**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62459490:JHclMnGNZ:m:1:3365131770:B362749F0376D6E0D0FFDDA0EAD574CB:r)

| Make no mistake about what you're seeing play out...

**A Soros-funded, Woketopian District Attorney in New York is using an untested legal theory to try and IMPRISON Donald Trump and DESTROY the entire America First Movement.**

_They see us gaining momentum and are trying to bring that to a screeching halt by any means necessary!_

But President Trump said it himself in the wake of this leaked news:
_**We Must "Take Our Nation Back!"**_

I'm fighting to do exactly that in the halls of Congress. I know that it's time for ACTION to defend Donald J. Trump and his America First Agenda - even if we have to fundamentally change this town to make it happen!

But at a momentous time in history like this one - when our 45th President could literally be **JAILED** by his political enemies at any minute! - I know that it's going to take our entire movement of grassroots patriots to fight back.

[_**Don 't sit this fight out on the sidelines. Make your voice heard and demand an end to this partisan, pathetic Witch Hunt of President Donald J. Trump!!! ->**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62459490:JHclMnGNZ:m:1:3365131770:B362749F0376D6E0D0FFDDA0EAD574CB:r)

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Keep the Factory Farm Moratorium Bill Strong!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60458919/397201789/1658385178?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQzMWRjZGY3LTRkYzctZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PccZUz4CPuZ_HDGKzcxuZWOPsCdgPzj1aG57N7auqSk=&emci=b543f0f5-41c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d31dcdf7-4dc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, One of our major priorities for the 2023 legislative session, the Factory Farm Moratorium bill (SB 85-1), is at risk of being severely weakened. We support the current bill because it hits the pause button on expanding or adding any new mega dairies and other huge factory farm operations in the state until we can adequately address the water, air, climate, animal welfare, and worker issues that plague the largest of the large factory farm operations. [**We need you to take action today to make sure the bill stays strong!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60458920/397201790/1658385178?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQzMWRjZGY3LTRkYzctZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PccZUz4CPuZ_HDGKzcxuZWOPsCdgPzj1aG57N7auqSk=&emci=b543f0f5-41c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d31dcdf7-4dc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) This Wednesday at 8:00 AM the Senate Committee on Natural Resources is considering an industry-backed amendment that would cut major protections from the bill. This amendment would limit the bill to just chicken factory farms, excluding any other factory farm operations like mega dairies, and it **would reduce the time of the moratorium to just two years**. We all know that a two year moratorium doesn’t give the state nearly enough time to adequately regulate the factory farm industry. We can’t let Oregon’s lawmakers cave to the pressure from industry by severely weakening this bill. [**Will you ask your state senator to stand strong and support the original bill, SB 85 (with -1 amendment), and reject the industry-proposed -2 amendment that removes mega dairies from the bill?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60458921/397201791/1658385178?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQzMWRjZGY3LTRkYzctZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PccZUz4CPuZ_HDGKzcxuZWOPsCdgPzj1aG57N7auqSk=&emci=b543f0f5-41c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d31dcdf7-4dc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) One of the largest dairies in the country is located in Eastern Oregon near the Columbia River in Morrow County. Some 70,000 head of dairy cattle are all housed in a small amount of land generating massive manure lagoons, sucking as much water out of the ground as a small Oregon city, and creating unhealthy air pollution that also contributes to climate change. Morrow County is struggling with low groundwater levels, and with dangerous levels of nitrates in the groundwater that people rely on for their drinking water. Not only have the mega-dairies in our state wreaked havoc on communities’ water quality and quantity, and air quality, they have also put dozens of family and midsized farmers out of business. **We cannot allow lawmakers to remove mega-dairies from this crucial piece of legislation. ** There is currently a vacant site ripe for a mega-dairy in the region where existing mega-dairies already operate and this bill is crucial to ensuring that site isn’t developed into an inadequately regulated factory farm––another key reason to not exclude mega dairies from this bill. We also know that Oregon’s communities are at risk of Foster Farms' intention to expand in a big way into Oregon’s Willamette Valley––making it crucial that we hit the pause button on ALL factory farms in the state of Oregon. [**So please join us in urging your senator to keep the Factory Farm Bill strong by rejecting the industry-backed -2 amendments.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60458922/397201792/1658385178?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQzMWRjZGY3LTRkYzctZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PccZUz4CPuZ_HDGKzcxuZWOPsCdgPzj1aG57N7auqSk=&emci=b543f0f5-41c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d31dcdf7-4dc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2107230) Thank you for all that you do! Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

name: LCV Rapid Response
subject: URGENT: Dirty energy bill H.R.1 headed to a vote -- this is a worst-case scenario, Peter.
body:
__TRIPLE your impact to help defeat this legislation. |
---

|
DEVELOPING -- after weeks of meetings with energy industry lobbyists, House Republicans have combined their worst proposals into one piece of legislation: H.R. 1, the so-called "Lower Energy Costs Act."

**This is a worst case scenario, Peter.**__********

More drilling for climate-polluting oil and gas. More dangerous pipelines. Gutting environmental review. Vague "national security" exceptions to the Clean Air Act. Ending funding for renewable energy._____****_

**We can 't let this pass without a fight. Every single member of Congress needs to be feeling grassroots pressure right now. A group of donors has put together a triple match fund to help power our campaign** -- _but to pull this off, we need your help._ ______

[Please, make a gift right now. For a limited time, your support will go three times as far. That means a gift of just $5 becomes $15 when you give right now.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

The "1" in H.R. 1 indicates that this is the first priority for Republican leadership in the House. And this is a huge signal: **_with their first major bill_ , House Republicans have decided to sacrifice our planet's future to give handouts to corporate polluters.**
|
---
**[**TRIPLE YOUR IMPACT:
STOP THE GOP'S
DIRTY ENERGY BILL >>**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

Speaker McCarthy has already delivered for Big Oil and other corporate polluters, holding sham hearings and closed door negotiations with lobbyists. Now is when the people -- and the environmental movement -- make _our voices_ heard.

We need to dramatically scale up our grassroots campaign if we're going to be able to go toe-to-toe with corporate lobbyists... and win.

But without the support of environmentalists like you, that can't happen. So we're asking:

[Help us reach our $40,000 fundraising goal. Even $5 helps. A group of donors has agreed to TRIPLE MATCH all gifts for a limited time. Your support for our climate will go 3X as far.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Thank you for making your voice heard. We'll be in touch soon with updates on our campaign and more ways that you can help.

Onward,

LCV Rapid Response
Alex, Annie and Norita

---

**[**MAKE IT MONTHLY**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

subject: ICYMI: My interview on Brendan Anti’s Straight Talk Podcast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carmen for Congress]( "Paid for by Carmen for Congress")
body:
We have a lot to tackle together | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f3c0c1486ec7/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13543111?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=c29fa85b0c&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| We’re a nation of rebels, _and I see that as a redeeming quality._

I’m a mother with four grown daughters, Peter. I know what it’s like to nurture the next generation in finding their path – while offering guidance on how to pick one’s battles _and_ take a stand when it’s necessary.

**As one seeking a role in national leadership,**_I believe it’s essential to earn the trust and respect of the people so that we can work as a team in solving the issues of the day_!

It was an honor to open up and share about my life recently on Brendan Anti’s _Straight Talk_ podcast, which can be heard [here](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=ad1ce68946&e=0e51d1e991):
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=c3fd17810f&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| Let’s be honest, we’ve got a lot of problems we need to address. From soaring crime, a mental health epidemic, public safety disasters, soaring taxes, and overreaching government – there’s a lot we need to tackle and it will take putting our heads together to create remedies!

I want you to know where I stand – and the skills I’m confident about utilizing to spearhead common sense solutions.

As I commit to continuing the discourse to earn your trust Peter, I’m doing everything in my capacity to succeed in winning a seat to represent you in DC!

**[A show of support – with even $25 – will help me show the DC Power Elite that the people of Washington are determined to send a leader they can depend on to represent them during these troublesome times!](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=20dca79357&e=0e51d1e991)**

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: These are the same Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The Republicans who lobbied to loosen bank regulations in the first place are now the same Republicans turning their backs on the American people.
#
Peter,
**ICYMI:** The biggest bank failure since the 2008 financial crisis hit a bank in Silicon Valley, forcing the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) to take over. This led to a widespread panic among wealthy investors and venture capitalists in the tech industry.
Now the FDIC has promised to make those investors “whole” — effectively bailing them out. They _**gambled**_ , mismanaged their risk, and yet will still get off _**scot-free**_.
**But how did this happen in the first place?** It happened because Republicans weakened bank regulations back in 2018 under the Trump administration, paving the way for Silicon Valley Bank's failure.
Meanwhile, President Biden’s plan to deliver critical student debt relief for more than 40 million borrowers is being held up in the Supreme Court after Republicans chose to stand with loan companies who have been tirelessly lobbying for payments to resume so they can extract more profit.
**The Republicans who pushed to provide massive handouts to corporations during the pandemic are the same Republicans who lobbied to loosen bank regulations, and are now turning their backs on poor and working people.**
Corporate money corrupts our politics. And as we’re clearly seeing now, it’s the people who pay the price.
[**Peter, it’s past time for an economy that works for ALL OF US. If you agree, can you chip in $3 — or any amount today — to help Pramila keep up the fight for critical student debt relief?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41133?refcode=em20230320-2290&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2290%2E420207%2E-ePdak)

More than 90% of student loan borrowers earn less than $75k a year. This is a _**crisis**_ — even seniors are entering retirement with student debt. And more than **_12 million borrowers_** live in districts represented by the _**same**_ Republicans who are seeking to deny them relief.
We have come a long way in our fight to provide for millions of borrowers. And we know we have miles to go so we can continue delivering for working class people and their communities.
[**Our movement needs your support so we can keep up our fight against the lobbyists and corporations that are standing in the way of progress. Will you pitch in today to stand with the 40 million Americans in need of debt relief?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41133?refcode=em20230320-2290&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2290%2E420207%2E-ePdak)

clean_body: The Republicans who lobbied to loosen bank regulations in the first place are now the same Republicans turning their backs on the American people. Peter, ICYMI: The biggest bank failure since the 2008 financial crisis hit a bank in Silicon Valley, forcing the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation (FDIC) to take over. This led to a widespread panic among wealthy investors and venture capitalists in the tech industry. Now the FDIC has promised to make those investors “whole” — effectively bailing them out. They gambled , mismanaged their risk, and yet will still get off scot-free. But how did this happen in the first place? It happened because Republicans weakened bank regulations back in 2018 under the Trump administration, paving the way for Silicon Valley Bank's failure. Meanwhile, President Biden’s plan to deliver critical student debt relief for more than 40 million borrowers is being held up in the Supreme Court after Republicans chose to stand with loan companies who have been tirelessly lobbying for payments to resume so they can extract more profit. The Republicans who pushed to provide massive handouts to corporations during the pandemic are the same Republicans who lobbied to loosen bank regulations, and are now turning their backs on poor and working people. Corporate money corrupts our politics. And as we’re clearly seeing now, it’s the people who pay the price. More than 90% of student loan borrowers earn less than $75k a year. This is a crisis — even seniors are entering retirement with student debt. And more than 12 million borrowers live in districts represented by the same Republicans who are seeking to deny them relief. We have come a long way in our fight to provide for millions of borrowers. And we know we have miles to go so we can continue delivering for working class people and their communities. In solidarity, Jayapal HQ | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
