body:
Friend, what do you see in this picture? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60459751/397204565/915037627?refcode=email_032023_crowbiosplit&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjkxMzA2YS01MWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFVkkfp7HJkwJql6NvxPaxQxJ-ttMEBkzMHCLGpfERY=) If we ignore the bowl cut, you’ll see a kid who has no clue what life has in store for him. All he wanted was to play with his Legos and run around in the backyard. I grew up in a working-class family, so I know what the struggle is like for so many Americans. It wasn’t easy at times, but if there’s one thing my early life taught me, it’s to never give up. I’ll be honest: There wasn’t always enough money growing up, so I started working at a young age. Paper routes, Arbys, construction — and after high school I enlisted in the National Guard to help pay for college. **Then, right as I was preparing to graduate, 9/11 happened.** It was a defining moment. Like so many others, I felt the call to serve my country. I went active duty and became an Army Ranger, putting my life on the line to defend our nation’s values. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60459752/397204566/915037627?refcode=email_032023_crowbiosplit&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjkxMzA2YS01MWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFVkkfp7HJkwJql6NvxPaxQxJ-ttMEBkzMHCLGpfERY=) I came back stateside after serving three tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. I wanted to continue giving back, so I offered pro-bono legal services to help veterans transition to civilian life. Then Donald Trump became president. Extremists began threatening to strip away our health care. Immigrants were being demonized. Even our democracy felt fragile. I felt that call to step up and serve again, so after long discussions, I decided to run for office. Our country needed a new generation of leadership — one that seeks to unite us, not divide. **Coloradans agreed. In 2018, I became the first Democrat to ever represent Colorado’s 6th congressional district. It’s been full speed ahead ever since.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60459756/397204567/915037627?refcode=email_032023_crowbiosplit&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjkxMzA2YS01MWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFVkkfp7HJkwJql6NvxPaxQxJ-ttMEBkzMHCLGpfERY=) That’s my story, friend. I’ve always gone where the fight is — no matter the odds. Progress doesn’t come easy. Progress happens because people put in the work and fight for it. Especially in moments like these. Democracy is under attack. The right to vote is under assault. A fundamental freedom was recently yanked away for half of Americans. And the extremism still isn’t over. I refuse to let them win without a fight. **[I’m counting on your support every step of the way. Please, split a $10 donation between my campaign and Brittany Pettersen today to help us bring a new generation of leadership to Congress>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60459759/397204575/915037627?refcode=email_032023_crowbiosplit&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjkxMzA2YS01MWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFVkkfp7HJkwJql6NvxPaxQxJ-ttMEBkzMHCLGpfERY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60459760/397204576/-1777122001?refcode=email_032023_crowbiosplit&express_lane=true&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNjkxMzA2YS01MWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vFVkkfp7HJkwJql6NvxPaxQxJ-ttMEBkzMHCLGpfERY=)

clean_body: Get a better night's rest with these relaxation techniques, sleep tips, and more! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | What To Do When You Can't Sleep | | | | | | If you’re one of the millions of Americans who struggle with insomnia, you may find your mind racing and your body tossing and turning when you just want to be asleep. With the right approach, you can reliably fall asleep within a matter of minutes. Learn how to implement 4 relaxation techniques, plus tips to help you fall asleep quickly at . | | | | | | | | | | | | Trending Topics | | | | | | How to Function on No Sleep | | | | | How to Buy a Mattress Online | | | | | | Common Sleeping Positions for Couples | | | | | Do Women Need More Sleep Than Men? | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Sleep Foundation, A OneCare Media Company 1414 NE 42nd St 400 Seattle, WA 98105 | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Russell=20Fry?=
subject: Republicans, our party needs you...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRY FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/russellfrysc/get-local-2023?e=7aa6ac5965)
---
| |
---
| | Dear Conservative Leader,

President Biden and his progressive pals have taken us on an awful ride these last two years. Regardless of the issue, Joe Biden keeps turning left.

**It's time to stop Joe Biden’s liberal agenda and take a stand for our nation's future. Don’t you agree? **

There are no statewide elections this year in South Carolina, but we still need your help to steer our country down a better, more conservative road.

The South Carolina Republican Party is required by state law to reorganize every two years. During this process, registered voters are invited to attend a short meeting at the local precinct level and make their voices heard. From there, many of them decide to attend county, state, and national Republican conventions. These leaders serve as the GOP's grassroots base and help elect party officers, make party rules, and decide the party's platform.

Please get involved today in the Republican Party - _even if you've never attended a political meeting before_.

**I am not asking for your money, I am asking for your patriotism. ****Please make plans to attend your [](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=81c3e4e623&e=7aa6ac5965 "https://linkprotect.cudasvc.com/url?a=http%3a%2f%2fparacom.paramountcommunication.com%2fct%2f61553499%3aWLpMz-DN5%3am%3a1%3a487614308%3a84B4B3D5ACD615BEC8E0D40EFDC1FC4E%3ar&c=E,1,SGG7GgaLOEy0mtFGMFG17UJ7FhroQny4qIsATSZn3FK66aLnI6XnEGtp9CwwDD_9hk-ttkFABmqYO_CMxW5KzYgLONOXUDPn-cWfeSNzkQB9ABU,&typo=1")****upcoming precinct meeting.**

While you're there, it's very important that you sign up to serve as a delegate to your county GOP convention, so you can help steer our state and nation down the right path.

We can take back our country. It starts now. [**Please attend your local Republican precinct meeting to get involved!**** **](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=3df3c087d7&e=7aa6ac5965 "https://linkprotect.cudasvc.com/url?a=http%3a%2f%2fparacom.paramountcommunication.com%2fct%2f61553499%3aWLpMz-DN5%3am%3a1%3a487614308%3a84B4B3D5ACD615BEC8E0D40EFDC1FC4E%3ar&c=E,1,uuS-Z_JqiHRQBv-Ud0xlyFUumxvrqXG-zTv3nW0EwyeLpLJfFJQ1vzJei24CtCPQR9-vu3JPvs9yGAokHCpDzh219fSCQIlBMgUBwaxKrg,,&typo=1")

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| Congressman Russell Fry

P.S. If you want to learn a little more about the process before you get involved, [**this 3-minute video does a great job of explaining it.**](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=c1e25f3164&e=7aa6ac5965 "https://linkprotect.cudasvc.com/url?a=http%3a%2f%2fparacom.paramountcommunication.com%2fct%2f61553499%3aWLpMz-DN5%3am%3a1%3a487614308%3a84B4B3D5ACD615BEC8E0D40EFDC1FC4E%3ar&c=E,1,JdKz8fobKPtoJd5EWVAvRcSLcVvxVoGYr4MoVB3qTbhcKMyhDxxrUdkqDYMT2MZoSMS8RJpmDm8qblmZlP65eMEGUTTfpNCG1rYacv4K9HSUis8ygFI,&typo=1")[ ](https://RussellFrySC.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a41df098de9eb0c2ebc47c51a&id=c9647e27ba&e=7aa6ac5965)

We can take back our country. It starts now. "" Sincerely, | | Congressman Russell Fry P.S. If you want to learn a little more about the process before you get involved, "" | | PAID FOR BY FRY FOR CONGRESS | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Fry For Congress, All rights reserved._

I want to keep this short: One of the most important elections of 2023 is about two weeks away. In Wisconsin, Milwaukee County Circuit Judge Janet Protasiewicz is running for an open seat in the state Supreme Court — which has been under conservative control for years. Judge Protasiewicz is a respected judge and devoted community leader. And if she wins, progressives would have a majority and could protect abortion rights, defend voting rights, and reverse extreme gerrymandering. I’ll just be blunt: The 2024 presidential election could also be at stake. The Wisconsin Supreme Court was just one vote away from siding with Donald Trump to throw out thousands of votes in 2020. We’ve got to elect Janet Protasiewicz to help secure our democracy. But she’s up against a MAGA extremist supported by anti-abortion groups, billionaire donors, and election deniers — and we need to fight back with as much grassroots support possible. [_**Will you split a contribution of $3 or anything you can between Janet’s race and our campaign? Justin Bieber recently posted a video on Instagram that displayed the status of his partial facial paralysis due to Ramsay Hunt syndrome, a rare disease that affects individuals with the chicken pox/shingles virus. The video shows him looking side-to-side, lifting his eyebrows, and finally grinning, with the caption, “Wait for it”.

subject: my story in pictures

body:
| | |

Friend: When I was growing up, I never could have imagined that I'd run for elected office one day – let alone become the first computer programmer and the first former synagogue president ever elected to the Senate.
As the granddaughter of Jewish immigrants and the daughter of a World War II veteran, I was surrounded by loved ones who taught me the values of hard work, determination, and persistence – and I've carried these with me my entire life.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60469686/397238185/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2441-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjA5ZTY1Ni03NGM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NBL-a27m-Qf8iyPfW8GEL7UZsiwQ745jLxcW4eqePuY=)
I carried those values with me when I was working as a cocktail waitress at Caesars Palace to pay for college, becoming the first in my family to graduate. I carried them with me when I was working as a computer programmer in a male-dominated field.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60469687/397238186/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2441-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjA5ZTY1Ni03NGM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NBL-a27m-Qf8iyPfW8GEL7UZsiwQ745jLxcW4eqePuY=)
I carried those values with me during my first-ever campaign for Congress in 2016, when I flipped a highly competitive district from red to blue,**and in 2018, when I defeated a Republican incumbent against all odds – becoming the second woman senator in Nevada's history.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60469688/397238187/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2441-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjA5ZTY1Ni03NGM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NBL-a27m-Qf8iyPfW8GEL7UZsiwQ745jLxcW4eqePuY=)
To this day, those values of hard work, determination, and persistence fuel my fight to advocate for working families and bring much-needed progress to the lives of all Nevadans.
**But right now, experts at _The Washington Post_ are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection – and _FiveThirtyEight_ says that Nevada could once again decide Senate control.**
The GOP will come after me with everything they've got, and I simply cannot fight back without your grassroots support. **[So please, friend, will you contribute $5 or more today to help me defend my seat and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60469689/397238188/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2441-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjA5ZTY1Ni03NGM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NBL-a27m-Qf8iyPfW8GEL7UZsiwQ745jLxcW4eqePuY=)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60469690/397238189/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=jtk2441-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjA5ZTY1Ni03NGM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NBL-a27m-Qf8iyPfW8GEL7UZsiwQ745jLxcW4eqePuY=)

clean_body: America has fallen. | | | | Friend, You're our country's only hope. If the current Democrat regime can get away with threatening to arrest its biggest political opponent, then our once great Republic will have fully descended into a third-world tyranny. But make no mistake: This isn 't about me. It's about YOU. The regime wants to intimidate YOU out of voting for someone who is not beholden to the globalist ruling class. So, if you are angered by these threats toward me for having committed NO CRIME, I ask that you peacefully show your support for our America First movement. I don 't ask that you do it for me - I ask that you do it for yourself and your country. If America is to remain a free Republic, then we MUST show the Left that their intimidation tactics will NEVER stop the citizens of our country from choosing our own future. We will win the White House. We will obliterate the Deep State. We will once again put America first. And we will Make America Great Again! | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. But I need your help to prove I have an unbeatable wave of support for his removal. I’m counting on 5,000 grassroots supporters to take a stand with me and sign on before midnight. Will you join me in this fight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60462550/397214597/1634307625?source=20230320_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzE4NDBjYS01OWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXh7zdDInyeb0ANOGpPO6-dM3pz2g8R1ydKRmRuTiOs=&emci=c2e70bdc-f7c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a71840ca-59c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21346897) I need you to know the facts, Peter. In the 2020 presidential election, 46% of Americans mailed in their ballots. Over half of President Biden’s supporters sent in absentee or mail-in ballots. [_**I cannot stress this enough: Mail-in votes are at the core of America’s democratic systems. DeJoy is HARMING our elections with his longer delivery windows, shutdowns, and price hikes. Which is why I need as many voices as possible -- 5,000 signatures strong before midnight -- to OUST DeJoy once and for all. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60462551/397214598/1634307625?source=20230320_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzE4NDBjYS01OWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXh7zdDInyeb0ANOGpPO6-dM3pz2g8R1ydKRmRuTiOs=&emci=c2e70bdc-f7c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a71840ca-59c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21346897) | [**SAVE THE POST OFFICE. Peter, I’m working hard to remove DeJoy from office for good.
I’ve heard from constituents all across the country about their outrageous mail delays.
I’ve grilled Trump’s Postmaster General DeJoy in front of my committee, _[**twice.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60462557/397214603/1634307625?source=20230320_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzE4NDBjYS01OWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXh7zdDInyeb0ANOGpPO6-dM3pz2g8R1ydKRmRuTiOs=&emci=c2e70bdc-f7c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a71840ca-59c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21346897)_
Now, I’m calling on the USPS Board to dismiss DeJoy.
[**And I won’t stop until we oust him.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60462558/397214605/1634307625?source=20230320_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzE4NDBjYS01OWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXh7zdDInyeb0ANOGpPO6-dM3pz2g8R1ydKRmRuTiOs=&emci=c2e70bdc-f7c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a71840ca-59c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21346897)
[_**Before midnight, I hope you’ll sign your name in support of firing DeJoy once and for all. I need a resounding 5,000 supporters on my emergency petition demanding Trump’s Postmaster General DeJoy be fired to SAVE the USPS. I want to prove we have a MASSIVE wave of grassroots supporters looking out for the Post Office. Can I count on you in this fight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60462559/397214606/1634307625?source=20230320_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzE4NDBjYS01OWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zXh7zdDInyeb0ANOGpPO6-dM3pz2g8R1ydKRmRuTiOs=&emci=c2e70bdc-f7c4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=a71840ca-59c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=21346897)
Thank you,
Raja
| Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: One year ago Twitter banned us
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDc5LWVjODQ2YzJmMjY4ZjQ0YjRhZDhiZDhkMTg4Y2IxNjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZzlkZzlsZXZqOT91dG1fc291cmNlPUZGTzM2OTg0In0/lOWKyB5lcFWFuJu2aX7FXg)
---
|
---
** _Happy Twitter Suspension Anniversary!_** It's hard to believe it, but it's exactly one year to the day since we generously named Admiral Rachel Levine the recipient of the prestigious **Babylon Bee Man of the Year Award**. And what a year it's been! That tweet got us suspended from Twitter, with a notice that we would regain access to our account if we deleted the tweet. **We refused to cave to that demand and ignore basic biology, thousands of years of human understanding, and the common sense anyone has when they look at Rachel Levine.** We languished in Twitter jail for eight long months, depriving the Twitterverse of hundreds of life-changing satirical headlines and videos. Satire has always played an important role in society. In the marketplace of ideas, absurd, dangerous, and harmful ideas must be mocked. It is through this mocking that these bad ideas are relegated to the trash heap of history.
---
[Subscribe and Support the Bee](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDc5LWVjODQ2YzJmMjY4ZjQ0YjRhZDhiZDhkMTg4Y2IxNjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZzlkZzlsZXZqOT91dG1fc291cmNlPUZGTzM2OTg0In0/UXaJi40XDz-N-Yw-kHUcyg)
---
Thankfully, Elon Musk did us a solid and purchased Twitter, giving us the opportunity to regain access to our account. Now, all we have to do is gradually pay him back the $44 billion that we owe him. Shouldn't be that difficult, right? All in all, it's been quite a year for The Babylon Bee. We can't even begin to express how grateful we are to our loyal followers for standing by us. So we won't. Just know that we appreciate you and your support. [**You can join us in celebrating the anniversary of this momentous occasion by becoming a premium subscriber to The Babylon Bee.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDc5LWVjODQ2YzJmMjY4ZjQ0YjRhZDhiZDhkMTg4Y2IxNjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZzlkZzlsZXZqOT91dG1fc291cmNlPUZGTzM2OTg0In0/94KmptEGRNS3sUG-C-nEVQ)** **Not only can you help support our efforts financially, but you also get access to **exclusive perks** , including **full-length podcast** s,**premium articles** , **behind-the-scenes footage** and **bloopers** , **Bee Social** , and _more_. Or, you can just wish everyone you see in public a Happy Rachel Levine Twitter Suspension Anniversary Day, but you might get some weird reactions. Either way.
---
[Subscribe and Support the Bee](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDc5LWVjODQ2YzJmMjY4ZjQ0YjRhZDhiZDhkMTg4Y2IxNjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjMiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZzlkZzlsZXZqOT91dG1fc291cmNlPUZGTzM2OTg0In0/QctOID-wWkDZnuBS7Y28rw)
---
This crackdown on comedy is real, and our battle for free speech isn't even close to being over. The Babylon Bee will keep fighting for the right to make jokes, and we want you to stand behind us. And by that, we mean we want your money. **[Click the button below to become a subscriber today and join the fight!](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDc5LWVjODQ2YzJmMjY4ZjQ0YjRhZDhiZDhkMTg4Y2IxNjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjQiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZzlkZzlsZXZqOT91dG1fc291cmNlPUZGTzM2OTg0In0/3vpJ6B35cLzxVR95OKlnhg)** Seth Dillon
CEO | The Babylon Bee

[Subscribe and Support the Bee](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDc5LWVjODQ2YzJmMjY4ZjQ0YjRhZDhiZDhkMTg4Y2IxNjg5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3B4bC5pc3QvZzlkZzlsZXZqOT91dG1fc291cmNlPUZGTzM2OTg0In0/eJ5qpC9jFFWs8R615H4_gQ)

| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bc1d10ce4b3e4c4c85c75b5087e49a5d&_e=He2BZ9gDQzA1J-rjfo2DtqejLt7P14n6V2qujSSgchIxGgG-VVzOOE5X0YlLiWCASgfW8CWtbe3e-PqOePOEIg0l3lV_Jdd2t3jbWowx0Vs8RsO56BG-_Ag9SpvKU5yNY8mkloZO1xliqYetbykNrpAgJAqAox658bKu_QNp7Fek1Or81R7VR63-85xTdkYzn-I_sWFG1BYa53FJHe4WHY6j8e7lMNcvMQ6KzsKLvtbMN7_WlhHtY0rn1YtLqBCFu7mNcRzSg_tf4btWf4HhtWnPlXUWZdEpd4THqbUuTlls852Tqkd9132BL7cCb-BP_XaIWgLJxR3u6k6ip1gtI8wm5qG1iyAZxTrXKrxH9-E29zLZL_rnwnxAzh9ULZYP8qJzibGZzAPvoqrf0KH_SOY5nux7oe-zzeVlKJkeqPQxpIVcTR8oppS-2SAJNz9MW589LfsMZ8lUfOpYbvB5oggi-td8AXkJO43-dXMARqLRu5_DvjTjcl8-pmFJ6oq-Za72PMEfae2un6WVLCRh3nBHvGrrfFsDSRp7EIOVRQUE_qGOTYF_5aXSn6f_TLbixpgDzZUHHLt_hOE3mrjuCw%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

We learned that the New York Manhattan District Attorney is likely to indict a former President of the United States who is running for office.

It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. Full stop.

The Manhattan DA explicitly _**campaigned**_ on investigating former President Trump. This is a textbook case of politicizing prosecutorial power.

The argument that Trump shouldn't be "above the law" is a **straw man** : the only reason the DA is even considering this case is _because_ it's Donald Trump.

I pray for our country that the DA does the right thing here and drops politically motivated, but it's going to take leaders to step up and demand action against this abuse of power.

**[Fellow American, will you join me in denouncing politically motivated indictments?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bc1d10ce4b3e4c4c85c75b5087e49a5d&_e=He2BZ9gDQzA1J-rjfo2DtqejLt7P14n6V2qujSSgchIxGgG-VVzOOE5X0YlLiWCASgfW8CWtbe3e-PqOePOEIg0l3lV_Jdd2t3jbWowx0Vs8RsO56BG-_Ag9SpvKU5yNY8mkloZO1xliqYetbykNrpAgJAqAox658bKu_QNp7Fek1Or81R7VR63-85xTdkYzn-I_sWFG1BYa53FJHe4WHY6j8e7lMNcvMQ6KzsKLvtbMN7_WlhHtY0rn1YtLqBCFu7mNcRzSg_tf4btWf4HhtWnPlXUWZdEpd4THqbUuTlls852Tqkd9132BL7cCb-BP_XaIWgLJxR3u6k6ip1gtI8wm5qG1iyAZxTrXKrxH9-E29zLZL_rnwnxAzh9ULZYP8qJzibGZzAPvoqrf0KH_SOY5nux7oe-zzeVlKJkeqPQ2NU1v0e-YSX9XP2_1sRo8ZX-ZRzBGwrIeiH27bUlEVNNHiOBqxIJSllQvUz3nuuyp7YWc-7hUA6E6H8u4qbiB8qJ3F1idsP8_oRdpEPSUab9dpqs6QLpU3wgCjJPsc6QYKxVXpot4QQY05z_XwRLmfxsApm0KMfQrtbDmjiFRnA%3D%3D)**

The reason I'm doing this is because the rest of the Republican field has been deafeningly silent about an important issue in the country today.

This is about principle, not a person. This is about our country, not one man.

**So I don't care whether you root for Trump or whether you don't: put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic.**

This will mark a dark moment in American history and will undermine public trust in our electoral system itself. **The silence from the other candidates is deafening. We need leaders, not lackeys.**

I call on the Manhattan District Attorney to reconsider this action and to put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic, **[and I hope you'll join me today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bc1d10ce4b3e4c4c85c75b5087e49a5d&_e=He2BZ9gDQzA1J-rjfo2DtqejLt7P14n6V2qujSSgchIxGgG-VVzOOE5X0YlLiWCASgfW8CWtbe3e-PqOePOEIg0l3lV_Jdd2t3jbWowx0Vs8RsO56BG-_Ag9SpvKU5yNY8mkloZO1xliqYetbykNrpAgJAqAox658bKu_QNp7Fek1Or81R7VR63-85xTdkYzn-I_sWFG1BYa53FJHe4WHY6j8e7lMNcvMQ6KzsKLvtbMN7_WlhHtY0rn1YtLqBCFu7mNcRzSg_tf4btWf4HhtWnPlXUWZdEpd4THqbUuTlls852Tqkd9132BL7cCb-BP_XaIWgLJxR3u6k6ip1gtI8wm5qG1iyAZxTrXKrxH9-E29zLZL_rnwnxAzh9ULZYP8qJzibGZzAPvoqrf0KH_SOY5nux7oe-zzeVlKJkeqPT5rxaxULdxyYn5fDl18AaPOeQFuPBlqHVtwEGhWxnNLyRfXmuLgYT7H1fM76jvqSr8LL_bCT6WnTc2c2Ld3EgkowWIFtfhPYrKjU_RlZbwY2lTlp51Nd3FEAcRFagseD9xt1-SV1ivOGhgbB-gQv7vve65E7gvFfyefN6at50YSA%3D%3D)**

P.S. A Trump indictment would be a national disaster. It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. **I am calling on other presidential candidates Ron DeSantis and Nikki Haley to join me in calling on the Manhattan DA to abandon the political persecution through prosecution of the 45th president.[Add your name if you AGREE!](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bc1d10ce4b3e4c4c85c75b5087e49a5d&_e=He2BZ9gDQzA1J-rjfo2DtqejLt7P14n6V2qujSSgchIxGgG-VVzOOE5X0YlLiWCASgfW8CWtbe3e-PqOePOEIg0l3lV_Jdd2t3jbWowx0Vs8RsO56BG-_Ag9SpvKU5yNY8mkloZO1xliqYetbykNrpAgJAqAox658bKu_QNp7Fek1Or81R7VR63-85xTdkYzn-I_sWFG1BYa53FJHe4WHY6j8e7lMNcvMQ6KzsKLvtbMN7_WlhHtY0rn1YtLqBCFu7mNcRzSg_tf4btWf4HhtWnPlXUWZdEpd4THqbUuTlls852Tqkd9132BL7cCb-BP_XaIWgLJxR3u6k6ip1gtI8wm5qG1iyAZxTrXKrxH9-E29zLZL_rnwnxAzh9ULZYP8qJzibGZzAPvoqrf0KH_SOY5nux7oe-zzeVlKJkeqPQ1eoUXI8j2iou26T7KAw72rmk2ekhaEuRzf6HlbE5Q42WJ8wBFoG46PlU92G860WidwvgjtzMEuiD01XYg1IsxEDJMpPo6Zky3Hj7esM8oHqn2f2iRh0ZtDn0WNNefewEldL5oE3FR29V_xloKg79TfYLx4YUX9pEQ3f_VVWkoEA%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. Full stop. | Fellow American, We learned that the New York Manhattan District Attorney is likely to indict a former President of the United States who is running for office. It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. Full stop. The Manhattan DA explicitly campaigned on investigating former President Trump. This is a textbook case of politicizing prosecutorial power. The argument that Trump shouldn't be "above the law" is a straw man : the only reason the DA is even considering this case is because it's Donald Trump. I pray for our country that the DA does the right thing here and drops politically motivated, but it's going to take leaders to step up and demand action against this abuse of power. | The reason I'm doing this is because the rest of the Republican field has been deafeningly silent about an important issue in the country today. This is about principle, not a person. This is about our country, not one man. So I don't care whether you root for Trump or whether you don't: put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic. This will mark a dark moment in American history and will undermine public trust in our electoral system itself. The silence from the other candidates is deafening. We need leaders, not lackeys. I call on the Manhattan District Attorney to reconsider this action and to put aside partisan politics in service of preserving our Constitutional republic, Thanks for standing on the side of principle over politics, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. A Trump indictment would be a national disaster. It is un-American for the ruling party to use police power to arrest its political rivals. I am calling on other presidential candidates Ron DeSantis and Nikki Haley to join me in calling on the Manhattan DA to abandon the political persecution through prosecution of the 45th president. GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Why does the rule of law matter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
re: the news about Donald Trump |
#
---
Peter, as a former federal prosecutor and the lead counsel in the Ukraine impeachment of President Donald Trump, **I ran for Congress principally on a platform of preserving and protecting our democracy and, perhaps most importantly, the rule of law.** The rule of law can be summed up by a famous quote from our founding father and second president, John Adams, who said of our fledgling constitutional democracy that "it may be a government of laws and not of men.” This essential concept underlying our democratic values finds its roots in the Greek philosopher Aristotle, who stated: **“Passion influences those who are in power... Law is reason without desire.”** In order to preserve this fidelity to the rule of law, our founding fathers enshrined separation of powers in our constitution, ensuring that a (relatively) neutral judiciary branch would interpret and enforce laws passed by the legislature and implemented by the executive branch. They also delegated critical responsibilities to the states, including the prosecution of most crimes. **In our criminal justice system, we have vital protections against the awesome power of the prosecutor.** The first is the grand jury, which decides whether there is sufficient evidence to support an indictment proposed by the prosecutor. The second, of course, is the fundamental right to a trial by jury — 12 peers who must unanimously agree that the prosecutor has proven a crime beyond a reasonable doubt, the most stringent legal standard in our legal system. If we are truly a government of laws, not men, then it naturally follows that no man is above the law. And as we anticipate the first of possibly several grand jury indictments against Trump, we must remember that no person is larger than the law. Just like everyone else, Trump has constitutional rights to a trial by jury, to confront his accusers, and to legal counsel. **But if there is admissible evidence to convince 12 jurors that he committed a crime beyond a reasonable doubt, then the prosecutor should proceed with charges without fear or favor.** If Trump is not charged because of a fear of the response from his supporters or because he is a candidate for president, then our government ceases to be one of laws not men, and our great experiment of constitutional democracy will crumble. Peter, I don't know what evidence Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg has to support an indictment against Trump, and I have no idea what a trial jury will decide, but I do know that Mr. Bragg is a person of high integrity who has more than 20 years of experience as a prosecutor on the federal, state and local level and will not consider politics in making any charging decisions. And if Trump is innocent, or if the charge is legally deficient, then our system of laws provides for a judge and jury to make that determination, not other politicians or the public. We know Donald Trump does not believe in the rule of law, as I helped to demonstrate in proving that he abused the power of the presidency by extorting Ukraine for his personal benefit. **[I will never stop fighting to preserve our democracy and the rule of law, so please join me in that fight by making a contribution to my campaign to show you are with me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60463420/397218891/160930933?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDcwNjdlMy01YmM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOonaKv5uTUyeqLpKQUBoDCP5EC-4Rp9Rvp7bJ6K2ik=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60463425/397218892/160930933?express_lane=true&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDcwNjdlMy01YmM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KOonaKv5uTUyeqLpKQUBoDCP5EC-4Rp9Rvp7bJ6K2ik=)

Night, tracing her journey from the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8475?t=1018&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ]daughter of immigrants to becoming
the first Latina from the Midwest to serve in Congress.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1019&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

Years ago, Delia helped found Our Illinois Revolution. And this year, she
gave the [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8476?t=1020&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ]progressive response to Biden’s State of the Union Address,
calling for bold urgent action before 2024.

“We must push back against MAGA but also prove to people that we’ll
actually deliver — that means doing everything in our power with executive
action in this moment,” she said.

“We shouldn’t make an excuse that we’ll get to things when we get a
majority again. Let’s be honest, we had the House and there were things we
just never delivered on,” Delia said. “DACA can’t wait til we get a
majority, rent price-gouging can’t wait, prescription drug prices can’t
wait.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1021&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

Our Revolution is backing Brandon Johnson, a former public school teacher
and union organizer, for Mayor of Chicago.

Like Delia Ramirez [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8475?t=1022&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ]told us Monday, “This is a unique opportunity for
our progressive multicultural coalition to elect one of our own to the
Fifth Floor.”

Brandon’s opponent? Conservative Paul Vallas, who is flush with corporate
cash and calls himself “more of a Republican than a Democrat.”

“This didn’t happen overnight, that all of a sudden Brandon emerged to run
for mayor,” Delia said. “This is years of local grassroots
movement-building, and now we’re in a moment when the soul of a city is on
the line.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1023&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

Chicago Teachers Union President [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8477?t=1024&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ]Stacy Davis Gates laid out the
history leading to this moment where a middle school teacher could defeat
a school privatizer to lead the city.

“It means when you fight you can win,” Stacy told us. “I am so proud of
our movement in Chicago. I am so proud that we have the chance to bring
forth a vision of co-governance.”

“Brandon believes every child deserves a fully-funded school and that
safety begins with investment,” she said. “He believes if we don’t fight
for it and organize for it, we don’t get it. In Chicago, we’re sending our
best to transform this city with us.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1025&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ]Chip in a donation to specifically help fund our work around the
Chicago Mayoral Race — every bit helps!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1026&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

Martin Luther King Jr. said: “If we crack Chicago, we crack the world!” On
April 4, the anniversary of his assassination, voters will decide in
Chicago.

This race will have reverberating impacts, and we can each play a role to
tip the balance. Make calls to mobilize 100,000 Our Revolution supporters
to the polls in Chicago.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8478?t=1027&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ]MAKE CALLS FOR BRANDON

★ ★ ★

ST. LOUIS SLATE ADVANCES!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1028&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

Nearly our entire progressive slate in St. Louis advanced to the general
election, including Mayor Tashaura Jones, Board President, and former
Bernie delegate Megan Green — and 9 of our 10 ward candidates!

Our Revolution has been working for multiple election cycles in St. Louis
and now we’re looking to strengthen our progressive majority, which passed
a Basic Income trial in the city this year.

Our team is making 150,000 voter contacts in the city ahead of the April
4th election, and we’re hearing a lot of excitement on the ground around
our slate! Early voting starts this Tuesday.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8364?t=1029&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ]PHONEBANK FOR ST. LOUIS!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1030&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

Building local power is critical, and Our Revolution is proud to endorse
Shawn Denney for mayor of Lawrence, Indiana — a 50,000-person city next
door to Indianapolis.

Shawn is a former teacher, school board member, and Bernie Sanders
supporter, and he is the leading voice on the Lawrence City Council right
now.

Shawn is also working with a diverse and progressive slate of candidates
that are running for city council — and this is a winnable race against a
Republican extremist who hangs out with Mike Pence.

“We are staying focused on the people that live in our community,” Shawn
told us Monday night. “We passed a $15 minimum wage for city employees,
and this past year, we helped 500 families facing evictions stay in their
homes.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1031&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

Power is up for grabs in major cities across the country, and we’ll be
working to elect progressives in St. Louis, NYC, Philly, Nashville,
Dallas, and more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8223?t=1032&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ]JOIN OUR ELECT PROGRESSIVES TEAM

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1033&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1034&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

It’s been a busy couple of weeks in our campaign with One Fair Wage to
raise wages state by state — and not leave tipped workers behind!

Our organizers and worker activists in NY, MD, CT, and IL, have been busy
rallying and lobbying lawmakers to make sure workers are paid a living
wage with tips on top!

The federal tipped minimum wage has been $2.13 for 32 years because of
corporate lobbying by groups like the National Restaurant Association.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1035&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

Last week, Our Revolution joined US Reps. Ro Khanna, Jan Schakowsky,
Debbie Dingell, and other progressive leaders in DC for a press event
calling out the National Restaurant Association.

Sens. Bernie Sanders, Jeff Merkley, Elizabeth Warren and others have also
stood with us demanding answers from the ‘Other NRA,’ which spent $25M in
workers’ food safety dues to lobby against wage increases.

That’s why we’re calling on all elected officials to reject dirty money
from the restaurant lobby.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1036&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

Call your Reps and demand they join Ro Khanna, Greg Casar, and the many
others who have already signed the pledge to reject NRA money.

Thanks to lobbying, the federal minimum wage has been stuck at $7.25/hr
for 14 years, and the federal tipped wage sits at just $2.13/hr since
1991!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8247?t=1037&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ]CALL YOUR REP!

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1038&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

Our Revolution and our coalition will rally on Wednesday for worker
meetings with legislators in Lansing, Michigan to raise the state minimum
wage and abolish the subminimum wage.

We'll be urging key legislators to take the pledge to reject campaign
contributions from the Michigan Restaurant Lobby or National Restaurant
Association — and engage in some hands-on activities.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8455?t=1039&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ]COME OUT IN MICHIGAN

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1040&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

Despite climate promises, the Biden Administration, unfortunately, doubled
down on dirty energy this week and approved the Willow Project for more
drilling in the fragile ecosystem of Alaska.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8479?t=1041&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ]TAG24 featured our call on all Democrats to represent the young voters
who delivered Biden’s victory and held off a red wave in the Midterms.

Now, they hope to resurrect Manchin’s Dirty Deal and fast-track fossil
fuel permitting. With your help, we defeated the Dirty Deal three times
last year and we can do it again.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8473?t=1042&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ]For more info, RSVP to join Our Revolution’s next National Organizing
Call with Greenpeace USA and US Rep. Jamie Raskin on Monday, March 27th!

★ ★ ★

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1043&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

LOCAL VICTORY! This week, Our Revolution New Jersey celebrated the passage
of another local resolution for Medicare For All — the 16th in the state
and 100+ nationwide!

Our activists were welcomed at the council hearing by Neptune Township
Mayor Keith Cafferty, who spoke out against medical debt and financial
barriers to health care as a human right.

“Medicare for All is a serious solution for an armada of serious
problems,” he said. “I’m proud that our Township Committee is joining the
effort to make it law.”

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1044&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

Our Revolution Harris County helped organize the Texas Grassroots Alliance
Summit this month, with 300+ groups coming together to lay the foundation
for 2025 legislative elections to reclaim Texas for Texans!

ORHC is led by LaTonya Whittington, founder of Cannabis Reform of Houston,
who built a team of volunteer phone bankers to mobilize Our Revolution
members to join the summit.

Folks also took a bus ride to Austin, TX to meet and organize with
progressive legislators like State Rep. Ron Reynolds.

★ ★ ★

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8417?t=1045&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ][IMG]

Join Our Revolution Ohio for a statewide meeting Wednesday with Protect
Choice Ohio Field Director Destinee Burse on how we can help pass an
abortion rights amendment in the state.

This week, the abortion rights amendment filed by Protect Choice Ohio was
certified by the Ohio Ballot Board! Now, our reproductive justice
coalition is gearing up to gather 40k signatures to get it on the ballot
by July 4th.

Also on the call, hear from Tara Mosley on her run for Akron Mayor and
Adrienne Hood for Columbus City Council, and learn about Shaker Heights
initiative for Fair Ticketing.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8454?t=1046&akid=4134%2E5885482%2Ea0J-oT ]RSVP FOR OHIO CALL

For $27 a month, you’ll receive all of these great gifts plus a tote bag — and at the $50 level, we’ll send you an official Our Revolution t-shirt, too. [ ]BECOME A MEMBER TODAY! ★ ★ ★ [ ][IMG] Half a million Americans go bankrupt every year from Medical Debt — a foreign concept to countries with single-payer healthcare. We’re compiling stories to bring pressure and we need folks to stand up and speak out! Even with a Republican-controlled US House, we can get action on our progressive priorities. Let’s take this shot to elect Brandon Johnson as mayor of the third-largest city in America. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Tell Congress: raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour or more!
body:
Quick letter to Congress
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa58d0ed-ebe8-4f27-9b05-67655d707710/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Living on the current federal minimum wage of $7.25 an hour is untenable. Congress has failed to raise it since 2009, leaving millions in poverty as the cost of living rises. Fifty-two million workers currently make less than $15 an hour in the U.S, including over 11 million single parents. Poverty wages harm women and people of color the most. According to the Bureau of Labor Statistics, nearly two-thirds of workers earning at or near the federal minimum wage are women, disproportionately Black and Latina women. Raising the minimum wage would reduce poverty, build economic security, and benefit workers. [**Workers don’t deserve to live in poverty. Tell your members of Congress: raise the minimum wage to at least $15 an hour now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25aac1c9-5929-4e05-a8a2-2925eb68f7f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa7e6daa-37d9-4795-8fe0-48651efe5f79/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/tell-congress-to-raise-the-minimum-wage?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tab714a80-e810-47eb-887e-ee8e45c7fd49/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

Donald J. Trump March 20th, 2023
** George Soros’ Hand-Picked Radical Left Democrat Prosecutor **

On May 8, 2021, a political action committee backed by billionaire George Soros, Color of Change, endorsed Bragg in the DA race and [ pledged ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9jsFuwyAQRL_GvmFhIBAOHJpGvUTttb2uWbBpMFg2TZS_L46qSqtZaXZ29JzppdJccH1ULZoD8z1tg2GUccqr0l4z0Ukle8T-iJ6C5YCNoOi2a_aYE0T8LuvPvHQ2z-1kBrCaCgAtwcFgvToMdGBAHUUtJddtNFMpy9bwl4a91bnlEtJ4n0J0QwR73XuqbXPMK8me2AnS6MgClriEed3cRiDeQiLDCuNIfI3NkCYoBRJBqL_tanC5hxjDJlWFHWcI8ckH8xKDf5hGnRrGpoBbXU8UdhGnrw95-bycyXsvHDnLg7jvV_ZatTwW9x_9a-nc3ru76vwLXGll-A) $1 million to support his election. According to [ public ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9TkFugzAQfA3cQPbarOHgQ1KUC2qv7dXx2uDWBAqkEb-viapKq9nV7GhmnOaoGiFFU6ucdAWeszxoYCCYSMh4A7JEhZyI1-SZscJQJhm59WvyNN1MpM9tuY9zaacxH7TggnyNHrCqgdBwzlQF0oEFqNRV5lEP2zavmThlcElDk_2-u2UvvbNlP_0kyvahuIZbuhIXxv4QikuqwxnyupGyQSkQIV80zY8QY1hRpVL9aEJ89jDjHIPfdabOGcAQaE3rGQmdPH-8YffetcUrl65osZKP4wsvCbd9dv_SP5fSHb4Hq9pfv11XJQ) filings, George Soros made a $1 million donation to Color of Change PAC on May 14.

In a 2022 [ WSJ op-ed ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9T0FuxCAMfE1yIwJCIDnk0O2ql1V7ba8UzIaUBAREaH9fsqoqWWN5xh6NYSZcTD3rp1G0eh6oIbi1M8W0x31FTCbKOi440ZqM2mCpeqkbhjWkH2-036XTa47HFjrlt3aZzSS1kHgcYGLMjBhGDoJO3wq4HOkgWjcvOYfU9C8NfatVSulKWs_zOsmYrXKQTmF5IIvSEYKPGUUwPm4oRJ9AHdnHhJwsCPZKK0holdZV1Sa_IxXtBijKDGg9UjUEFLw7mzl2bfc7IoQPExWCMdLGWYdinbOJi_rZfatOz2fkFpw1j7kRl4bSxeqaij5z0xu7fH3w2-ftit4JA3TlAyunSl8r5keA_9U_lw5O35MV11-HZnVe) , Soros admitted he has “supported the election (and more recently the re-election) of prosecutors” and soft-on-crime district attorneys.

** BRAGG’S SHADY PAST REMAINS A MYSTERY **

During his primary election, a woman made a “ [ disturbing allegation ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9T01vgzAM_TVwC8pXk-bAgRbtUm3X7RpwCFlDQBCG-u_nTtUk-1l-tp-eXc2UNkIKc9Yl1Cc-MFqGmlMuqECkzHBZKa0YADvDQG0vLBSSgtvu8wBzshG-87pPS9XPUzminrGmc9zIvuPSKmmHM3Si19gAE10Z6zHnZStEU_A3jOM4KrAhPiYEFKn2O7LJHRsWu-bQR0cYlYZSrZG6znFeyXW0yTuy7DE6ICdKCcUc9gQhedI2pIk_IZHLar3fSG-nxQafiMV1b3OYUzXmKZZrDcsRYgyb0viVf3mYSjyIYXjUhb4UnI8B0A3_88xv8vL1oW6ft5a8M-lIq07yeE75FTE_Fve_-lKp3FP3yer2Fy29cSw) ” against Bragg. She came forward to Color of Change. The PAC immediately halved its funding to Bragg and the allegation was never disclosed publicly.

Bragg hired a [ PR crisis-management team ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9T01vwyAM_TXJjQoIgeSQw7pql2q7bleKIWEjAQFt1X8_p5om28_y17NtJybV2IluHFQLU88do62fOOUd7RApG7k4SCUZABvAUW06DY2gYMtPdBA3HeC75uuaDiau7TI5S8EZTq1Rl4GN0gjTG1DUSdEPPZNtmJZaU2m6l4a_oW6PFEvdpzHAlRwdZQhMIehw8xu5ZD3PZLkCBFvI3deFpIwa0Wyt5LLojELizWZSoqskbsRkv1pyxS6dkanNE6S7D8EXqfCDedU-PI_WawrePaZGHRvOFw8F3fM-fhbHrw95_jyfyDsTlpxkL-57lb8i1key_61_LAe78-5ZdfoFIc9qiA) after taking office.

** BRAGG HAS BEEN ROUNDLY CRITICIZED FOR PROSECUTING INNOCENT VICTIMS AND BEING SOFT ON CAREER CRIMINALS **

In July 2022, Bragg [ dropped the disgraceful murder charge ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9TstuwyAQ_Br7RsTLEB84NI16idpre117sU2CDQLaKH9fHFWVVjPax8yONUzpXkjRH3WLpuMTo60znHJBRUXKei4PSiuGyI44URgFYCMp2nwLE4YNPF5L-l7jYQxruxjBO0ShFR17pEc2KDaOjCslRCcpH1jrzVJKzI14afhbre0RQy67ujb1Ja9EdQXWVwD_4zYyJJhnUgLBFCIZF0izzQRmcFsuZAhoZyD3kG42kWvIloAfoKrbZDDenfcuK11Tzys4_wwKa_RuephGnxrOF4e50jMTv8jT14e6fF7O5J1JS86qk_d9y18rlke0_6d_Lge7--5Tff4FooZkwA) against 61-year-old bodega worker Jose Alba for stabbing an ex-con in [ an act of self-defense ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9T01vgzAM_TVwC8oXAQ4c1lW7VNt1u5rYlLSBIJK16r9f6KZJ1rPsZz_7US9M0ymturYpsa_lKHjpesml4iojF53UlWmMQBQtjhysAiw0R4rXMGJYwOMlbd_zWtkwl1OPYPRoxwHbmgYrODctGWsRyIBUbV36fkppjYV6KeRbjuWxhpj27VzkkzIn3uzQPVnLhoB0BmY9bVd2CZEY-AFY2hwhS4HBLThkNizjFpYEyYWFpQkS87_85CKDbaOY2M0hhSxbbj2ud-e9i6bJds4zOP90APPq3fjoi-ZQSDk5jDk9n5Unffj6MKfP05G9C03saGp931n5mjE9Vvof_VOpaNfdu83xB8T8b_A) . Alba spent [ five days on Rikers Island ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9T8FugzAM_Rq4BSUhTeDAYV21S7Vdt6vBTkkJDUpSIf5-UE2TrGfp2X7vmTqhTVurum1Mid1JWsFL10kua17vyEUrVaWNFoiiQcthqAELxZHSFCyGB3i85_icl2oIczl2wio9NNyAFZorY6jRre31qUUShpQpfTfmvKSifivkx17rulZ5JATnt54g5UNo5x-0si3EiaFLObohM8g5xAdtDGNYEpufESmyYYR4I2ZDZPeQiIHvga1jYBYyeL-xlKHvCY9zGCaKZexwWZ33Lmmzv3Kbd-tXepgX7-zWFeZcSDk6THt7BZVXdf750tfv64V9CkXsok9qPabyfce8LfS_-qdS0aF7sObyC90LcX4) after being [ assaulted ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9jstugzAQRb8Gdo78ig0LL5JG3UTttt2OPUMgAYwwDeLva6Kq0uiM5nXnkhPG1kqrurIluqNsBC87J7lUXGVyUUt9MNYIRFFhwyEowEJzpPSIDcYRerwv888wHUIcytaFYFEbEqGuAijjwWOF0FDlBW9Aq7J37bJMqVCnQr7nGLcppmW_zkV-KXPiNkPwjGeHFFlq45pYBhu3wHxEugFb4_ygmd1jIga9BzbAxlp4EvNEI0sLeE-YNcrZ4bR2fd8lY7P32wBd_7ILw9R3zeYKey6kbDtMOb2cyas-f3-a69f1wj6EJnYxR73uU_mWuWwT_a_-qRxo19279vILCt9oxA) at his own convenience store.

Later in December 2022, Bragg declined to prosecute a [ woman, Tracy McCarter, who stabbed her husband ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9jkFvhCAQhX-N3jQwIKwHDrs1vZj22l7RAaUFNUJj_PfFTdNk8s3kzeTNM4oK2TLO2pssUTVgKSmdAgKMsExCW-C1kIIi0htaokemseAETfxeLa6L9viV9p-w1eMaylm1iLIZW32TwrYDNDhYSQkFOVhDDfDSqzmlLRbsXsBrruM46uVMLph4WWQl_4Xc6AVyYTl3M7l1yWMYR70ns1ejjqZCF4OL0WA17Hqa6jkFX-4Kt8N576KQOekUtPPPcDps3tlTFfJRAMwOY27PHNDzx-e76D_6rnqj3FSdaPhxbeElM52b-T_9c6nN5XupsvsF2aNh8w) to death.

[ Bragg freed without bail ](http://email.deskofdonaldjtrump.com/c/eJw9j8tugzAQRb8GdoP8wiYLFqQkm6hRpS7aLg0eghvzkDFF_H2dKqo0uiOdmbm6gyWV6sAFPxQqNWXOOkpSWzLCOOFRCT0wkUklqTG0MB3RLdcmEcTgcp86M43ame_g12HO2mlI-1JRpE2BJl4qkeeSSsFVJwTLRcNN0aSu7EOYl4RXCTvH2rYtM9q6fYgSTbL1HumI2xKb9sG2DoFSIgkRKqK6gsr92BGOXt9uUJ_Op2v9DgZbu9hpBI8O9YIQEEdo_Bq0czs0OgT0aOD69VZDO83ABPTT6pesD4NLfWnmzTpnF6nie7dnmCHVw-xst5eJOiaM9dbEWOwvPLuI4-dVXj4uNbxSgVDLXGyPKXuJGvYZ_1efLhk-fB9U1b9jWXNf) a 16-year-old boy who was filmed brutally assaulting and beating an NYPD cop.

Friend,

My friend and colleague, Sherrod Brown, is up for re-election in 2024, and as one of just three Senate Democrats in states that were won by President Trump, he’s one of the GOP’s top targets.

In fact, Sherrod already has a wealthy Republican opponent and the National Republican Senatorial Committee is already running attack ads against him.

NBC reports that Sherrod's race could be even nastier and more expensive than last year's Senate race in Ohio, which was one of the most expensive in the country, with over $200 million spent.

It's going to be his toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can help Sherrod win in Ohio. Sherrod wears a canary pin on his lapel – a reminder that workers used to take a canary with them into the coal mines. If the canary stopped singing, they knew they needed to get out fast. In Sherrod’s words, “They didn’t have a union strong enough or a government who cared enough to protect them.” The pin is a symbol of the **progress made on workers’ rights** and the **work still left to do.**

That includes raising wages, making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns, rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas, and ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by.

[**Sherrod needs us in this fight with him. It won’t be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, we know we can do this. I’m all in and I need you with me. Please split a contribution between our campaigns today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60463713/397219484/1447767374?refcode=em_fr_2023.03.20_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTc3ODI0OS01ZGM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7ket-Y0SujcnbPm6YQQFGzB1uCFHu5AnDsW1Jufb4pI=)

body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/p8HBetQZPUK1C9EVvbkZag2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p8HBetQZPUK1C9EVvbkZag2]Hey Peter,
Our children have had a rough go of it the last few years with the COVID-19 pandemic and its effect on our public schools. Between staff shortages and a lack of healthcare professionals, our children have been left behind. Their health and safety is critical, and during the pandemic, Republicans have blocked a bill that would help improve their access to a full-time nurse at school.
Wiley helped author a bill in the NC Senate that would place a nurse in every school in North Carolina. When our children need medical attention, parents should be able to trust on a nurse at school to provide it.
Sign Wiley’s petition today and call on legislators to fund a full-time position for a school nurse in every public school!! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p8HBetQZPUK1C9EVvbkZag2]
🏥SIGN NOW🏥 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p8HBetQZPUK1C9EVvbkZag2]
This bill has bipartisan public support. It’s time to get it done, and make sure our kids get the care they need.
Sign on today to call for a nurse in every public school! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p8HBetQZPUK1C9EVvbkZag2]
🏥SIGN NOW🏥 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p8HBetQZPUK1C9EVvbkZag2]
Thank you so much.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=15cef5050e3b497a91d8b63a6bd565c7&_e=H2pfDK1mFgilI8-hz7NQTOb59UttPmrqCpXeAnAVzemKwlIiBHt81NScmCAUt_PGhy3apq_GJFm20FdXsqlNViRq2GPlLyluCtEAVsbZX1VbxE82ETToht2ivPlUdfCqGqb0GSJMj1eBXriiRMqgtv0eWoLTyLhc2rG5RvZIRnFe3pmLyoy2kHszhELiFCejv7KxtfVqGvz5tndpKPKB3k6sEc4lMnncouyE3n0Vc8GKMqVZKWTpbFEV-j82yYsBfvBC4TBTqdeLfgQRFkKOUL9FA191VDNcjwcLvthSTVH9hCrWrE8LBg65dJVv0W7JHT26_iXndSw7vKnHFKzsGBnowcMrQY7XnsGsavL28qTTGCOrsbbjGxE---VCbqryf-HFK3mHuljG704cwoxaYg%3D%3D)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60464075/397220728/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGY0ZmQyMjYtNWVjNy1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=JW97AevMR5y6DVkR3V1WezNt9fPNr5gUqu-ogr8LmlI=)
---

Trump was banned from the site after _inciting an insurrection_ on January 6th, largely through the lies he spread online. **Under no circumstances should Donald Trump be allowed back on the platform, especially as he’s running for president again in 2024. ** We’re collecting signatures to tell YouTube: Do not allow Trump back on the site to spread lies and propaganda, and inflict further damage on our democracy! clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, during Women’s History Month, we are reminded of the tremendous inequities Black women face in our healthcare system. | In the United States, maternal mortality rates are three times higher for Black women than for white women. That’s nothing short of terrifying. The Michigan Momnibus proposal would aim to increase access to alternative birthing care like birthing centers and midwives while addressing systemic racism to improve healthcare for Black mothers and decrease Black maternal mortality rates. This is the kind of concrete action we want to see — no,need to see — across the board, at all levels of government. — The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Victory: Court Rejects Argument of Terrorist-Tied Qatar and Orders Release of Documents About Its Funding of Texas A&M
body:
Judicial Watch announced a victory recently in the District Court of Texas for Travis County where it filed a petition on behalf of its client Zachor Legal Institute under the Texas Public Information Act (TPIA), seeking information about potential influence by the Qatar government’s funding of certain Texas A&M; University programs and a Texas A&M; campus in Education City, Al Rayyan, Qatar.

| | |
---
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 20, 2023

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced a victory recently in the District Court of Texas for Travis County where it filed a petition on behalf of its client Zachor Legal Institute under the Texas Public Information Act (TPIA), seeking information about potential influence by the Qatar government’s funding of certain Texas A&M; University programs and a Texas A&M; campus in Education City, Al Rayyan, Qatar. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Mar 20, 2023 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced a victory recently in the District Court of Texas for Travis County where it filed a petition on behalf of its client Zachor Legal Institute under the Texas Public Information Act (TPIA), seeking information about potential influence by the Qatar government’s funding of certain Texas A&M; University programs and a Texas A&M; campus in Education City, Al Rayyan, Qatar. ---|--- | | | | | As part of the red carpet rollout for illegal immigrants the Biden administration is dedicating tens of millions of dollars to provide migrant youths with a multitude of services once they are released from government shelters. This includes medical, educational, legal and an array of other services. American taxpayers will also fund detailed home studies by deploying case managers to conduct intensive in-home engagements and virtual check-ins to ensure the safety and continued support for the young migrants and the families they have been released to. ---|--- | | | | | Federal Trade Commission document demands to Twitter obtained by the House Judiciary Committee show onerous requests for all documents about Elon Musk and documents concerning Twitter’s work with journalists to disclose to the public the details about the government’s and Twitter’s censorship of American citizens. ---|--- | | | | | The Biden administration has turned the southwest border into a meaningless line in the sand and little more than a speedbump for aliens flooding into the country, according to a scathing federal court order blasting the president’s controversial catch-and-release policy. Known as Parole Plus Alternative to Detention (Parole+ATD) the program released over a million illegal immigrants in the U.S. in a year, supposedly tracking them with technology and other tools. ---|--- | | | Judicial Watch The media is condemning officials in Republican-led states for withdrawing from a controversial data-sharing consortium that purports to help manage voter registration rolls and, not surprisingly, the news reports fail to tell the whole story. The system is known as the Electronic Registration Information Center (ERIC) and it claims to be an efficient and cost-effective mechanism for states to maintain accurate voter rolls. Judicial Watch In its appeal, Judicial Watch pointed out that the lower court was mistaken when it upheld the FBI’s Glomar response (neither confirming nor denying the existence of records) because the FBI previously acknowledged the existence of the records in multiple ways. For instance, court records filed in support of a criminal case include the FBI’s statement of facts that provides the defendant’s address, which was obtained through “his Bank of America account and recent Expedia transactions.” The Blaze Over 1 million inactive voters have been removed from the voter rolls in Los Angeles County, California, stemming from a lawsuit filed in 2017. In an effort to clean up voter rolls and prevent possible voter fraud, Judicial Watch, a conservative organization that promotes government transparency, sued Los Angeles County on behalf of legally registered voters. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2023, All Rights Reserved |

name: Team Veronica
subject: FAQ: "Where does my donation go after election season?"
body:
https://veronicaescobar.com/ [https://veronicaescobar.com/]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailwhyoffseason [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailwhyoffseason]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailwhyoffseason] VOLUNTEER [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4eXaaT5ow0KWI3DA8C_5sg2] SEND A NOTE [INFO@VERONICAESCOBAR.COM?subject=A%20Note%20for%20Team%20Veronica]
"Why does Veronica need donations outside of election season?"
It's a fair question, and we want to answer it.
Because Veronica's elected every two years, we're constantly campaigning, registering voters, and mentoring local students. Every action we take helps keep people engaged with the Democratic Party.
Here are a few programs that your continued support helps us fund year-round:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailwhyoffseason [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailwhyoffseason] Our summer fellowship program
For the third year in a row, we'll be hiring summer interns to join us as Frontera Fellows.
And we say "hiring" because we believe that students should be paid for their valued time in our program. No unpaid internships here.
Donations made now will go toward funding our 2023 fellowship program.
Daniela, pictured here, was a 2021 Frontera Fellow who went on to complete an additional internship at the White House this winter!
Donation options:
Support our Summer Fellowship [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dc_fellowship]
"I'd run for office one day, but I don't know where to start."
That's the #1 response we receive when we ask why students are applying to our fellowship. Which is why our summer program coaches young El Pasoans on every aspect of campaigning. They learn fundraising, messaging, how to debate, media preparedness, which offices control what, and much more.
We believe showing young El Pasoans a pathway into politics will provide our community with eager, new candidates in the future.
Your donations help sustain this opportunity for our youth.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailwhyoffseason [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailwhyoffseason] Voter registration
Last cycle, Veronica's campaign registered more than 3,000 new El Paso voters.
>From paying coordinators to printing registration materials, registering new voters can really add up.
But your donations helped fund our program which saw great response in our community!
SUPPORT VERONICA
Donate to Support Veronica [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailoffseasondonations]
Become a MONTHLY donor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailwhyoffseason&recurring=1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailwhyoffseason [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailwhyoffseason] Fundraising costs
It's no secret that raising money is hard, but it's also costly. From computer programs, to paying our campaign staff, to traveling to events across the nation, the expenses of fundraising are substantial.
Your donations make sure Veronica has the resources and team she needs to not only raise the funds to win her own race, but to help her support other great Democrats, too!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailwhyoffseason [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailwhyoffseason] Helping us plan ahead
Early donations help us plan ahead, long before election season. With early contributions, we can:
*
Connect
with
voters
months
in
advance,
*
Build
programs
like
voter
hotlines
*
Send
information
on
recent
voting
changes,

*
Educate
newly-registered
voters,
*
Combat
GOP
misinformation,
*
Make
sure
people
in
our
community
are
being
heard.
It's a year-round job!
The truth is, every day is "election season" for Team Veronica, because we're working year-round to build strong connections with our voters and our community. Your contributions help make that happen.
And that's why we need your support now AND during election season.
SUPPORT VERONICA
Donate to Support Veronica [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailoffseasondonations]
Become a MONTHLY donor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/veronica-escobar-for-congress-1?refcode=emailwhyoffseason&recurring=1]

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Elissa was just endorsed by ECU!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Voters need to know that their elected leaders are working on their behalf, not looking to enrich themselves.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=60%2E135344%2E-MjIo4)
Friend —
**We wanted you to be one of the first to know that Elissa was just endorsed by End Citizens United,** an organization working to fix our democracy by getting big money out of politics.
When citizens think our government works for big business and the wealthy instead of normal families, it’s a threat to our democracy.
In Congress, Elissa has worked on changing that — both in legislation, but also in how she conducts her own campaign: She’s fought for legislation to ban corporate PACs altogether, to block members of Congress from trading stocks, and to require members to disclose any cryptocurrency holdings.
Voters need to know that their elected leaders are working on their behalf, not looking to enrich themselves or cater to special interests. Cleaning up politics will continue to be a top priority for Elissa in the Senate, and we are proud to have ECU’s support along the way.
[If you’d like to support our campaign and help us fight back against the dark money special interest groups who will stop at nothing to defeat us, consider chipping in $3 today.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-mar23.udOA3N&refcode=em230320-1-30&t=2&akid=60%2E135344%2E-MjIo4)
