name: Greg Steube
subject: Join the mission
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Steube for Congress
body:
I know firsthand that America is the greatest beacon of freedom and liberty in the history of mankind, and our U.S. Armed Forces provide the greatest defense of these values that are revered around the world. | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=db8c94a0612447a189b3f1f6904f69fb&_e=wF8GvIDAYIUhPOx4GUNNLJnbxetYmS1dty4XZV6y6oHKh1wbVqBJatrJ8naO_uaPTqyiqJTTiwktoF3Qnvt1po_QhmtTHrIDg_Bv56IGvaCYrHwjbkNAvZQzOtoo3dNmJQD6gF6hIEs9_1ZvnarCwVZdoS6zfOCbMPZgybyWeT-Cpv9N3bfoD3QW1h5sbTWDjqfTFrZVi562jC-8w4L5LeuLcfbvTBhUWV4u_FK8R1nwb9mllFw3oPPasMDngX9OwGEeftWSJJer3V72l0ivZCG56u7pbiAqcoqC39q4mLHNYXiBS5OhPP4yj0Vnovzc8dPnUAfHcV-nT3SnZP7oQydSmbwXS9Cyx9UMBPTz8sZI4ZScvToefzWA4z6HnsRDVPZmg3rR06c4fTCPwWl3Wg%3D%3D)
---
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Greg Steube, I am a retired Army Airborne Infantry Officer and a retired JAG Corps Officer, a strong Republican, husband, father, and most importantly, a proud American.

After the attacks on September 11th, I answered the call to serve my country in the war on terror.

After seeing Democrats' socialist plans for America, I decided to run for office because I knew I had to serve our country again.

I believe in freedom, and I believe America is the greatest country in the world. [**I’m on a mission to protect our country from the woke Democrats who _hate America._**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=db8c94a0612447a189b3f1f6904f69fb&_e=wF8GvIDAYIUhPOx4GUNNLJnbxetYmS1dty4XZV6y6oHKh1wbVqBJatrJ8naO_uaPTqyiqJTTiwktoF3Qnvt1po_QhmtTHrIDg_Bv56IGvaCYrHwjbkNAvZQzOtoo3dNmJQD6gF6hIEs9_1ZvnarCwVZdoS6zfOCbMPZgybyWeT-Cpv9N3bfoD3QW1h5sbTWDjqfTFrZVi562jC-8w4L5LeuLcfbvTBhUWV4u_FK8R1nIFrbSMYaEnQp48EqTjXbZlJvdhpaxqNnCR3paCjxp_ebqocZy2O7SuqmfRbuY8GGGn5-PAQcf6l0db6Ia2IsbUXLi5bp-sBwlHObu3DYRZbwYRSxi0hcKoUJPQBQyek4QwbGHQIUR5ugZVGsrifPALFdLtVzb26MsP3ZrALdGnA%3D%3D)

| [**ENLIST WITH GREG ››**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=db8c94a0612447a189b3f1f6904f69fb&_e=wF8GvIDAYIUhPOx4GUNNLJnbxetYmS1dty4XZV6y6oHKh1wbVqBJatrJ8naO_uaPTqyiqJTTiwktoF3Qnvt1po_QhmtTHrIDg_Bv56IGvaCYrHwjbkNAvZQzOtoo3dNmJQD6gF6hIEs9_1ZvnarCwVZdoS6zfOCbMPZgybyWeT-Cpv9N3bfoD3QW1h5sbTWDjqfTFrZVi562jC-8w4L5LeuLcfbvTBhUWV4u_FK8R1kf_OV8C4oMJCDkUUfkfw56oNJuUtbjQ9r6mtXzPNOPG5O6jYC4y4lYPFHUl7vcqKXM7E01DhsJXrxpoQLKFXQwe10MgDjUxyUeZ_GRwPwTNukVUHS729yPGCSpWgck8-oNzT5ped5ePVeT8-t4_Jzf8dz2jW0DN1FrbYY3BFO3Ug%3D%3D)
---

I know firsthand that America is the greatest beacon of freedom and liberty in the history of mankind, and our U.S. Armed Forces provide the greatest defense of these values that are revered around the world.

Which is why I am assembling a team of grassroots conservatives to join this fight. As a veteran running for re-election, I know it is not Democrat versus Republican, **but right versus wrong.**

[**Can I count on you to be on the winning side of the fight for freedom and follow me into battle today?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=db8c94a0612447a189b3f1f6904f69fb&_e=wF8GvIDAYIUhPOx4GUNNLJnbxetYmS1dty4XZV6y6oHKh1wbVqBJatrJ8naO_uaPTqyiqJTTiwktoF3Qnvt1po_QhmtTHrIDg_Bv56IGvaCYrHwjbkNAvZQzOtoo3dNmJQD6gF6hIEs9_1ZvnarCwVZdoS6zfOCbMPZgybyWeT-Cpv9N3bfoD3QW1h5sbTWDjqfTFrZVi562jC-8w4L5LeuLcfbvTBhUWV4u_FK8R1melU4ix9mlPJ_Vj3nmYHSArJto_XMjfYNK8yVWPCj0YqYAV019LMFDxSyshdm7w0ej-dV0B_ysblxCvWNL9P6tJbBm27SHwRB5k4PZ0vU2dEld1c1BJjB2IJ76P6D8oYQUbCTm8sT5Yg2JFRI76odhHx-HEQzYtQc2GbEbg0M1-A%3D%3D)

My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60465090/397223915/1718186796?refcode=EM_FR_230320clarksplit_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGNlYWEyYy02MmM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rxTAROPYAdCZv8nVOkugxDJI0SoRWb3BbLZ8OopUTus=) Happy Women’s History Month!

My name is Katherine Clark, and I proudly serve Massachusetts’ 5th district in Congress. I am also in House leadership serving as the Democratic Whip.

When I first came to Congress in 2013, there weren’t many women serving alongside me. Multiple times, I was stopped and mistaken for someone’s spouse, and I had a hard time even getting into the Chamber.

Thankfully, walking through the halls of Congress in 2023 is much different. **There are more women serving in Congress than ever before — 93 women in the House Democratic Caucus alone!**

I’ve been adamant about helping elect more women to Congress, because the truth is that for generations, we’ve failed to address the persistent challenges faced by women, especially by women of color.

**And with MAGA extremists in the House majority threatening to take us back even further, the stakes of our work couldn’t be higher.**

**[That’s why I’m writing to you today. We need strong women in Congress, and I’m asking you to support that effort by splitting a contribution between my campaign and Marcy Kaptur to elect more women into ** Effective leadership isn’t about individual ambition. It’s about our collective good.

Lifting up others is a core value of mine — I strongly believe that when we elect more women to positions of power, we _all_ do better.

**Together, Marcy Kaptur and I will continue the fight for gender equity and women’s rights, and with your support, elect even more candidates who are committed to building the kind of country and future that our daughters deserve.**

**[So please, if you can afford to, split a contribution today between my campaign and Marcy Kaptur and help us fulfill the country’s promise of equality and opportunity for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60465179/397224023/1718186796?refcode=EM_FR_230320clarksplit_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGNlYWEyYy02MmM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rxTAROPYAdCZv8nVOkugxDJI0SoRWb3BbLZ8OopUTus=)**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Can I have a moment to explain?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1969%2E5257348%2EPS-IqU ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek,

Can I have a moment of your Monday to explain what’s going on right now?

About two months ago on January 26th, I launched our campaign for
California’s Senate seat. It wasn’t an easy decision. I’ve proudly served
Californians in Congress for more than two decades — fighting to pass
progressive legislation and defend our democracy.

After long nights of weighing it and talking with Eve, I ultimately
stepped up to the plate for one reason: Many of the fights for our
democracy in the next several years will be fought in the U.S. Senate.

Abolishing the filibuster.

Filling Supreme Court vacancies.

Certifying the results of the next election.

These fights — and so many more — will be taking place on the floor of the
Senate. It’s critical that we elect a Senator who believes that right
matters. That truth matters. And that our democracy matters.

I’ve been on the frontline of the fight for the heart and soul of our
democracy. And always will be. Our work isn’t over — so I’m committed to
taking our fight straight to the Senate.

I’ve relied on this grassroots team from the very beginning. Your
donations, even just $5 or $10 at a time, help power our work to hold
Donald Trump and every single one of his far-right enablers accountable.
And it’s only going to get more serious from here.

We’re approaching our first end-of-quarter deadline since launching this
campaign for Senate, and it’s important we report the strongest numbers to
the FEC. I’m counting on a groundswell of grassroots support before that
important deadline.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1561?c0=mar2023_abs_em.dt2mVY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1969%2E5257348%2EPS-IqU ]Will you pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help continue our fight to
defend democracy? It’s time we take our fight to the halls of the U.S.
Senate:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek, Can I have a moment of your Monday to explain what’s going on right now? About two months ago on January 26th, I launched our campaign for California’s Senate seat. It wasn’t an easy decision. I’ve proudly served Californians in Congress for more than two decades — fighting to pass progressive legislation and defend our democracy. After long nights of weighing it and talking with Eve, I ultimately stepped up to the plate for one reason: Many of the fights for our democracy in the next several years will be fought in the U.S. Senate. Abolishing the filibuster. Filling Supreme Court vacancies. Certifying the results of the next election. These fights — and so many more — will be taking place on the floor of the Senate. It’s critical that we elect a Senator who believes that right matters. That truth matters. And that our democracy matters. I’ve been on the frontline of the fight for the heart and soul of our democracy. And always will be. Our work isn’t over — so I’m committed to taking our fight straight to the Senate. I’ve relied on this grassroots team from the very beginning. Your donations, even just $5 or $10 at a time, help power our work to hold Donald Trump and every single one of his far-right enablers accountable. And it’s only going to get more serious from here. We’re approaching our first end-of-quarter deadline since launching this campaign for Senate, and it’s important we report the strongest numbers to the FEC. I’m counting on a groundswell of grassroots support before that important deadline. [ ]Will you pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help continue our fight to defend democracy? It’s time we take our fight to the halls of the U.S. Senate: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $3 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Thank you, — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 150 E. body:
Grassroots supporters like you are going to be the backbone of this campaign
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=3%2E1163%2EGFWK83)
We'll get right to the point:
**[We're reaching out to ask you if you'll please personally endorse Lateefah Simon for Congress today.](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/email_20230320_endorsement?source=em20230320&t=2&akid=3%2E1163%2EGFWK83)**
Whether you've been a long-time supporter of Lateefah or you're new to this movement, **we're going to need your support to win this election and send Lateefah to Congress.**
Grassroots supporters like you are going to be the backbone of this campaign. From knocking on doors and making phone calls to spreading the word to your friends, loved ones, and neighbors, the _only_ way we win this is by assembling a powerful, diverse, active movement.
In fact, we launched this campaign early because we knew we needed to start organizing as large of a movement as possible.
**[You can be an even bigger part of that movement by making a personal endorsement of Lateefah Simon for Congress today.](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/email_20230320_endorsement?source=em20230320&t=3&akid=3%2E1163%2EGFWK83)**
**[Endorse Lateefah »](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/email_20230320_endorsement?source=em20230320&t=4&akid=3%2E1163%2EGFWK83)**
Thank you for signing on,
Team Lateefah

* * *

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Why I’m running for re-election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=69%2E35263%2EQaLxXz ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

Aloha Peter,

I want you to be the first to know: I’m officially running for re-election
to continue fighting for our working families, our planet, and our future
in the U.S. Senate.

In just a moment, I’m going to share my story and explain why your support
today is so important. But first, will you become a Founding Donor to my
re-election campaign and split a $10 donation between Tammy Baldwin and me
to protect our razor-thin Senate majority?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Mazie Hirono and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-hirono.fCYWQL&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=69%2E35263%2EQaLxXz ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-hirono.wdAxGy&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=69%2E35263%2EQaLxXz ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-hirono.oa3M00&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&t=1006&akid=69%2E35263%2EQaLxXz ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-hirono.chVhy6&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=69%2E35263%2EQaLxXz ]CHIP IN $100 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2158?c0=tbe-em-hirono.SOhFyZ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=69%2E35263%2EQaLxXz ]CHIP IN $250 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-hirono.I7KPqs&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=69%2E35263%2EQaLxXz ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

I spent formative years of my life on my grandparents’ rice farm in
Fukushima, Japan. When I was eight years old, my mother made the
courageous decision to escape her abusive marriage and bring me and my
brothers to the United States to pursue a better life for us. When we
arrived, my mother worked low wage jobs with no health benefits.

I worried that we would lose everything if my mother ever fell ill, even
if just to stay home sick for a day. It wasn’t until she got a good paying
union job that we experienced a level of security.

My mother’s perseverance inspired me to fight for dignity and justice for
all people. As a student at the University of Hawaii, I joined fellow
student activists to protest the Vietnam War — and that experience showed
me that to create real change, ordinary people must have a seat at the
table.

That’s what led me to public service, and eventually to the U.S. Senate. I
fight everyday for legislation that will lift children and families out of
poverty, secure our free and fair elections, and defend reproductive
rights — critical Democratic priorities that will deliver for the American
people.

Peter, I’ve said for a long time: the battles we previously
won, don’t stay won — eternal vigilance is required. I’m running for
re-election because when the extreme, right-wing, ideologically driven
Supreme Court supermajority overturned Roe v. Wade, they drove that lesson
home.

Democrats have 23 Senate seats to defend in 2024, including mine. Whether
it’s codifying abortion rights, staving off the worst effects of climate
change, or ending the entirely preventable gun violence epidemic that is
now the leading cause of death for American children, if we lose our
Senate majority, these battles become harder than ever.

That’s why I need you with me in this fight, Peter. Will you
split a donation of $10 or any amount between my campaign and Tammy’s? My
work has always been made stronger by grassroots supporters like you and
I’d be honored to have your support today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Mazie Hirono and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-hirono.fCYWQL&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=69%2E35263%2EQaLxXz ]CHIP IN $10 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-hirono.wdAxGy&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=69%2E35263%2EQaLxXz ]CHIP IN $25 NOW

[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-hirono.oa3M00&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=69%2E35263%2EQaLxXz ]CHIP IN $50 NOW

Thank you for staying the course with me.

Mahalo,

Mazie

subject: Sinema voted to rollback oversight on big banks and got $$$
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
If Sinema wants a cause for the SVB crash, she should look in the mirror | |
---
Peter – Kyrsten Sinema has been consistent about one thing throughout her political career: **she puts her Wall Street and corporate donors first.** The collapse of Silicon Valley Bank last week has some lawmakers beginning to raise questions about what could have been done to avoid the second-largest failure of a financial institution in US history. But if Kyrsten Sinema wants answers, she should look in the mirror. Of course, when bank lobbyists came calling, Sinema sprang into action to roll back bank regulations that were put in place after the 2008 financial crisis. clean_body: If Sinema wants a cause for the SVB crash, she should look in the mirror | | Peter – Kyrsten Sinema has been consistent about one thing throughout her political career: she puts her Wall Street and corporate donors first. The collapse of Silicon Valley Bank last week has some lawmakers beginning to raise questions about what could have been done to avoid the second-largest failure of a financial institution in US history. But if Kyrsten Sinema wants answers, she should look in the mirror. Of course, when bank lobbyists came calling, Sinema sprang into action to roll back bank regulations that were put in place after the 2008 financial crisis. And of course, she was handsomely rewarded with over $500,000 in donations from commercial banks. If Sinema wants answers about the cause of the SVB crash, she should look in the mirror. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Most relevant to the SVB collapse, Sinema voted with Republicans to pass a bill which a financial watchdog group said “weakens important regulatory protections.” She also sponsored and voted for two bills that preceded this legislation and threatened to weaken Dodd-Frank and oversight on large banks. We’re preparing a blitz of ads to make sure every Arizonan knows Sinema is only looking out for the donors who fund her campaigns, not the everyday Arizonans who got her elected. Arizona deserves so much better, and that’s why we’re doing everything we can to make sure Sinema’s first term in the Senate is also her last. ** ** -Replace Sinema PAC & Change for Arizona 2024 Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC. | | Sent via . | Arizona Republicans are going too far in their interference in our state's education – **here are just a few of the dangerous proposals they’ve made:**

* A bathroom bill aimed at targeting transgender students.
* A bill that would lead to books Arizona Republicans deem "inappropriate" being banned.
* Another bill would ban what they consider "critical race theory."
* And a bill that would require gun safety training for students.

**None of these bills are aimed at improving a student's education.** If we want to stop Arizona Republicans from making more outrageous proposals like these, _we must step up and flip their seats._

**[That's why we need your grassroots support in getting more Democrats elected up and down the ballot in Arizona. Republicans need to be stopped, and you can help us do that. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Biden was never on our side
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last week, the Biden administration approved the $8 billion Willow oil
project on federally-owned land in Alaska, leaving many confused how a
Democrat could do something so detrimental to the fight against climate
change.

We’re disappointed, but we’re not surprised — Biden was never on our side
to begin with. Take a look at this headline from Counter Punch:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131921?refcode=em20230320-28081&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28081%2E1203867%2E92WqoZ ][IMG]

Joe Biden is an establishment Democrat — he’s not a progressive, and we
can’t expect him to be. We have to work to bring more progressives to
Congress who will fight non-stop for our values and put pressure on the
establishment to do the right thing.

It’s our job to keep pushing relentlessly to transform the Democratic
Party, and recruit and elect real progressives to Congress who will fight
for climate justice.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131921?refcode=em20230320-28081&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=28081%2E1203867%2E92WqoZ ]Will you rush a $3 contribution right now to help us
recruit the next slate of Justice Democrats who will fight against climate
change and the corporations behind it?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131921?refcode=em20230320-28081&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=28081%2E1203867%2E92WqoZ ]Contribute $3

Joe Biden and the Democratic Party have claimed that they are fully
committed to fighting for the climate, but what are they really doing
about it?

As long as the Democratic Party accepts massive donations from the fossil
fuel lobby and Wall Street firms that profit from oil and gas, we’re not
going to see the big changes we need to address the climate crisis.

Instead of exploiting our natural resources, we need leaders who will take
historic action to address the climate crisis, like enacting the Green New
Deal.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131921?refcode=em20230320-28081&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=28081%2E1203867%2E92WqoZ ]Contribute $3 today to help us expand the Squad and
elect more leaders who will fight the climate crisis — we’re relying on
your support to fight back against fossil fuel executives and corporate
Democrats.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/131921?refcode=em20230320-28081&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=28081%2E1203867%2E92WqoZ ]Contribute $3Thank you for being on our
side, Peter.

In solidarity,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=28081%2E1203867%2E92WqoZ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=28081%2E1203867%2E92WqoZ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230320-28081-footer&t=1026&refcode2=28081_1203867_92WqoZ&akid=28081%2E1203867%2E92WqoZ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=28081%2E1203867%2E92WqoZ

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Women’s History Month
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60466773/397228658/-972986530?refcode=fl_email_na_20230320whm_gv_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MThhNTc2Zi02N2M3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l9z3ipbWppgEok9wVV3lWHTp5eQXwj8y-Ku0q-czaqY=)
---
Hi friends, March is **Women’s History Month** , a time to honor and celebrate the accomplishments and contributions of women all over the world, past and present. I would not be where I am today without the hard work, love, and support of the strong women who came before me and helped shape who I am.
_My mother, Hortencia Bañuelos, myself, and my brother._ Growing up as a first generation Mexican American, my mother taught me the value of hard work. I spent much of my childhood watching her and my tias working in my abuelo’s TV repair shop, where they fixed TVs and microwaves to put food on the table. As one of ten children, my mom was the first in our family to graduate from college, and worked her way up to have a successful career in finance. She inspired me to work hard, follow my dreams, and serve others.
_My mom and me last year._ It should go without saying that women deserve the same economic opportunities and rights afforded to men — yet in 2023, they are still fighting for them as far-right extremists continue to push their backward agenda, including reversing Roe v. Wade last year and attacking reproductive choice in legislatures across the country. Now that I’m in Congress, I’m keeping my promise to fight for the rights and opportunities of women in NM-02 by voting for greater protections for reproductive care, equal pay, paid family leave, affordable and accessible childcare, and more. For example, I voted for the Paycheck Fairness Act, which would help close the gender pay gap and protect women as they re-enter the workforce. Thank you for getting me here, and happy Women’s History Month! Let’s keep up the fight. — Gabe
---
| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.

name: Erin Van Natta
subject: Join Don Jr. and Joe Kent! (+ Update on Matt Gaetz, Raheem Events)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Friend,

Exciting news! We are happy to announce that Donald Trump Jr. will be hosting Joe at a special reception in Palm Beach on Thursday, March 30.
We can also share that we've expanded the venue for our Matt Gaetz event this Thursday so we are able to lower ticket prices to $250.
Please get your tickets for these upcoming events while they're still available:
**RECEPTION WITH MATT GAETZ IN DOWNTOWN DC**
Thursday, March 22, 6 PM - 8:30 PM.
Host Committee Members invited to a private luncheon.
[https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Gaetz](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/h5892eqv7630amAQnlGHDZ763bKA/hU8iqeekJaXBmGcOx2icpg)
**RECEPTION WITH RAHEEM KASSAM IN CHEHALIS WA**
Saturday, March 24, 5 PM - 7 PM.
_VIP ticket holders and above can attend a meal and private reception at 4 PM. _
[https://JoeKentforCongress.com/Raheem](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/0wysMC09kjF7YzvW5iXilA/hU8iqeekJaXBmGcOx2icpg)
**RECEPTION WITH DONALD TRUMP JR. IN PALM BEACH FL**
Thursday, March 30, 6 PM - 8 PM.
_Event chairs will receive a private briefing at 5:30 PM. _
[https://JoeKentforCongress.com/PalmBeach](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/fn6WgEG8892u0PvhAJue0uhA/hU8iqeekJaXBmGcOx2icpg)
America First Patriots around the country are rallying to support Joe. Even if you can't make one of these events, you can still support the campaign at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/Z0WoVmIQXa6iQ0NR763yLVQQ/hU8iqeekJaXBmGcOx2icpg).
Thank You,
Erin Van Natta

Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund

clean_body: “Intensely negative sentiment is building towards the Senator as 39 percent hold strongly unfavorable views of him compared to just 26 percent who are strongly favorable.” Peter, Last month, Josh Hawley told his top donors that our U.S. Senate race is going to be “one of the closest in America” — and today, a new poll proves he’s right. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: After proving himself a fraud + a coward on January 6th and failing Missourians in the U.S. Senate, Josh Hawley is one of the most unpopular Republican senators up for re-election in 2024 — and the entire GOP knows it. That’s why Hawley had insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee launch one of their very first attack ads this cycle against Lucas Kunce. And it’s why Tucker Carlson tried to give Hawley cover for running away from the Capitol on January 6th on his cable news show earlier this month. They know that as a 13-year Marine veteran and proven warrior for working people, Lucas has what it takes to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat — and they’ll do whatever they can between now and Election Day to tear down the movement we’re building behind him. Joe Biden issued the first veto of his presidency, preventing a bipartisan resolution that would undo his extreme "woke" ESG rule from going into effect.| | | |

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=faf29bbef69546ad9d36e5f5cfd4a6ac&_e=SHoDYyDbfZSsfeaN422kA_oDZiSrM8kcri6hcIdp42oMYu0hWFiXJUXF4g-l5w1lRe3Uz9SzDvXRRKamf_Thgj2Hk3QrG34n0LrpfPKYDOvHCOO8PjTT1AeoOPhrhLt4hXwVwk48bS5LoAVyIr1h5LBOqn84Ou71bXRcxku7mQQCcHgvq1uihPn-gYRgshg6LDlb04oQzYibZVCL4gwJbrRbsbHVVkpqGc9k_aOU1i3snuh8y6hBWKA2VjHDUtdTY-i3rE-VSI5pR2oimHFNJ0d4J_ZEPDnk5a05nkDib77zJdW0T-9nvD-iQp0t2RM0pXdDUsD7q6droEMwq8qPuGR17bHLQ7GO7-jMsohsIa8%3D)

Peter, Joe Biden issued the first veto of his presidency, preventing a bipartisan resolution that would undo his extreme "woke" ESG rule from going into effect. #
---
Folks — Can we be blunt? Our first FEC deadline of the year is next week, and we’re falling behind where we need for our fundraising goals. [**We need 8 more donations from your area before midnight tonight to catch up. Will you activate your $6 donation now to help keep CO-06 blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60467683/397231305/-1998118215?amount=6&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjkzNDljNS02YWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=umQoshvkztg_OnvxEIMBgksrRygwRaKzX5IUXE4rBZU=) | [DONATE $6](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60467684/397231306/-1998118215?amount=6&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjkzNDljNS02YWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=umQoshvkztg_OnvxEIMBgksrRygwRaKzX5IUXE4rBZU=)

If you need a little more convincing, please give us a chance to explain why this deadline is so important:
We’re required by the Federal Election Commission to report our latest fundraising numbers every three months. That next fundraising date is on March 31st.
Those numbers are then released to the public, where everybody — pundits, potential opponents, and even right-wing billionaires — will scour for any sign of weakness.
If they don’t think we have a strong grassroots team behind us, they could pour millions to try and flip Colorado red. We need to show that we have the momentum to keep Jason fighting for our values.
**This is the first end-of-quarter deadline since Republicans took over the House majority, so it’s important we start off on the right foot.**
[**Before midnight tonight, add a donation of $6 or more to help Jason continue his work in the halls of Congress:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60467685/397231307/-1998118215?amount=6&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230320_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjkzNDljNS02YWM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=umQoshvkztg_OnvxEIMBgksrRygwRaKzX5IUXE4rBZU=)

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60467870/397232119/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2RmZTg4OS02YmM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zJbzMFfjBZirtMf_OzF6mAcXBegiWT_kqdQlcDLTE4M=&emci=d0e1a970-62c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=17dfe889-6bc7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9636579)

clean_body: Protect our Second Amendment >> | 🚨 CONSTITUTIONAL RIGHTS ALERT On Tuesday, Biden announced a new executive order “with the goal of increasing the number of background checks conducted before firearm sales, moving the U.S. as close to universal background checks as possible without additional legislation.” | Biden is attempting to bypass Congress in an effort to take away our Constitutional Rights. The Executive Order will increase the use of “red flag” laws and “hold the gun industry accountable.” We all know what that means: Biden is going after our Second Amendment and after every single law-abiding, gun-owning American. We have no time to waste. We can’t let the government take away our rights. Thanks for being in this fight. — Constitution Alerts If you have stored your payment information with WinRed, your donation will process immediately. | ---|--- | - | | Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

I was born in Peoria, Illinois. Growing up, my parents taught me the value of family, community, and service to others. **My grandpa, a union painter, and my grandma, a public school teacher, are the reason I’ve spent my entire career fighting for other hardworking people like them.**

As a labor activist, I’ve fought for firefighters, grocery store workers, and meat packers, and I helped lead the charge to pass a $15 minimum wage in Illinois. I saw Illinois working families were struggling, and that’s why I ran for Congress – to make sure their voices were heard.

**We fought tooth-and-nail to flip Illinois’ 13th district blue in 2022, but our work has only just begun.** Now that this is a Frontline race, the GOP and their dark money PACs will be coming for me with everything they’ve got. And I need your help to make sure I can continue fighting for working families in Congress.

**We beat the odds last election, and I know we can do it again – but only if we have the full strength of our grassroots team behind us.** [**That’s why I’m asking: Will you pitch in $3, $10, or more today so I can continue to advocate for working families in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60468360/397233887/-1547163637?amount=3&refcode=em_fr_2023.03.20_b1_nb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGExZjBhMC02ZGM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Xe9bvpdCpHlS0ts1LkO1Oc3mAsj0W0FxHuvtNUgY5PY=)

Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. Most recently, Nikki served in President Biden's administration in the office that implemented the American Rescue Plan.

Nikki believes in the American Dream and will bring people together to level the playing field and rebuild the middle class so families have a shot to get ahead.

| | Derek, have you heard the news? **Republicans in the Virginia House of Delegates recently rejected a proposal to remove outdated language prohibiting gay marriage from the state constitution.** This is a huge setback in our fight for equality and justice for all Virginians. Let’s make one thing clear: Senator Warner supports protecting marriage equality for all. A key step towards defending LGBTQ+ equality in Virginia is taking back the General Assembly. That’s why Senator Warner is working around the clock to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this November. But in order to get the GOP out and make sure that this outdated language is removed once and for all, we need your help. **_[**Will you pitch in $5 right now to support Senator Warner’s work to help Democrats take back control of the House of Delegates?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60468344/397233784/-946847682?refcode=mw_em_230320_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2JiOWY3ZC02ZGM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bDgPZkqg4HblnIHyNpug6uzCPgx5PM6n0cj5eXZl8RA=)_** Let’s show the GOP it’s time for Virginia to catch up with the rest of the country and remove this archaic and discriminatory language from our state constitution. **_[**Can you contribute anything you can afford to join us in this fight to support LGBTQ+ rights here in Virginia?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60468345/397233785/-946847682?refcode=mw_em_230320_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2JiOWY3ZC02ZGM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bDgPZkqg4HblnIHyNpug6uzCPgx5PM6n0cj5eXZl8RA=)_** clean_body: to ensure equality for the LGBTQ+ community | | | Derek, have you heard the news? Republicans in the Virginia House of Delegates recently rejected a proposal to remove outdated language prohibiting gay marriage from the state constitution. This is a huge setback in our fight for equality and justice for all Virginians. Let’s make one thing clear: Senator Warner supports protecting marriage equality for all. A key step towards defending LGBTQ+ equality in Virginia is taking back the General Assembly. That’s why Senator Warner is working around the clock to elect Democrats up and down the ballot this November. But in order to get the GOP out and make sure that this outdated language is removed once and for all, we need your help. = Let’s show the GOP it’s time for Virginia to catch up with the rest of the country and remove this archaic and discriminatory language from our state constitution. = Together, we can tell Republicans in the Commonwealth that we will not stand for discrimination against anyone. Thank you, Team Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/42173?t=6&akid=6750%2E878179%2EtwF83B) Hey folks, — James Carville here. Jon Tester just launched his reelection campaign and I can already tell this race is going to be NUTS!!

We already know the Senate majority will come down to Montana – and if we don’t keep Jon Tester in the Senate, **Democrats can kiss their majority goodbye!**

I have a reputation for calling it like it is. In my expert opinion, _this is the most important election in the country._ We don’t yet know who Jon’s Republican opponent will be, but we have a few clues, and none of the options look good.

That’s why we need to do EVERYTHING we can to support Jon in this race right as this campaign is rolling!

When I called Jon to ask how I could help, he said they had a critical fundraising coming up in 11 days and he thought I might be able to convince you folks how important this is.

**So listen up, folks: This election is going to be close. Right now, Jon’s team is $210,876 short of their goal! This early in the game, in a race as important as this one, this is not the time to be falling behind.**

[**With just hours left in this critical end-of-quarter deadline, I’m asking you to step up to the plate and chip in a split donation between Voter Protection Project and Jon’s campaign. Peter,
The way American democracy is designed – every single election counts.
Which is a great thing – _but it’s also what makes every single instance of election fraud so dangerous._
Every single illegally cast ballot or intentional error can make a huge difference – not only in who wins the election, but in the way the entire country is governed.
Just look at Arizona.
The Heritage Foundation has published multiple confirmed accounts of voter fraud in 2022.

We can’t let this become the norm in American elections.
At Preserve Democracy, we’re committed to fighting for free elections, fair elections, and the integrity of our elections.
We hope we can count on you to join us.

name: Team Swalwell
subject: What in the Florida is going on?!?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-march2023-fr-march?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-march2023-fr-march?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25]
Team,

Florida Republicans are doing everything they can to attach shame to bodily autonomy.

Just last week, they advanced a six-week abortion ban through the state House — and now, it’s making its way through the state legislature.

That’s way before most people even know they’re pregnant, friend. Not only is this bill stripping millions of Floridians of their bodily autonomy — it’s fueling far-right Republicans in their fight to impose felony charges on doctors who perform abortions, too.

That means doctors who provide necessary — and sometimes life-saving — reproductive health care procedures could be sentenced to five years in prison in addition to losing their medical licenses.

Friend, this cruel and draconian ban is fueled by none other than Florida’s Governor, Ron DeSantis. He’s made hints at running for President in 2024, and stripping our bodily autonomy at the national level is at the top of his priorities list.

We have to send him and the rest of his anti-choice cronies the message that we won’t let them take away our reproductive freedom. Donate today so we can defend choice in Florida and send a message loud and clear to DeSantis: We’re not giving up our right to choose without a hell of a fight. clean_body: Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. [] Team, Florida Republicans are doing everything they can to attach shame to bodily autonomy. Just last week, they advanced a six-week abortion ban through the state House — and now, it’s making its way through the state legislature. That’s way before most people even know they’re pregnant, friend. Not only is this bill stripping millions of Floridians of their bodily autonomy — it’s fueling far-right Republicans in their fight to impose felony charges on doctors who perform abortions, too. That means doctors who provide necessary — and sometimes life-saving — reproductive health care procedures could be sentenced to five years in prison in addition to losing their medical licenses. Friend, this cruel and draconian ban is fueled by none other than Florida’s Governor, Ron DeSantis. He’s made hints at running for President in 2024, and stripping our bodily autonomy at the national level is at the top of his priorities list. We have to send him and the rest of his anti-choice cronies the message that we won’t let them take away our reproductive freedom. Donate today so we can defend choice in Florida and send a message loud and clear to DeSantis: We’re not giving up our right to choose without a hell of a fight. [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: $5 → [] $15 → [] $25 → [] $50 → [] $100 → [] More → [] The right to choose is a fundamental freedom, and we won’t let right-wing extremists infringe upon our own personal, private health care decisions, friend. name: Katie Porter
subject: The job of California’s Senator
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
From helping Dems win up and down the ticket to advocating for Californians.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19732%2E3422442%2EqukNWz)
Derek, elected officials in Washington take some very different approaches to the job.
I’m running for the U.S. Senate to stand up to big corporations and corruption on behalf of working people. _Here’s what the job of being California’s Senator means to me:_
**Advocating for Californians:** It’s my job to make sure federal policy works for California families. This year I helped relaunch the SALT Caucus, which is fighting to reverse Trump tax code changes that unfairly punished middle class taxpayers in blue states.
**Bringing the best ideas from California to the rest of the country:** Our state is a leader in so many areas. From electric vehicle infrastructure to free community college, I’ll fight to bring the best California policies nationwide.
**Standing up to corruption and special interests:** I’ve never taken a dime from corporate PACs and I don’t take federal lobbyist money. I’m leading the fight to ban Members of Congress from trading stocks. I work only for my constituents.
**Showing up in every part of the state:** I grew up on a farm, and know rural areas are often overlooked. From Redding, to Bakersfield, to Indio and everywhere in between, I promise to continue hearing directly from diverse voices.
**Helping Democrats win tough seats:** California itself could deliver the House majority to Democrats, but we need leaders at the top of the ticket who can help turn out voters. I’ve represented a swing district and know how to win tough races. As a Senator, I’d be ready to play an important role representing Democrats all across the country, helping us win tough swing seats. I love campaigning!
**[This is gearing up to be a competitive race, and I could really use your help. Consider making a contribution today to help us lay the groundwork for our campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230320-1?refcode=em20230320-1&refcode2=19732_3422442_qukNWz&akid=19732%2E3422442%2EqukNWz)**
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230320-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAF20_1_SEN_20230320_V1_F&refcode2=19732_3422442_qukNWz&akid=19732%2E3422442%2EqukNWz)**
Thanks for considering,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF20_1_SEN_20230320_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=19732_3422442_qukNWz&akid=19732%2E3422442%2EqukNWz)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=19732%2E3422442%2EqukNWz)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=19732%2E3422442%2EqukNWz)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

subject: Business Meeting Thurs, Social Event Saturday
body:
Thursday at 7 we meet by Zoom. Saturday at 1 in person!

** Business Meeting Thursday@7:00 PM (Zoom)
------------------------------------------------------------
------------------------------------------------------------

** Spring Social!
Saturday@1PM
(Claire's Corner Copia)
------------------------------------------------------------
------------------------------------------------------------

Please join the Greater New Haven Green Party
for these Party-Building Events!

** We are looking forward to a year of Party Building!
------------------------------------------------------------
The need for an independent left party is clear. With Ranked Choice Voting hopefully coming soon to Connecticut, we need to be ready.
Come to meet other Greens and help plan our actions, spread the word about our party, and find more candidates!

** Business Meeting Thursday 3/23 @7:00PM
------------------------------------------------------------

Agenda: Approve January minutes (no meeting in Feb), Treasurer's report, Spending Plans, Website and Social Media plans, Event Plans, Bylaws review.

ZOOM link HERE (https://us02web.zoom.us/j/84023082569?pwd=T3UvaFpDMUo1WDdOMEhhb0hXc09TQT09)

** SPRING SOCIAL!
Claire's Corner Copia
Saturday 3/25 at 1PM
------------------------------------------------------------

Let's meet in person! We aim to have one social event every new season to get to know each other. Come to talk politics or whatever you like!
More Upcoming Events

** GPUS: Campaign 101
March 28, 9:00PM
------------------------------------------------------------

This 90-minute webinar is for candidates and campaign staff who are new to running for office and the functioning of a campaign. We will cover the basics that will form the foundation for your current and future campaigns: setting goals, assessing your resources, budgeting, organizing people and planning events.
Register for this Zoom event HERE (https://us06web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZwvcuqqrzIuG9zjbJsqe21vpgcukGICgky_) .

The Greater New Haven Green Party is a chapter
of the Green Party of Connecticut!

============================================================
** Facebook (https://www.facebook.com/groups/151639598620360)
** Twitter (https://twitter.com/newhavengreens)
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=b8edff8fb3)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=b8edff8fb3)
.

name: Becca Balint
subject: Reflections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont
body:
Updates and thanks

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60468807/397235505/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTc3YmE2NS03MGM3LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Imx9oEWSo5_dLAKPMqBz-TUrcJGaB9JNRSAkLc_KLek=&emci=dbef3250-60c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=b577ba65-70c7-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=43402272) | Hey Peter! It’s Becca. I'm back in DC and preparing for a week of committee work on the Oversight and Budget hearings. I am showing up every day with courage, kindness and integrity, which is the only way to combat the vitriol and distractions that I am presented with by extremist Republicans in the House. I caught up with Natalie, my campaign manager, this weekend, and we are both just shocked at how tight of a timeframe a two-year term in Congress feels. With the very high likelihood of having primary challengers, we really don’t have any time off from campaigning. **Our first fundraising deadline of the year is on March 31,** and Natalie let me know we are a few thousand dollars short of our goal. I do not accept any corporate PAC money, and it is truly folks like you that enable me to be here. clean_body: Updates and thanks | | Hey Peter! It’s Becca. I'm back in DC and preparing for a week of committee work on the Oversight and Budget hearings. I am showing up every day with courage, kindness and integrity, which is the only way to combat the vitriol and distractions that I am presented with by extremist Republicans in the House. I caught up with Natalie, my campaign manager, this weekend, and we are both just shocked at how tight of a timeframe a two-year term in Congress feels. With the very high likelihood of having primary challengers, we really don’t have any time off from campaigning. Our first fundraising deadline of the year is on March 31, and Natalie let me know we are a few thousand dollars short of our goal. I do not accept any corporate PAC money, and it is truly folks like you that enable me to be here. I am so honored and grateful for your trust, your support, and the kind words so many of you have sent me. I am working hard for you each and every day, and it is truly the honor of my life. Asking for money is my least favorite part of this job, but it is also how my team and I are able to get around the state, meet with people who may have never spoken with their representative, and support local candidates up and down the ballot in Vermont. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you for always having faith in me, and I hope to see you in the weeks ahead! — Becca = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . # ["Jihad" Against Montana Freedom Caucus](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=109455472&utm_source=post-email-title&isFreemail=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTA5NDU1NDcyLCJpYXQiOjE2NzkzNTI3NDUsImV4cCI6MTY4MTk0NDc0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.On9uGB_B4mFCnkLH5ZRcAUPyfa7A_SnXSRrDrDKFm4c)
### "Terrorist" is the go-to line for RINOs who get challenged by the Freedom Caucus.
| | [Andy Roth](https://substack.com/redirect/2477d77c-8acd-47d5-b282-c7a736bf2e9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| Mar 20

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2477d77c-8acd-47d5-b282-c7a736bf2e9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

|
| | [Save](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1424602&post_id=109455472&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&action=save&triggerSave=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTA5NDU1NDcyLCJpYXQiOjE2NzkzNTI3NDUsImV4cCI6MTY4MTk0NDc0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0MjQ2MDIiLCJzdWIiOiJzYXZlLXBvc3QifQ.l3WcmtxSlVMuovqqL5robeNRtfIu_EX5CtpQsvRFOHY)
---
Friends,
Former House Speaker John Boehner once famously compared his Republican opponents to "political terrorists." In January, when House Freedom Caucus members held up Kevin McCarthy's vote to become Speaker, Rep. Dan Crenshaw went on Fox Radio and [said](https://substack.com/redirect/d5bdfd2b-a575-4aae-98e8-bb578fe4618b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), "we cannot let the terrorists wins."
This is how RINOs respond when members of their own party stand up and demand they actually govern as conservatives. They have nothing to say on the issues so they resort to comparing conservatives to terrorists. Certainly an effective way to govern!
Believe it or not, it happened to our state freedom caucuses _**twice**_ this week.
**MONTANA:**
One of the biggest villains to the Montana Freedom Caucus has not been anyone in the legislature, but the state Supreme Court legislating from the bench. Specifically, the court has prevented the legislature from passing laws to [protect](https://substack.com/redirect/70062ff3-c7c9-41fc-8a9f-198e9c6ae223?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) unborn life, and claiming the state Constitution guarantees a right to an abortion when no such word exists in the document.
In response, the MT Freedom Caucus has proposed several [amendments](https://substack.com/redirect/971722b3-d0ab-4261-8e0a-82c375cefa00?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the state Constitution to hold the court accountable, such as reducing its size, making Supreme Court elections partisan, and giving the governor power to fill vacancies.
This did not sit well with former Montana Supreme Court Justice James Nelson, who called for a "jihad" against the MT Freedom Caucus and said that it would be a "fight to the death" to stop them from passing the amendments.
[Greg Price @greg_price11Former Montana Supreme Court Justice James Nelson just called for a "jihad" against the @MTFreedomCaucus because they are currently pushing several constitutional amendments in the legislature to hold the court accountable for legislating from the bench. ](https://substack.com/redirect/8c800a9b-9acd-4306-8294-43ec0cb75b03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[9:04 PM ∙ Mar 15, 2023
* * *
254Likes138Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/8c800a9b-9acd-4306-8294-43ec0cb75b03?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**SOUTH CAROLINA:**
The South Carolina legislature spent the week negotiating their budget for the next fiscal year. The SC Freedom Caucus offered a bold conservative vision that cut government spending, reformed the pension system, and defunded DEI and ESG programs in the state.
Ultimately, the supermajority "Republican" House, along with Democrats, shot down most of the SC Freedom Caucus's amendments. In the end, the SC Freedom Caucus voted against the woke, bloated budget - **it was the largest number of people to vote against the budget in 50 years.**
It wasn't all bad though, as they were able to get an [amendment](https://substack.com/redirect/80deea49-000c-4310-88e3-3429baaa5851?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) into the budget that prohibited schools from incentivizing students to take the COVID vaccine. And Republican leadership agreed to hold a vote later this year on defunding DEI at South Carolina's universities.
And like our friend on the Montana Supreme Court, a RINO state senator called the SC Freedom Caucus's common sense proposals "Taliban-ish."
[Tom Davis @SenTomDavisSCI detest the Taliban-ish "legislation"pushed by the @SCFreedomCaucus, but there's a silver lining: the poisonous populist strain that's infected the GOP at all levels of government has been thrown into stark relief, making clear what needs to be excised. ](https://substack.com/redirect/87c1aa0c-9177-459b-ac28-53b3a1b85a67?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[wltx.comWhat is the Freedom Caucus?A group of 20 conservative lawmakers who are vocal on legislation including issues like guns and abortions....](https://substack.com/redirect/1d22ab08-c8e4-4422-9945-7af30e2bb8a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[11:45 PM ∙ Mar 15, 2023
* * *
149Likes38Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/87c1aa0c-9177-459b-ac28-53b3a1b85a67?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**IDAHO:**
Idaho Republicans went all in on amnesty this week. In a state with just eighteen elected Democrats in the state legislature, a Memorial (aka resolution) was passed this week despite opposition from the ID Freedom Caucus. The memorial calls on the Biden Administration to flood the United States' labor market with more foreign workers, as well as give green cards to millions of illegal aliens holding American jobs.
[Idaho Freedom Caucus @freedomcaucusIDMemorial SJM101 is supporting amnesty during a time of crisis. The ID Freedom Caucus stands firmly in opposition to this attack on our national sovereignty & urges our leaders to prioritize strong border security measures & reject any attempts at amnesty. #idpol #idleg ](https://substack.com/redirect/ca22e0c4-08f7-43f6-9a8f-ff6c4ee9f8a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[6:31 PM ∙ Mar 13, 2023
* * *
97Likes47Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/ca22e0c4-08f7-43f6-9a8f-ff6c4ee9f8a9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As an historic crisis continues to rage on our southern border, this is what your red state leadership is focused on. Thankfully, the Idaho Freedom Caucus will continue to put their citizens before special interests.
**ARIZONA:**
The Arizona Freedom Caucus stood up against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) this week, introducing legislation that would ban it in the state. RCV is one of the biggest scams being pushed by the Left today to take over our elections. It overcomplicates the election process, taking power away from the voters and giving it to political consultants.
RCV is what allowed RINO Senator Lisa Murkowski to win re-election in Alaska last year despite being censured by the state Republican Party.
The AZ Freedom Caucus is ensuring that it will never come to Arizona.
[AZ State Rep. Austin Smith @azaustinsmithStanding with my fellow Republican lawmakers opposed to the scam known as Ranked Choice Voting. RCV does the exact opposite of what the proponents say. As long we're in the legislature, we will fight for the American principle - One Vote, One Person. ](https://substack.com/redirect/92750333-860b-4cad-80ce-97182ac27be7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[7:57 PM ∙ Mar 15, 2023
* * *
543Likes173Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/92750333-860b-4cad-80ce-97182ac27be7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**WYOMING:**
Wrapping up the week with some good news: Life has won in Wyoming.
Two bills this week that were championed by the WY Freedom Caucus in the legislature to protect life from conception and ban the selling of abortion pills in the state become law.
[Wyoming Freedom Caucus @WYFreedomCaucusThe WYFC, along with the majority of Wyomingites who believe in the sanctity of life, is celebrating today. In signing SF0109 and in allowing HB0152 to take effect without his signature, Gov. Gordon has completed a crucial step toward making WY a sanctuary for life. ](https://substack.com/redirect/8a12de9e-8c9a-4435-807f-925439dd7796?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[12:58 AM ∙ Mar 18, 2023

70Likes17Retweets](https://substack.com/redirect/8a12de9e-8c9a-4435-807f-925439dd7796?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**Keep fighting,**

**Andy Roth**

clean_body: "Terrorist" is the go-to line for RINOs who get challenged by the Freedom Caucus. | | ---|---|--- | | | or ? ? "Terrorist" is the go-to line for RINOs who get challenged by the Freedom Caucus. | | | Mar 20 | | | | Friends, Former House Speaker John Boehner once famously compared his Republican opponents to "political terrorists." In January, when House Freedom Caucus members held up Kevin McCarthy's vote to become Speaker, Rep. Dan Crenshaw went on Fox Radio and , "we cannot let the terrorists wins." This is how RINOs respond when members of their own party stand up and demand they actually govern as conservatives. They have nothing to say on the issues so they resort to comparing conservatives to terrorists. Certainly an effective way to govern! Believe it or not, it happened to our state freedom caucuses twice this week. MONTANA: One of the biggest villains to the Montana Freedom Caucus has not been anyone in the legislature, but the state Supreme Court legislating from the bench. Specifically, the court has prevented the legislature from passing laws to unborn life, and claiming the state Constitution guarantees a right to an abortion when no such word exists in the document. In response, the MT Freedom Caucus has proposed several to the state Constitution to hold the court accountable, such as reducing its size, making Supreme Court elections partisan, and giving the governor power to fill vacancies. This did not sit well with former Montana Supreme Court Justice James Nelson, who called for a "jihad" against the MT Freedom Caucus and said that it would be a "fight to the death" to stop them from passing the amendments. SOUTH CAROLINA: The South Carolina legislature spent the week negotiating their budget for the next fiscal year. The SC Freedom Caucus offered a bold conservative vision that cut government spending, reformed the pension system, and defunded DEI and ESG programs in the state. Ultimately, the supermajority "Republican" House, along with Democrats, shot down most of the SC Freedom Caucus's amendments. In the end, the SC Freedom Caucus voted against the woke, bloated budget - it was the largest number of people to vote against the budget in 50 years. It wasn't all bad though, as they were able to get an into the budget that prohibited schools from incentivizing students to take the COVID vaccine. And Republican leadership agreed to hold a vote later this year on defunding DEI at South Carolina's universities. And like our friend on the Montana Supreme Court, a RINO state senator called the SC Freedom Caucus's common sense proposals "Taliban-ish." IDAHO: Idaho Republicans went all in on amnesty this week. In a state with just eighteen elected Democrats in the state legislature, a Memorial (aka resolution) was passed this week despite opposition from the ID Freedom Caucus. The memorial calls on the Biden Administration to flood the United States' labor market with more foreign workers, as well as give green cards to millions of illegal aliens holding American jobs. As an historic crisis continues to rage on our southern border, this is what your red state leadership is focused on. Thankfully, the Idaho Freedom Caucus will continue to put their citizens before special interests. ARIZONA: The Arizona Freedom Caucus stood up against Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) this week, introducing legislation that would ban it in the state. RCV is one of the biggest scams being pushed by the Left today to take over our elections. It overcomplicates the election process, taking power away from the voters and giving it to political consultants. RCV is what allowed RINO Senator Lisa Murkowski to win re-election in Alaska last year despite being censured by the state Republican Party. The AZ Freedom Caucus is ensuring that it will never come to Arizona. WYOMING: Wrapping up the week with some good news: Life has won in Wyoming. Two bills this week that were championed by the WY Freedom Caucus in the legislature to protect life from conception and ban the selling of abortion pills in the state become law. Keep fighting, Andy Roth President State Freedom Caucus Network P.S. Your help is critical in building out a network of patriots and freedom fighters throughout our nation's state capitols and in your home state. Please consider a and join us as we work to advance the cause of liberty. State Freedom Caucus Network is free today. name: CaucusRoom
subject: Welcome to the Political Circus
body:
Eggs pulled from the shelves at this popular store. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-yk/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday! **
## **Join us tonight at 6 P MT for the [March CaucusRoom Council Meeting](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-y/). **
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-j/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-t/) **Political Circus** The **[weaponization of justice against former President Trump](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-i/)** is on full display and will not stop him from running for President in 2024. Meanwhile, Maxine Waters is **[calling conservatives Domestic Terrorists](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-d/)** again. **Putin Visits Ukraine** Russian President Vladimir**[Putin visited a captured Ukrainian city](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-h/) **on Sunday for the first time since invading the country last year. **White House Priorities are Wrong**
# Instead of hearing about Russia, China, Iran, or North Korea, or how fentanyl poisoning [killed 100,000 Americans](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-k/), **[Cornyn heard too much about"climate change" and "racially and ethnically motivated extremists" being this country's most pressing threats.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-u/)**
**FBI Terror Watchlist** Southern border agents **[arrested sixteen people on the FBI's terror watchlist last month](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-o/)** as border arrests are set to outpace record numbers encountered in the last year. **No Bail Out for Small Banks**
## [Janet Yellen](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-x/) admitted in a hearing that the **[FDIC and the Federal Reserve might not guarantee large deposits at small community ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-m/)[banks](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-c/)** as they did for a failed California bank.
**Eggs Pulled From the Shelves** Egg prices have increased by as much as 60% in the last year,**[prompting the popular store to pull eggs over not being able to make a profit.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-q/)** **We Deserve to Know** Rep. Byron Donalds said **[Republicans would continue to dig into the Biden family's financial records](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-a/)** to learn why the current first family was so cozy with the Chinese Communist Party.

**Let****'s[ have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-f/)!**
* If you want your kids to **[grow up right](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-z/)**.
* This is **[true](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-v/)**.
* **[Stay](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-e/)** where you are.
* Resting **[cat face](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qkdtkg-trhiujldw-s/)**.

name: Helen Gym
subject: Building 21
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-mar2023]
I’m participating in the Board of Education’s mayoral forum tomorrow night. It’ll start at 6:30pm at the Parkway Central Library branch. If you can attend, please complete this form to RSVP. Hope to see you there!
RSVP [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdrZFnpQErmoqIYEN4t4IYIKQ9fo0AYg0naZfGsRxMFeyZLTA/viewform]

The School District of Philadelphia has failed to provide parents the basic guarantee that their children will be safe when they walk through those school doors. Most recently, we learned that students at Building 21 and Gratz were denied their right to a safe education when asbestos was discovered in school facilities.

We’ve been here too many times before. We can draw a direct line of destruction from the massive divestment and defunding of our schools over a decade ago to the school closures and educational disruptions that are impacting our kids today.

The emergency that the students at Building 21 and Gratz have experienced is not unlike the challenges faced by students at Cassidy or Ben Franklin High School or at Pierce Elementary — and in every case, it was the community that came together to demand their children's basic right to learn in a safe school.

On my watch, no student will be sent to a school that is unsafe. I’ll share more details in a moment, but will you add your name to support our vision for safe and healthy public schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hjXlKiKX60qscRRrhyiWYw2]

SIGN ON [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hjXlKiKX60qscRRrhyiWYw2]

As us adults know far too well, you only get to be a kid once. To have the milestones and memories of this critical period of their lives interrupted due to negligence is just robbery. Time and time again, our kids suffer because of the District’s failure to act. The District knew about the dangers at Building 21 for years, and despite numerous Council laws and hearings, they continuously failed to answer the call when staff, students, and families’ lives were at stake.

As Mayor, I will ensure that the City and District’s dysfunction and hostility toward fixing our schools will end. That’s why I’ve proposed a citywide action plan that will align all parties around a shared vision for safe, healthy public schools. This plan will:

🏫Prioritize the safety and wellbeing of students and staff by immediately addressing the most dangerous conditions in District-owned buildings and ensuring that all facilities have the administrative support needed to maintain a safe school environment;

📊Increase transparency around building conditions and unresolved school facility issues by making data on school facilities publicly available to school communities and local leaders;

👩👩👧👦Make parents and community members part of the solution by establishing parent councils to assist with plans for alternative spaces for displaced school communities while remediations and renovations are being completed;

📑Establish an intergovernmental agreement and taskforce to convene stakeholders, organized labor, and community members to develop a 10-year plan to modernize our schools; and

💰Secure and deploy funding to guarantee the health and safety of every student in Philadelphia by advocating for a greater share of state funding to flow through our funding formula, convening municipal leaders to advocate for the restoration and increased funding for PLANCON, and seeking buy-in from Philadelphia’s leading eds and meds.

Will you add your name as a community supporter of our citywide action plan for safer, healthier schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hjXlKiKX60qscRRrhyiWYw2]

SIGN ON [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hjXlKiKX60qscRRrhyiWYw2]

Together, we can rid our facilities of asbestos, lead, and mold. But it will take a leader who truly believes in our school communities and can organize stakeholders, work hand-in-hand with communities, and deliver results for our students.

As Mayor, I will deliver on a ten-year plan that doesn’t just apply band-aids to long-overlooked crises but ushers our schools into the 21st century.

— Helen

https://secure.ngpvan.com/hjXlKiKX60qscRRrhyiWYw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/hjXlKiKX60qscRRrhyiWYw2]
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]
Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please unsubscribe. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Vi6mnRf0jkCnbZV_ILvlFQ2?unsubscribedata=5Q7%2B02hW5xfmDD16cv3JQFRj7l0794SAODOPHN6gQXigzimYWm5%2B1h0dbByPtKVTOiouee5wXEF6b%2BFaNqgMvK5NT2JvI2GG81x%2BU7sk4LOcWTA%2BdSAyisZc%2BfMoCQAGUZ%2Bfg0QBNzzskW4VkZr4WqbMGMr3Jy4NCDtqGgpCNULyutelTYn4Z6%2BAsOjm07Ail3NbHwEuK1CuAvo2TbjIYwt9k59QHY2qin%2B2RLtTLJQqeRGrZ%2FK%2BccLOM6MbFNaB7S02akBico%2FG8ysRBZ97Ts1kaANLUDrjDpZieUscAEGzMVXXUUQ2nt%2FXQY4EXDKq1%2BZAw6s8SI3NZKsro2OYi2y2LFCIlwa1vIRIdGENgKRMGvZx283PLCqrwP4AzQsA7ZVcV5OPOHWrZd8QlmGdKnvqPbIsuWV7LHoNDT7qgs3%2BH0KgB9NZig34B5yEOS%2Br]

name: Full Mag News
subject: Homeowner Gives Robbers Painful Send-Off After Late Night Break In
body:
