name: Working Families Party
subject: UPDATE: Elizabeth Warren calls for an investigation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Elizabeth Warren is calling for an independent investigation of "the Fed and the whole regulatory system." | | | Peter — since we sent the below email last week, more reporting has emerged that federal regulators knew that Silicon Valley Bank was heading toward a crisis for more than a year. **And yesterday, Elizabeth Warren called for an independent investigation of "the Fed and the whole regulatory system."** **[Add your name if you agree: We need to strengthen federal regulations on banks and stop protecting the interests of bankers and tech billionaires over working people.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQgUBrlf1uzEVBxTTYLTiG0VP7Vzpm70lj8PFUn3l4pL_R_8QuCQIZ-3VTdSm3cqjaYyyKSYb9QlI8ThfLN6Q-d_d9V0BYDwgvVKSKBJVgy7aZW5yQWvJQN0SNICbPfmG3z0tLaaUOtWk6lk63YfB7Jdb7Dw-IAidKd_M0p_zLrz3e8nZNpDk1S5nYyfJWBJ_zd1tiWGZ7U9bmY54OO51BSsxDLm-fd9XT0inAkdYdEAH9kP4zBYyta8dGEJPS3_qZlhoQ9t46OJ43tkWyIKu_4pzcaCUN6cgTe6L44UGDGrW_x48mo4bzDom7Owea2wLURghH4y_XOnHn5gXTRKQhQxxP_PoVzfA9O-MEs0gz4N3/3un/05nvVc6ORG6n6cDk-4v_IA/h0/iURvik-hz1U1i9WtN78WbEPk4_78ruOkZjX0ykmukEI)** **[Add your name](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQgUBrlf1uzEVBxTTYLTiG0VP7Vzpm70lj8PFUn3l4pL_R_8QuCQIZ-3VTdSm3cqjaYyyKSYb9QlI8ThfLN6Q-d8GM1Iy0qRT94KAIQ-6h3QS2Y7KViWQsyjIxOSrJuO6x-hsPc0z6rTxcdC1a0foeo2MRawSqa5azBtRglh-ZyPjEglQuOCOOy6tqTdPzV_12lWh0rCCOgdKl9h7DdtVXiPGjxJairlwEnoJwXnu_QtRKr7EOZnIkWzw7E_AWraWJpRZb5gVxUK3u70Vvmb8E1dWc4X1QymKSMZdyrilNNQIKZs-HYOFgU0uDTYeiKFJPluhTgoF9l6PUaTA3zyXz2zmMGHKUxIn1akLSjHW0edM/3un/05nvVc6ORG6n6cDk-4v_IA/h1/_UZl7KFvV0prn0RWCUA1q6_9i9QwD6ASiUbAxNNmU0U)** — Team WFP \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Working Families Party
Date: March 15, 2023
Subject: Sign on: We need stronger regulations on banks Peter — Over the past few days, the second and third largest bank failures in U.S. history have grabbed national headlines and injected new uncertainty into the lives of working people everywhere. **This was the predictable result of Donald Trump and Republicans — along with the support of way too many Democrats — rolling back regulations on banks in 2018.** And it is going to happen again, unless we do something about it. Yesterday, Senator Elizabeth Warren introduced legislation that would reverse a key piece of the 2018 bill, and reinstitute stronger regulations on banks with assets between $50 and $250 billion — banks just like Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank of NY, the two banks who were taken over by the FDIC last week. **[Will you add your name in support of Elizabeth Warren’s bill to strengthen regulations on banks like the ones who failed over the past week? We need to stop protecting the interests of Big Banks and tech billionaires over working people.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQgUBrlf1uzEVBxTTYLTiG0VP7Vzpm70lj8PFUn3l4pL_R_8QuCQIZ-3VTdSm3cqjaYyyKSYb9QlI8ThfLN6Q-d_c2N0hKM1h-8Bi4THre6OPBNDxJrAbrT6hAnBwK9ntV8WGDkuu4j8Bk-t4dGE4eeMYDyLdchKYYDCEw-d_bgP2fwcZ1jKpujgkQMkxlLPTQ2SWc-9GWQ7XFGw5UqE13ASMebvhwE2DcDWRzd7o3ZRy_ljJV7h0KBj14LCjx2u4KgB17A0mnBaNjYrljwoK2luZBytgcArQBs1PnGARaIHBPfzUfga0yiYbYWS-rwy9uO0gUAM64k_Mn5YIxz_G0l-FKpc4mpLtFHtZpG0fflp7/3un/05nvVc6ORG6n6cDk-4v_IA/h2/twd79rYM5QEDth4agPxQm23CkFHkObyiQLW80HBWQEM)** **[Add your name](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQgUBrlf1uzEVBxTTYLTiG0VP7Vzpm70lj8PFUn3l4pL_R_8QuCQIZ-3VTdSm3cqjaYyyKSYb9QlI8ThfLN6Q-d9DWMqolQmT-2gqVvfpzTuLtlK7tt4MecTE-cIEnmiMP7KqB8jS5H05XSK-iU8KZyBtuoTaQUYHeubPb6XBThq3b57BFJu4pgnOlGC3TeHpJsILStEPWlrw8yIvYOsPuxAPWQSCUYZWp6JH8aOY5QuNqgTTob0D6nldKUBPBhimETOgeDC8hmxlqVeDzW0VPnCc_mIVcnJD49N9EAFq-Ms7Tu4oiNU9axk6xiMkTkFi_wx5U6Vghx76nDfyygil1kUhqyqpaXD9XAWIWwm0ffii/3un/05nvVc6ORG6n6cDk-4v_IA/h3/uGwp1iirde0JKWQl6t3bHENycak-X-Ab4neH7QG7Syo)** After the 2008 financial crisis, most in Congress knew they had to respond to public pressure demanding that big banks couldn't destroy the financial wellbeing of millions of people again. So they did. In 2010, Congress passed the Dodd-Frank Act, which included reforms that were supposed to prevent future crises — and ensure that if they did happen, the government wouldn't be on the hook. Unsurprisingly, Wall Street and its executives and lawyers didn't like the law. They spent millions trying to defeat and weaken it. And eventually, they did. **In 2018, Congress — including many Democrats — voted for Trump’s rollback of some of the banking reforms enacted in Dodd-Frank.** Five years ago this week, 17 Senate Democrats joined Republicans in voting for these rollbacks. They were joined by 33 House Democrats, including then-Rep. Kyrsten Sinema. And Silicon Valley's Bank CEO Greg Becker, who made $9.9 million last year and who sold $3.6 million of company stock days before his bank failed last week, was one of the people who aggressively lobbied for this same bill in 2018. The emergency measures taken by the federal government this week to prevent a full-blown financial crisis include what looks like a new guarantee of all banking deposits and a new lending program that offers generous terms to banks that took the same risks as SVB. So while SVB’s executives and shareholders may not be getting a bailout, many other banks are getting a pretty sweet deal. **Our government has shown once again that it is in fact capable of taking quick action to address what it perceives to be an emergency.** This is especially the case when an incredibly powerful industry like Silicon Valley tells the government that they’ll suffer irreparable damage if immediate action isn’t taken. But the government isn't taking swift action when it's working people who are struggling. We need accountability. We need public banking options. We need to stop protecting the interests of Big Banks and tech billionaires over working people. **We need a government that has working people's backs.** **[If you agree, add your name to support Elizabeth Warren’s bill to reinstate the regulations on banks that Trump scrapped in 2018, and which could have prevented the failures we’ve seen this past clean_body: Elizabeth Warren is calling for an independent investigation of "the Fed and the whole regulatory system." | | | Peter — since we sent the below email last week, more reporting has emerged that federal regulators knew that Silicon Valley Bank was heading toward a crisis for more than a year. And yesterday, Elizabeth Warren called for an independent investigation of "the Fed and the whole regulatory system." — Team WFP \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Working Families Party Date: March 15, 2023 Subject: Sign on: We need stronger regulations on banks Peter — Over the past few days, the second and third largest bank failures in U.S. history have grabbed national headlines and injected new uncertainty into the lives of working people everywhere. This was the predictable result of Donald Trump and Republicans — along with the support of way too many Democrats — rolling back regulations on banks in 2018. And it is going to happen again, unless we do something about it. Yesterday, Senator Elizabeth Warren introduced legislation that would reverse a key piece of the 2018 bill, and reinstitute stronger regulations on banks with assets between $50 and $250 billion — banks just like Silicon Valley Bank and Signature Bank of NY, the two banks who were taken over by the FDIC last week. After the 2008 financial crisis, most in Congress knew they had to respond to public pressure demanding that big banks couldn't destroy the financial wellbeing of millions of people again. So they did. In 2010, Congress passed the Dodd-Frank Act, which included reforms that were supposed to prevent future crises — and ensure that if they did happen, the government wouldn't be on the hook. Unsurprisingly, Wall Street and its executives and lawyers didn't like the law. They spent millions trying to defeat and weaken it. And eventually, they did. In 2018, Congress — including many Democrats — voted for Trump’s rollback of some of the banking reforms enacted in Dodd-Frank. Five years ago this week, 17 Senate Democrats joined Republicans in voting for these rollbacks. They were joined by 33 House Democrats, including then-Rep. Kyrsten Sinema. And Silicon Valley's Bank CEO Greg Becker, who made $9.9 million last year and who sold $3.6 million of company stock days before his bank failed last week, was one of the people who aggressively lobbied for this same bill in 2018. The emergency measures taken by the federal government this week to prevent a full-blown financial crisis include what looks like a new guarantee of all banking deposits and a new lending program that offers generous terms to banks that took the same risks as SVB. So while SVB’s executives and shareholders may not be getting a bailout, many other banks are getting a pretty sweet deal. Our government has shown once again that it is in fact capable of taking quick action to address what it perceives to be an emergency. This is especially the case when an incredibly powerful industry like Silicon Valley tells the government that they’ll suffer irreparable damage if immediate action isn’t taken. But the government isn't taking swift action when it's working people who are struggling. We need accountability. We need public banking options. We need to stop protecting the interests of Big Banks and tech billionaires over working people. We need a government that has working people's backs. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . clean_body: | | | BREAKING from The New York Times: "Trump Claims His Arrest Is Imminent and Calls for Protests, Echoing Jan. 6" | | | | Trump is facing potential indictment, and he's using this as an opportunity to rally his base and call for protests. | | | | Disgraced former President Donald Trump could be facing an indictment from a Manhattan grand jury in connection with a hush money payment to Stormy Daniels. With his potential arrest looming, Trump has taken to Truth Social to speak out and call on his supporters to protest, evoking memories of the Jan. 6 attack on our country. While we don't yet know for sure whether Trump will be arrested, this is just one of TWENTY lawsuits and investigations he is currently facing. Trump has gotten away with criminal activity for far too long. It's time he faces the consequences of his actions. At American Bridge, we work to hold Republicans accountable, and we believe an indictment is the first step toward accountability for Trump. But our work relies on your input, friend. We need 5,000 TOP Democrats to let us know where they stand before midnight, and YOUR response is still missing. name: Senator Britt
subject: I’ve been to the border 3 times
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
I won’t stay silent about our border crisis | | |
---
[](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=db2aecf14c5b488a8a3d8e3a5de7e3e4&_e=T8aC_RTuVjLMbOVATuiiww34rvNR2gumUd8PvUE-KUXOMSvLAHZ-eZne1hwkW_-cmJ0dk5uouF5oT2kgK2s1GNhYADTaff3uuK6dQbtmQLeb1I_Dft9emzRgdyPs_4gme4K3zrhyLtaQnCQTdheXL6SyLCgvcXA9yJ0Ba3hVLJFsOBrL7xxMSHL1fFyykLK7ACI1_NPL-20Jyqo_sFE5yv35dQGZ_X_4XneOfyZYLoX7M2Vy8LlzAqcF8JU9lFtvQeS6G87DzznsIl63tgvDY7LxrwacEPdpkVgz8lloRr7C7CIppUdFwLkPEvA4QNtoHNv4RYvalfTDXpusqIO3WmLSjv-0X0N0zVwPMBnbXQJysQMU1MU0eACF6iHK8RTVcCZrJZgLAQI7Tn3_FKti3w8qRVq9Grchr7P8WHhYgU4%3D)
---
Peter, During my first two months in office, I traveled to the border three times. That’s three times the number of visits President Biden has made in **TWO YEARS**.
---
[**Chip in NOW. Secure the Border.**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=db2aecf14c5b488a8a3d8e3a5de7e3e4&_e=T8aC_RTuVjLMbOVATuiiww34rvNR2gumUd8PvUE-KUXOMSvLAHZ-eZne1hwkW_-cmJ0dk5uouF5oT2kgK2s1GNhYADTaff3uuK6dQbtmQLeb1I_Dft9emzRgdyPs_4gme4K3zrhyLtaQnCQTdheXL6SyLCgvcXA9yJ0Ba3hVLJFsOBrL7xxMSHL1fFyykLK7ACI1_NPL-20Jyqo_sFE5yv35dQGZ_X_4XneOfyZYLoX7M2Vy8LlzAqcF8JU9lFtvQeS6G87DzznsIl63tgvDY_CjqRIN0fkNpP6pqK36l1yNLjRyAtYZCQO81sBFs4KxcAqWYuF-cN8vNNIte17kmsO0biNHP8TmUKbqghd2qSemL4gwRXnTgAO351TAChcVBzXc3yDsnLjMA5XNxXYkp_wZC_mYwcmSGixVbQDiwoE%3D)
---
There’s no denying it. Biden has completely neglected our border crisis. As drugs, criminals, and human traffickers flow freely between the U.S. and Mexico, [**Biden can’t be bothered to do more than one measly photo-op.**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=db2aecf14c5b488a8a3d8e3a5de7e3e4&_e=T8aC_RTuVjLMbOVATuiiww34rvNR2gumUd8PvUE-KUXOMSvLAHZ-eZne1hwkW_-cmJ0dk5uouF5oT2kgK2s1GNhYADTaff3uuK6dQbtmQLeb1I_Dft9emzRgdyPs_4gme4K3zrhyLtaQnCQTdheXL6SyLCgvcXA9yJ0Ba3hVLJFsOBrL7xxMSHL1fFyykLK7ACI1_NPL-20Jyqo_sFE5yv35dQGZ_X_4XneOfyZYLoX7M2Vy8LlzAqcF8JU9lFtvQeS6G87DzznsIl63tgvDY8PWaX16vC6KkTuCfxjWV8mAnYv1qc1htxZ3ayGIGe-XxsjBIKcWzUstDb_F7H8zssU7f6QFV9O5lqIaFsBjEES6GrDy7k_d-1xjCZHKECAxBBL3mt_kVI49X3LmDL6vzucIX7Sz-k6DXLROV1E_EdU%3D) I’m joining my Republican colleagues in the Senate to **HOLD BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE** for the border crisis he’s thrust upon us, but Democrats will do anything to make sure Biden doesn’t have to answer for his failures. Hey Fellow American,

I am about to walk out the door and into my next meeting, so I need to keep this super short.

Last month I found out my seat is the number ONE target for Democrats to flip in 2024. They are pledging _millions_ to turn this seat blue and take back the majority... **and it all comes down to SC-01 – the most purple district in the nation.**

Which is why I am out meeting with voters, developing my digital strategy, and promoting yard signs and billboards early in the cycle.

**I am building a grassroots team from scratch, which is why I need your help:**[**will you send me $5 or more to fund our voter outreach efforts and invest in this race early before the Left can gain any more momentum?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=136af8a91bb143c1afb7cfd25d1733cc&_e=sP1Yy6Sasly_jnAKNOI-_8j1SC6KUyfLEO_XP9XYJADRDD3DsNTqAWQpzdinPyj6Yx1Hy0_uBlyn9M88AgYmZICbclOiLQLSKY9hNhJ52ANZHFmqGXdU_mEO8HsUxYEFW79zVG28GqhcQWynbQi_G8tMwAKEY1Qg6fyHctt1ODOaqe0AXXyftml-ocM90rHO4DVzMlHzbBY84XN0bKLJFMShYTSryW0XMMWheos71XDHQi4TFjSYtMd68MihpZb5sshzRHnHbql3z356mp_9S78uKCcKNZz4SBT-yd-PC2LR7VJtzBGGqRjxZ_mrqpTrvxSDC9FEJvF6dl3rvrLBlyq2U_iSmjr57_Uwb7KVroYbXpLmviD1P5ePBQ_QixcBdPd2Dhr3Frlu6eWxSE3DGjjkIIzugoHQtcR0VijDFjk%3D)

They are pledging millions to turn this seat blue and take back the majority... and it all comes down to SC-01 – the most purple district in the nation. | | Hey Fellow American, I am about to walk out the door and into my next meeting, so I need to keep this super short. Last month I found out my seat is the number ONE target for Democrats to flip in 2024. They are pledging millions to turn this seat blue and take back the majority... and it all comes down to SC-01 – the most purple district in the nation. Which is why I am out meeting with voters, developing my digital strategy, and promoting yard signs and billboards early in the cycle. I am building a grassroots team from scratch, which is why I need your help: Let me tell you this – no one will work harder to fight for you than I will. I know what it’s like to live paycheck to paycheck, which is why I understand the real problems Americans across the nation are facing. **Here’s the truth about George Santos, folks.**

We need critical infrastructure investments here in West Michigan and across the United States. Kids are going hungry in our schools. Gas prices are still too high. Hardworking families are struggling to make ends meet. Reproductive freedom is under attack.

**These are the issues that affect working families like mine every single day. I came to Congress to advocate for my constituents, not to waste time playing politics.**

Since Republicans took control of the House of Representatives, they’ve been busy pushing extremist policies and fighting amongst themselves. I’m organizing early so that we are in the best position possible to defend this seat and retake the Democratic House Majority in 2024 – because the last thing we want to happen is realizing on Election Day that we could have done more.

clean_body: We need critical infrastructure investments here in West Michigan and across the United States. | = | = Here’s the truth about George Santos, folks. We need critical infrastructure investments here in West Michigan and across the United States. Kids are going hungry in our schools. Gas prices are still too high. Hardworking families are struggling to make ends meet. Reproductive freedom is under attack. These are the issues that affect working families like mine every single day. I came to Congress to advocate for my constituents, not to waste time playing politics. Since Republicans took control of the House of Representatives, they’ve been busy pushing extremist policies and fighting amongst themselves. I’m organizing early so that we are in the best position possible to defend this seat and retake the Democratic House Majority in 2024 – because the last thing we want to happen is realizing on Election Day that we could have done more. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much, Hillary * | | = Paid for by Scholten for Congress Hillary Scholten for Congress PO Box 6233 Grand Rapids, MI 49510 United States | = If you would like to receive fewer emails, . name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Our very first FEC deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18911?t=1001&akid=3074%2E346206%2Ee5VxHh ][IMG]

Peter —

I launched my campaign to replace Josh Hawley on January 6th because we
can’t afford to send another fraud or coward to represent Missouri in the
U.S. Senate.

As a 13-year Marine veteran, I know what it means to serve my country. And
as a Missourian who watched my own community be stripped for parts by
massive corporations and corrupt elites like Hawley, I’m ready to fight
back.

Our campaign is on a mission to give power back to everyday, working
people — and we’re building it the right way, with no money from corporate
PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil + Big Pharma executives. That’s why I
need your help today:

Our very first FEC deadline is just around the corner and it’s absolutely
critical that we stay on track.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18911?t=1002&akid=3074%2E346206%2Ee5VxHh ]So Peter, will you split a donation of $20 or whatever you
think is best between my campaign and Charles Booker right now? If we keep
up our momentum early on in this race, we really can defeat Josh Hawley
and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat next year.

Missourians have spent the last three election cycles taking back their
power at the ballot box by rejecting anti-union “Right-to-Work” laws,
raising the minimum wage, expanding healthcare, and legalizing weed.

Next year, we’re going to make it four by defeating Josh Hawley and
electing a real warrior for working people to Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.

Thanks for being part of it,

— Lucas Kunce

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18911?t=1003&akid=3074%2E346206%2Ee5VxHh ]CHIP IN →
